- A chair with a backrest. Made from branches, leaves, and vines, it is quite comfortable and will ease the exhaustion of any user racing to beat a deadline.\nBut the designer failed to consider that making a chair too comfortable can make those who sit in it too relaxed, and as they forget about their worries and carries, they will no longer feel nervous and anxious as the deadline approaches. This results in poor time management and working at too leisurely a pace, resulting in sudden panic when the user finally comes to their senses... Legend says a certain director once made this mistake, and it nearly resulted in calamity... ｜ 以树枝，叶片和藤条制作而成的靠背椅，椅面和椅背富有弹性，坐感相当舒适，据说能减轻使用者在赶稿时的疲劳。\n不过设计者也许没想到，太过舒服的椅子有时会让人们过度愉悦，忘记了截稿日临近的紧张心情，分配时间不当，悠悠哉哉地干活，结果幡然醒悟时慌慌张张…传说，某位导演就曾犯下过这样的过失，差点酿成大错…

- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 5 rapid strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a certain amount of Stamina to unleash 2 rapid sword strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多五段的连续剑击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，瞬间向前方挥出两剑。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成范围伤害。
- Greetings, are you here to take a meal, or to find a room for the night? ｜ 请问贵客是用餐还是投宿呢？
- The Energy Amplifier has not been equipped with any Irminsul Fruit Fragments. Persisting in this challenge may result in failure. Do you wish to continue challenging this Domain? ｜ 导能原盘单人方案中未装备地脉之果碎片，挑战可能失败，是否继续？
- Namecard style.\nYou want to know what the future holds? Then stay here and sit tight. Let this little kitty resist the urge to knock the crystal ball onto the ground, and steal the secrets of fate for you. ｜ 名片纹饰。\n你问未来？且在此处坐好。让猫猫忍住把水晶球扒落到地下的冲动，为你把命运的秘密偷来。

- After placing the "Flash Step" component of the "Speedy Rhythm" series of furnishing combinations and ensuring that the furnishing combination is complete, players and small animals can step on "Flash Step" for a short while until it lights up, after which the "Speedy Rhythm" furnishing combination of the matching color will record 1 point being scored.\nNo points will be scored for stepping on Flash Step again within the next 2s. ｜ 摆放「疾行节奏」系列摆设组合中的「闪烁踏板」，确保摆设组合完整后，玩家和小动物在「闪烁踏板」上短暂停留，直到踏板发光，对应色彩的「疾行节奏」摆设组合将记录一次得分。\n2秒内重复踩踏「闪烁踏板」，将不会记录得分。

### Part 033

- I've always believed that human lives follow a set of rules, with each person being a collection of past experiences. ｜ 我始终认为，人这样的生命个体遵循规律而生，是过去经历的总集。

- $[K1]: When your active character is <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A1202]</color>, equip this card.\nAfter $[A1202] equips this card, immediately use <color=#FFD780FF>$[S12022]</color> once.\nWhen your $[A1202] has this card equipped, the <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C112021]</color> created can block DMG of at least 2 and its starting $[K3] +1.\n(You must have $[A1202] in your deck to add this card to your deck.) ｜ $[K1]：我方出战角色为<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A1202]</color>时，装备此牌。\n$[A1202]装备此牌后，立刻使用一次<color=#FFD780FF>$[S12022]</color>。\n装备有此牌的$[A1202]生成的<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C112021]</color>改为可以抵挡至少为2的伤害，并且初始$[K3]+1。\n（牌组中包含$[A1202]，才能加入牌组）

- Tirzad, you're too much! Paimon thinks that Jeht really was in the dark about this, but as for Jebrael... ｜ 提尔扎德，再怎么说也太过分啦，我看婕德应该是真的不知情，只是哲伯莱勒嘛…
- I agree. And the further we get, the more I feel like this place is a whole lot bigger than we imagined. ｜ 我同意。越往里走我越觉得，这里比想象中要大上太多了。

- Hmm, something about her rubbed me the wrong way since the very beginning. But, to be more precise... it was probably around the time when I saw Bonnie try to get away from her. ｜ 一开始就有一点点，不过开始认真怀疑的时间点…应该是她被邦妮讨厌的时候？

- But even though she said she didn't wanna go, she's really proud of you anyway! You should've seen her smile while we were chatting — any wider, and it would've split her face in two! ｜ 闲云虽然嘴上说着不想去，但她可为你感到自豪啦！她刚刚聊天时，嘴角都快翘到天上去了。

- I understand... I am indebted to you for your protection. You know I would not dream of disappointing you, don't you? ｜ 明白明白，承蒙您关照，我又怎么敢辜负您的期望呢？

- Why bother? The scrolls always end up completed on time, so what's the point of figuring it out for yourself? ｜ 多事，明明每次都能如期做好，浪费这些时间干什么？
- Ah, I see... Thank you so much. I'm really grateful, but unfortunately, there's just something special about my hat... ｜ 哦，原来是这样，谢谢你们。但很不好意思，对我来说，不是原来的那顶帽子就不行…
- Use Elemental Sight to find the Rock Pillar Pearl and Rock Pillar Warding Stone that the ward is missing, and place them back onto the ward. ｜ 利用元素视野寻找镇物所缺失的「磐柱镶珠」与「磐柱镇石」，并放置在镇物上。
- The story of how Barbara obtained her Vision is hardly the typical tale of high-stakes heroism.\nShe had just joined the church and was looking after a little boy with a high and persisting fever.\nNothing Barbara could think of would console the boy and bring an end to his relentless tears.\nSomeone remarked that while the boy had already taken his medicine, there was no way to cure the pain of missing one's family.\nAnother suggested that Barbara sing a song for the boy to raise his spirits.\nBarbara had never sung a song in her life up until this point, but how could she shy away from it in a moment like this?\n"Never having sung before is no reason to abandon a child in their time of need," Barbara thought to herself.\nAnd so, Barbara took the boy in her arms and sang him a song: a lullaby, the only song she knew.\nIt was an unceremonious beginning to her singing career. After quickly realizing that she barely knew any of the words, she had to resort to humming the tune instead.\nNevertheless, her voice began to soothe the child, and so she kept singing. She sang the same song, over and over again, until her throat was dry and her voice was hoarse. Finally, the boy fell asleep. Exhausted, Barbara lay down by the wall and fell straight asleep herself.\nEarly the next morning, Barbara awoke to discover that the boy's fever had come down. Perhaps it was because she had sung for him, or perhaps it had something to do with the Vision which had mysteriously appeared next to her hand at some point during the night.\nBarbara was not preoccupied with the Vision, however. It was the sight of the boy smiling once again that filled her heart with joy.\nBarbara received her Vision for the simple but beautiful wish that took hold in her heart that night: A dream of healing the sick through the power of song. ｜ 芭芭拉获得「神之眼」时，并没在做什么伟大的事。\n当时她刚刚进入教会不久，正在照顾一个高烧不退的孩子。\n无论芭芭拉怎么哄，孩子都哭闹不休。\n有人说，他已经服下药剂，可对亲人的想念无从缓解。\n又有人说，唱歌给孩子听吧，这样他就会好起来。\n到那时为止，芭芭拉从未唱过歌。不过她不会在这种时刻退缩。\n就算从来没有唱过歌，她也无法丢下需要照顾的孩子。\n芭芭拉抱着高烧不退的孩子，唱起了自己记得的唯一一首摇篮曲。\n最开始，她唱得很笨拙，连词都忘记了，只能轻轻哼唱出旋律。\n孩子平静了一些，于是她继续唱着这首歌，不知唱了多少遍，嗓子都变得干哑。直到怀里的孩子安然睡去，疲惫的芭芭拉才靠着墙睡着了。\n翌日清晨她醒来，发觉孩子的烧已经退了。也许是因为她的歌声，也许是因为不知何时落在她手边的「神之眼」。\n但芭芭拉并没有把注意力放在这件事上。看着孩子的笑靥，她真心地感到快乐。\n「用歌声治愈所有人」——芭芭拉的神之眼，就诞生于这样单纯而温柔的梦想。
- Also, my ineligibility for the event is not due to being Archon, but due to my obligation to serve as host and judge. ｜ 我没参赛也不是因为我不符合参赛选手标准，而是我有义务担任大赛主席兼裁判。
- Iwakura Mitsunari ｜ 岩藏光造
- If you go further west, that's Yashiori Island, territory of the Sangonomiya resistance. ｜ 再往西走的话，就是八酝岛了，是珊瑚宫反抗军的地盘。
- A treasure box with a decorative pattern at the bottom. The ornamentation seems to be a part of a three-piece motif. Once the pattern is completed, a certain door may open.\n"I yearn for those frosty skies to stand in flames and burn till there's no living soul in the world."\n"I yearn for us to turn to dust carried by the wind so that we can find that outsider who abandoned the princess."\n"I yearn for the black dragon from the princess' dreams to engulf the land in a cloud of scarlet poison."\n"For I am the last one. There's no need to keep watch any longer."\n"I've heard of people who are building a new nation without gods. Perhaps they'll have the power to stand against this world." ｜ 底部有着某种三分之一纹样的宝盒。如果能筹齐另外两个，或许可以打开何处的门。\n「愿降下这片冰雪的天空燃烧，直到世界上再也没有一丝生命。」\n「愿我们化作灰烬，顺风而行，追上那抛弃了公主再也不返回的异邦人。」\n「愿公主梦见的蔽日的黑龙，为可憎的大地涂上赤红的毒。」\n「我是最后一个。再也没有留守的必要了。」\n「听说何处有人正在建立无神的国度。那么，或许他们也有对抗世界的力量吧。」

- I will tell you precisely what needs to be tested. Just follow my instructions as you engage in battle, and we should be fine. ｜ 我会向你们仔细说明需要验证的项目，根据我的提示去战斗就可以了。
- Anyway, winning isn't the point. Just think of it as an opportunity to try our local delicacies! ｜ 而且输赢不重要，就当成是一次品尝我们「沃陆之邦」美食的好机会嘛。
- And yet... I agree. The Vision Hunt Decree is something that simply should not exist, and Miss Kamisato has been committed to fighting it since the day it was announced. ｜ 不过…我也认同。眼狩令的确是不该存在的东西，神里小姐从眼狩令颁布的第一天起，就下定了抗争的决心。
- How am I supposed to face his family with him in this state? ｜ 变成这种模样，我该怎么和他的家里人交待呀。
- #"Albedo's busy right now and can't play with Klee."\n"Poor Albedo... Not being able to play must be such a bummer."\n"Later, I went with {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Honorary Knight and Paimon to go play."\n"I'll bring something fun back for Albedo. Let's hope he doesn't feel too sad." ｜ #「我不能和阿贝多哥哥一起出去玩，因为他好忙好忙。\n「不能出去玩一定很难过吧，阿贝多哥哥好可怜。\n「后来，我和荣誉骑士{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}还有派蒙一起出去玩了。\n「我会带好玩的给阿贝多哥哥，希望他不要难过。」

- (The feeling of dread is getting stronger...) ｜ （不好的预感越来越强了…）

- Lasselin ｜ 拉瑟兰
- I originally planned to design some novel kimono patterns myself, or use some new dyes to make new cloth and attract customers. ｜ 我本来是想自己设计些新纹样，或者是用些新染料，做出一些新样式的布料和成衣来吸引客人。

- I heard that the Pyro Archon is gathering warriors to be stationed in the more remote areas, so I came here to sign up! ｜ 正好听说火神大人在召集战士去野外驻扎，我是来报名参加的！
- Ah, Atea... She said that she knew her day would come. She even told us to not be too sad on her behalf... ｜ 唉，阿伽娅…她说过这一天总会到来的，还让我们不要太难过…
- That person over there... seems so familiar... ｜ 那边那个人…有种很怀念的感觉…
- Guarding against danger is a very important skill. I will continue to keep watching over the Abyss Order, and use force against them where necessary. ｜ 预防危机是项相当重要的技术。我会继续留意深渊教团，必要时动用武力。
- And... and Paimon's kinda confused now. Benoit's a good person who's in danger, so we should be helping him... That's what's going on, right? ｜ 而且…而且我感觉有点混乱，伯努瓦是正受到威胁的好人，我们应该帮助他，是这样没错吧？
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- Or perhaps somewhere away from the city... Starsnatch Cliff, or Windrise? ｜ 还是离蒙德城再稍远点的地方…「摘星崖」或者「风起地」？
- That's fine. If you're willing, you can swing by later as well. I'll be here manning the counter in the meantime. ｜ 没关系。你要是愿意的话，稍后过来看看也行，我会一直在这里守着摊子的。
- Hmm, that's true! Had we known, we would've tied a few of them up and brought them over to you and King Coconut. Might do you some good to give them a thorough drubbing and let off a little steam. ｜ 说得对喔！早知如此，我们应该绑几个坏家伙，带到你和「大椰子」面前，让你们亲手揍他们几顿，出出气。

- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. - This tale should begin with the funeral of Hu Tao's grandfather.\nTen days before the funeral itself, Old Hu had passed away following a bout of illness. For its 75th Director, Wangsheng Funeral Parlor held a grand funeral, in accordance with the last wishes of the old man himself, to be conducted by Hu Tao.\nOnly thirteen at the time, Hu Tao, who would later go on to become the Director in turn, made all the arrangements herself to the highest standard, greatly impressing the undertakers.\nAfter the funeral, the thirteen-year-old Hu Tao grabbed her traveler's bag and crept out alone in the dead of night. In her bag were only a few rations, some water, and a means to create some light. She was headed to a mysterious and seldom-seen frontier.\nHeading straight from Wuwang Hill, one may arrive at the "border." It is the line that separates life and death, the secrets of which have been managed by Wangsheng Funeral Parlor for generations. According to legend, it is a place where the souls of past relatives and the spirits of those with unfulfilled aspirations linger. For Hu Tao, this journey was a chance to see her grandfather once more before he departed forever.\nFor two days she journeyed unceasingly before finally arriving at her destination, yet was unable to locate her grandfather upon arrival. Between the innumerable spirits she walked, but not one of them resembled the old man.\nShe stayed there the whole day before falling asleep in exhaustion, awakening to a night sky and heavy dew. Around her were gathered a few lone spirits, clapping and laughing:\n"Silly girl, why would Old Hu be here of all places? What were you thinking, looking for your relatives here?"\nNot one to be swayed so easily, Hu Tao continued to wait, day after day. Her rations gradually disappeared and her water supplies drained away, but her grandfather did not appear. In the end, it was a little old woman who came to her.\nShe laid eyes on the exhausted Hu Tao and smiled as she spoke: "Look at your stubbornness, you're exactly like Old Hu. It's a shame, but none of the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor Directors would ever linger here. You come from a family of plain speakers, so let me return the favor... Go back. Go back to where you came from."\nThe old woman bid farewell to Hu Tao, before passing over the border and into the distance. Hu Tao watched as the figure of the mysterious woman grew smaller and disappeared, as a sense of doubt tinged with relief manifested itself.\nAt last she came to the conclusion: her grandfather's absence was due to him having passed over the border as soon as he'd arrived, to the place where he was bound. He had been open and honest in life, leaving behind no regrets, so was it right for his departure to be framed in regretful terms?\nWith a smile, she set forth on the return journey.\nThe faraway moon had been casting a thin light on the way over but had now been replaced by the bright light of dawn. As she walked, Hu Tao thought of a saying that her grandfather had often quoted: "Live in life, die in death. Follow your heart, do what you can."\nIt was noon when Hu Tao arrived home. She climbed over the wall into the rear courtyard, went straight to her room, and unpacked her travel bag.\nWith her food and water long gone, and the rest of her belongings unpacked, the bag she had taken for empty instead contained a colorful Vision. Just when had it arrived?\nAs one of the few living that had dared to visit the border, perhaps Hu Tao's actions had moved some unknown god.\nPerhaps this then constituted a heavenly gift... the ultimate recognition of her strength. ｜ 一切还得从胡桃爷爷的葬礼说起。\n葬礼十天前，胡老在家中病逝。往生堂为这位第七十五代堂主举办了规格极高的葬礼，全程依老爷子遗嘱安排，由胡桃主理。\n年仅十三岁、还没成为堂主的胡桃只凭一人打点所有事务，却能做到事事考究，令仪倌们满意。\n葬礼过后，年仅十三岁的胡桃背上行囊，趁夜色偷溜出门。她孤身一人，行囊中只有干粮、水和照明工具。但她要去的，是天下罕有的神秘之境。\n从无妄坡一直向前，便能抵达「边界」。这是生与死的分割线，由往生堂世代管理的机密之地。相传，人们能在那里见到去世的亲属与心愿未竟的亡魂。胡桃赶往此地，便是想趁爷爷彻底远去前再见他一面。\n如此马不停蹄整整两日，成功来到边界的胡桃却没能寻到爷爷。往来幽魂无数，或行色匆匆，或神色怨憎，没有一人与爷爷相似。\n她等了一整日，困得昏睡过去。醒来时夜深露重，四周只有几条落单亡魂拍着手掌笑话她：\n「傻姑娘，老胡头哪会在这儿啊？怕是异想天开，才到这儿来寻你家的人！」\n不信邪的胡桃等了又等。日复一日…干粮逐日减少，饮水几乎见底，爷爷始终没有出现。最终等来的，却是一名从未谋面的老妇人。\n矮小的妇人见胡桃困倦难当，笑道：「你这顽固模样，倒是像极了老胡头。只可惜，往生堂历代堂主绝不会在此徘徊。你家祖祖辈辈都是坦率地活，坦率地走。所以回去吧——回到你原本的地方。」\n神秘的老妇人拜别胡桃，越过边界向深处走去。胡桃望着那瘦小的背影隐没在远方，疑惑之余竟有一丝释怀之感。\n她终于相信：爷爷迟迟没有露面，是早已越过边界，去了应至之地。爷爷一生磊落，身后并无憾事，自己又何必将他的离开视为一种遗憾？\n便一笑置之，踏上了归途。\n来时月色幽远，回程时已晨光大作。胡桃走在路上，回想起爷爷从前常说的话——「生于生时，亡于亡刻。遵从自心，尽人之事。」\n到家时逢正午，胡桃翻墙入后院，钻进卧房整理行囊。\n水食耗尽、掏得空空的背包中，不知何时，悄然多了一枚流光溢彩的「神之眼」。\n作为极少数敢在「边界」逗留的生者，胡桃或许打动了某位不可言说的神明。\n她因而获得高天的馈赠…极致的力量之证。

Of course, I don't intend to use this experience on you. With the right delicacies, I might be willing to exchange some of my secrets. ｜ 对我的事感兴趣？唉，真没办法，毕竟我曾经也是枫丹最受关注的大明星嘛！每天都有无数记者挖空心思想要探听我的隐私，我可是有丰富的经验将他们拒之门外。当然，我并不打算将这些经验用在你的身上，你可以用足够好吃的点心来和我交换秘密。

- Ah, I trust she will be in good hands then. Please take good care of Sister Barbara, Honorary Knight. ｜ 好吧，那我多少放点心了。芭芭拉小姐就麻烦你多多照顾了，「荣誉骑士」。
- Oh, by the way, Mr. Zhongli. We've heard that the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor has also been caught up in all this. They're currently squaring off with the authorities at the gates. ｜ 啊，对了！钟离先生。我听说你们「往生堂」，好像也被卷进了冲突里，正在与找上门来的官军对峙呢！
- After him... *cough* ｜ 我们追…咳咳…
- There is no way Zhongli can starve.\nSuch concerns as profit and loss are beneath his notice. The Seven Nations and the world itself are where his efforts are directed.\nAs for wealth... He is wealth itself.\nHe is Morax, the overlord Rex Lapis who rules Liyue, and the Geo Archon of the Seven Archons. The very money that circulates throughout Teyvat, Mora, is named after him.\nWhen night falls and bustling Liyue begins to slumber, he will sometimes stand atop the towering mountains and gaze upon this city, which he made with his own hands.\nTo the people of Liyue, Rex Lapis has many divine titles.\nWhen he laid down Liyue's laws by his divine might, he was the God of Contracts. When he minted the first Mora and made Liyue strong by dint of commerce, the merchants revered him as the God of Commerce.\nHe has lived through countless years and is the eldest of the Seven, and so historians call him the God of History.\nThousands of years ago, the forebears of the citizens of Liyue Harbor struck stones together to start fires and used piled stones to create stoves. These blessings derived from the Geo element led the Geo Archon to gain the title of God of the Stove.\nPeople from other lands tend to call him Morax, though the people of Liyue prefer to use the term Rex Lapis.\nBut in the hearts of lovers of opera and children, Morax's on-stage aspect, the all-conquering defender of Liyue — the Warrior God — is the most fascinating.\nThe delicacies that Rex Lapis discovered while lost in the streets, the plaques inscribed with his handwriting, a famous opera that he once starred in, playing the part of a warrior... Many stories and tales of Liyue are, when studied closely, stories of people visited by their deity at some point — and the citizens of Liyue are most proud indeed of that history. ｜ 钟离是饿不死的。\n财富的盈亏并不是钟离需要操心的事。七国与世界才是他费心费力的领域。\n至于财富…他就是财富本身。\n统御璃月的「岩王帝君」，七神中的岩之神，摩拉克斯。通行提瓦特大陆的货币「摩拉」，其源流，正是他的神名。\n当深夜到来，喧嚣的璃月港陷入沉睡，他偶尔会登上岩山之巅，俯瞰这座由他亲手缔造的城市。\n在璃月人心中，「岩王帝君」神职众多。\n以神力为璃月港制订律法时，他是「契约之神」。\n他亲手铸造了最初的一枚「摩拉」，令璃月港以商业立本，商人们尊崇他为「商业之神」。\n他经历了漫长岁月，是七神中最古老的长者，历史学家们称他「历史之神」。\n数千年前，璃月港的先民们垦荒时，常以石头摩擦生火，再用岩石垒起炉灶。这些来自于「岩」的恩赐，也让岩之神在人们口中成为了「炉火之神」。\n外国人倾向于叫他「摩拉克斯」，璃月人则更喜欢「岩王爷」这一俗称。\n而在戏曲爱好者和孩子们心里，摩拉克斯诸多神职中，还数戏台上横扫魔神千军、开创并守卫璃月的「武神」最为有趣。\n「岩王爷」迷路时发掘的美味小吃、「岩王爷」亲笔题字的牌匾、「岩王爷」倾情出演过一次龙套的著名戏曲…璃月的诸多风土人情，细究起来，全都在某一时期受到过神明本人的直接关怀。璃月人对这种与神同行的历史，也十分引以为荣。

- Have you already caught the sages' attention? ｜ 贤者们已经注意到你了吗？
- You're just in time to find Sorush, who has arrived a little late. You drag her along and start the final Lightcall Resonance trial... ｜ 正好找到了晚来一步的斯露莎，拉着她开启了最终的「浮光鸣召」试炼…

- Ships are made of wood. All hail the power of Dendro! ｜ 船是木头做的，草元素厉害。

- What? Why do I have to write the ninja as being this good as fighting... The ninja defeated all the enemies... ｜ 我为什么要把忍者写得这么能打…忍者打倒了所有敌人…

- Alright. This ace shall set the pace. ｜ 好，我来给大家当榜样。

- Take any character penned by any playwright from any point in history, and you'll find that not a single one of them fulfilled their destiny without first enduring many trials and tribulations. ｜ 古往今来，诸多戏剧所写之人，无一不是经历了种种劫数，才得圆满。
- Ehhh!? C'mon, Bluey, that's cheating! You promised that you'd tell me a story if I told you one! How come I'm the one telling both stories now!? ｜ 欸？！阿蓝也太耍赖啦！明明说好的，我给你讲一个故事，你给我讲一个故事，怎么现在两个故事全都变成我来讲啦！

- That's why I can only count on you, Traveler. Please bring a {QuestGatherID} to me. I will prepare suitable payment. ｜ 所以，拜托你了旅行者，请帮我带一道{QuestGatherID}回来吧，我会准备好报酬的。

- Just as flowers bloom and fall and clouds swirl and disperse, so do all things in the world ebb and flow.\nThere will always be those who seek to bask in the glory's glow alone atop the highest peaks, yet languish in the valley of despair, bemoaning fate's unwillingness to realize their desires, even as they finally depart along with their fury.\nThe young girl gifted her blessings to the silhouettes of the past, and with the mutual encouragement of those companions left behind, they embarked together upon the long road towards the distant summits.\nJust like when Spina di Rosula was first founded. ｜ 正如花开花落，云卷云舒，世间诸事亦有高峰与低谷。\n总有人想要在高峰之上独享荣耀，又要在低谷哀叹苍天不遂人愿，愤然离去。\n少女为背影送上祝福，随后与留下的同伴互相鼓励，再度踏上攀登之路。\n——就像刺玫会初建时那样。
- Yes, she's as real as an assassin gets, and the scariest one out of us Five Great Operatives. ｜ 没错！她是真正的刺客，是我们五大干部里最恐怖的一个。
- Here is the situation. Sango believes that the probability of the Treasure Hoarders sneaking into town to perform these crimes is very low. ｜ 情况如此，社长认为，城外盗宝团偶然流窜进城作案的可能性已经很低了。
- O—Oh, so there's still hope after all? Goodness, you frightened me — you spoke so much, and with so much certainty... ｜ 原来还有得救的希望啊，吓死我了，看你之前把话说得那么满。
- Concert's Final Hour ｜ 终幕的时计

- What about the Kitsune Saiguu, then? ｜ 那「狐斋宫」呢？
- Qilins are strict vegetarians, so please do not take offense when I decline meat dishes. Yes, that includes your vegetable fritters since they have been fried in animal fat. Thanks, but I can't. I'm afraid I really can't. I don't mean to argue, it's just I have a keen sense of smell, so I know how they've been cooked. ｜ 我们一族是严格的素食主义者，肉类料理就请允许我谢绝了。嗯，没错，即使是荤油混在蔬菜丸子里也不行…不可以。不可以哟。我能够闻出来的。
- Under the Umbrella's Shade ｜ 伞盖的荫蔽
- It's... something new... ｜ 还挺新奇的…
- You can point out their flaws to their face, and they won't mind very much. But if you tell them that someone else could do a better job... Now that'll make them really upset. ｜ 正面提出他们的缺点，他们并不会很在意。要是告诉他们别人可以比他们做得更好，他们往往就会变得很不开心了。
- Nilou, you of all people will definitely be able to convey our well wishes to the Dendro Archon. I also noticed that you went the extra mile and scattered Padisarahs around the stage. ｜ 如果是妮露的话，一定能把我们的祝福传递给小草神大人。我发现你还很用心地准备了一些帕蒂沙兰放在舞台周围呢。
- Hehe, c'mon, Fischl, it's okay to admit that you had to ask her nicely. ｜ 嘿嘿，菲谢尔不用不好意思啦，就算是求回来的也没什么。
- Ah... I can't help it. The workload at the Ministry of Civil Affairs during the Lantern Rite is unbelievable. ｜ 啊…这也是没办法的事，海灯节期间，总务司要处理的事格外多。
- No, no! Sorry for making you feel so confused. It must be a problem with the way I explained it. Yes, the problem lies with me! ｜ 不不不！很抱歉让你们觉得受到了质疑，是我的表达方式不对，有问题的其实是我自己！

- (I think I might need some more practice if I wanted to embroider my own complex designs... Although, I'm no beginner with a needle and thread. More like... upper end of intermediate?) ｜ （如果想自己绣复杂图案，还是得再练一下针工…唔，不过我的手艺应该已经能算中等偏上了吧？）

- The electricity-emitting section of the Millennial Pearl Seahorse, and its regalia, the symbol of its surpassing might — now snapped off amidst a clash against a mighty challenger.\nAs the greatest predator that can arise from seahorses, this being's evolutionary journey is not the same as that experienced by other Fontemer Aberrants. It did not start from a base form before growing larger and stronger, but instead grew limbs and a horn that have no place on an ordinary seahorse. Even its musculature and skeleton have changed. It really seems to resemble a fantastical beast from legends of yore more than its original shape. In the imaginations of poets and authors, even seahorses can frolick upon the earth. ｜ 千年珍珠骏麟的放电器官，也是象征它的伟大超越的王器。已经在与挑战者的战斗中折断了。\n作为自泡泡海马成长而来的顶尖掠食者，千年珍珠骏麟的进化之旅与别的原海异种截然不同：并不是基于原本的物种结构而进化得更大、更强壮，而是生出了泡泡海马所不具备的肢体、犄角，甚至连同骨骼、肌肉都发生了变化。比起原本应有的形态，它的身姿更像古老传说中的幻兽。在诗人与剧作家的幻想中，即使是海马也会有骐骥在大地上驰骋、跃动的姿态。

- The most awaited moment of the Lantern Rite is the time when a giant Mingxiao Lantern released into the sky on the night of the fifth day. And the size of the Mingxiao Lantern this year is a sight that you don't want to miss, as the levitation stone used to make the giant lantern float this year is the biggest in 20 years. On this special occasion, the merchants of Liyue have prepared a Xiao Market, which was built using the same materials as the lanterns. When you arrived at the Xiao Market, the event organizer Huixin asked you for a favor... ｜ 在海灯节，最重要的一项活动，就是在第五日的夜晚放飞巨型花灯「明霄灯」。今年的「明霄灯」壮景可期。用来让巨灯浮空的那块「浮生石」，是二十年来最大的一块。为此，璃月的商人们开设了「霄市」，筹集建灯所用的材料。今天你来到「霄市」时，负责操办节日事宜的慧心，似乎有事想要拜托你…$UNRELEASED

- (Phew... I don't think I let anything slip today. I must show the people that there is nothing to worry about...) ｜ （呼…今天应该没有哪里露馅吧，一定要把最让民众放心的样子展现出来啊…）

- Yes. It'll take a lot of power from me, but it still won't be anything compared to when I was in the desert... ｜ 是的，会花费非常多的力量，虽然比不上沙漠那时候…
- Fischl is both timid and strong. She's afraid of others' gossip, yet yearns for their respect. ｜ 菲谢尔，既胆小又强大，惧怕他人的闲言碎语，也渴望得到他人的崇敬。
- Alright, Traveler, let's go. ｜ 好啦，旅行者，我们走吧。

- I think it'll be better if we stick around. ｜ 我们留下来比较好。

- How can you call that a stu— Wait... What do you mean, "pulled it off"? That wasn't supposed to be part of the show? ｜ 怎么能说这是把戏呢？哎？居然是整了个把戏吗？不是安排好的表演？
- This house looks familiar... ｜ 这个屋子，我之前好像见过…

- We've activated it. Let's proceed! ｜ 这样就启动了，让我们继续吧！
- I wanted to walk around Sumeru with you, but now doesn't seem like the right time. ｜ 原本我还想一起在须弥四处逛逛，这样看来，好像现在并不是合适的时机。
- If only we had more help... ｜ 要是人手再多一点就好了…

- You could take some more exams to get used to the atmosphere. ｜ 可以多参加一些考试来熟悉氛围。

- A classic Liyue dish. The round shape and fragrant aroma seem on point, but it proves overly dry once you taste it. Perhaps you used too much lean meat in this one? ｜ 经典的璃月名肴。圆滚滚的外形，加上扑鼻的香气，似乎没什么问题。尝下一口，却发现肉质干柴。莫不是选用的肉块里瘦肉过多了？
- We're so... *panting* We're so grateful for your... assistance... Those monsters came out of... came out of nowhere, and... dealing with them just... *panting* takes so much time... ｜ 真是…啊，真是多谢你们的援助…这些怪物突然涌出来，真是难办，战斗可得花很多时间…
- Ah, yes. Alright, where did I leave off...? ｜ 好啊，嗯…上次说到什么地方来着？

- Wha...? Do such marvels exist? You sure you're not lying? ...Whatever, it's lotus-gazing time! ｜ 嗯？竟有这般奇事？当真不是在骗我？…罢了，赏荷！

This effect can be triggered up to once every <color=#f39001>{1}</color>s ｜ 元素能量高于<color=#f39001>{0}%</color>的当前场上角色的攻击命中敌人时，将在敌人的位置释放<color=#f39001>强化</color>雷暴冲击波，造成雷元素范围伤害，此效果每<color=#f39001>{1}</color>秒至多触发一次

- Alright then. Stay safe as you adventure out there. ｜ 好嘞，去各处冒险也都小心点。
- This is where I'll take my leave. ｜ 我先告辞了。

- I fear that no one really understands the exact mechanisms behind the machine, save him. ｜ 我想…除了他自己，谁也无法解释清楚那台机器的原理。
- A wine jar protected by a casing made of bamboo that can be commonly seen all across Liyue.\nWinemakers choose a cave of just the right humidity level and store the jars away for several years, resulting in fine wines enjoyed by thirsty patrons.\nThere is a constant risk of the wine jars rattling and breaking during transport, so the jars are always handled together with their bamboo frames. ｜ 以竹制框架保护的酒坛，璃月各地都有它的身影。\n挑选湿气恰到好处的洞窟，将酒坛封入其中，窖藏多年，便是酒客们口中的玉露琼浆。\n运输过程中，酒坛有磕碰破碎的风险，因此人们常将酒坛和框架一同取出酒窖。\n
- Noelle reveals to you that she is very anxious about the Knights of Favonius selection exam. At your suggestion, she decides to emulate the knights she knows in an attempt to overcome her sense of unease. ｜ 因骑士选拔而焦虑不已的诺艾尔向你倾诉了自己的苦恼。 在你的建议下，诺艾尔开始模仿起身边的骑士，来克服对未来的不安…

- And our waiting staff love to provide service with a smile! ｜ 服务热情更在行，欢声笑语聚满堂！

- Agent Talochard, I know that the Marechaussee Phantom has a file on the case, but believe me, there are things that even you don't know. ｜ 托萝莎探员，我知道逐影庭也有案件的卷宗，但这里面还有你们也不知道的事，请相信我。

- Kaveh ｜ 卡维
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Summary</color>\nDuring the event period, Travelers can take part in the "Shadows Amidst Snowstorms" event, and will complete various challenges in the Dragonspine region, obtaining Snowstrider Emblems and Vanquisher's Emblems that can be exchanged for various materials.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20 and complete "For a Tomorrow Without Tears" to access the quest "Traveler Observation Report." Complete "Traveler Observation Report" and "Lost in the Snow" to take part in the "Shadows Amidst Snowstorms" event. During this time, the Adventure Rank required to take on the "Traveler Observation Report" quest will be adjusted to 20.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Shop</color>\nDuring the event, you can exchange Snowstrider Emblems and Vanquisher's Emblems for precious materials in the Event Shop. When the Event Shop closes, any of these two Emblems in your possession will automatically disappear, and the relevant Event Shop page(s) will also close. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n活动期间，旅行者可以参加「皑尘与雪影」活动，并在「龙脊雪山」地区完成各种挑战，获取「踏雪章」与「克险章」，换取各类物资。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20并完成「为了没有眼泪的明天」后，可以进行「旅行者观察报告」任务。完成「旅行者观察报告」与「雪山迷踪」任务后，即可参与「皑尘与雪影」活动。在活动期间，接取「旅行者观察报告」所需的冒险等阶也会调整至20级。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动商店】</color>\n在活动持续期间，可以在活动商店中，用「踏雪章」与「克险章」兑换珍贵的物资。活动结束后，持有的上述两种奖章会自动消失，同时相关活动商店页签也将关闭。

Qucusaurs and some tribespeople familiar with the Lumps' inner workings can use their power to maintain <color=#FFE14BFF>a state of having full Phlogiston and not consuming any</color>. Using a Plunging Attack while in this state can even result in the creation of a short-lived Phlogiston Current... ｜ 特定情形下，气态燃素互相纠缠聚集产生的气态燃素团块。绒翼龙与部分悉知其中原理的部族成员可以利用其力量，一段时间内都能保持<color=#FFE14BFF>燃素充沛不会消耗的状态</color>。在此状态下进行下落攻击，甚至可以形成短暂的燃素风场…

I've been so busy at work, I just can't find the time to go buy some myself. ｜ 「人间百态」：\n没有涂黄油的面包，就像离开了水的美露莘。\n又软又香，像泡泡一样滑的黄油…\n唉，黄油啊，永远不够吃。\n为什么厨师们给面包涂黄油的时候永远只涂那么薄薄一层呢…\n有人愿意帮忙送一点优质<color=#3399CC>黄油</color>来吗？我平时要值班，不方便去店里买。

- Ah, I'm Mualani's neighbor, Atea. By the way, Mualani, I heard you lost to Kachina during the Pilgrimage. Is that true? ｜ 你们好。我是阿伽娅，跟玛拉妮是邻居。玛拉妮，听说这次「归火圣夜巡礼」你输给了卡齐娜？
- Why would the Rishboland Tiger chase Aranara? ｜ 为什么长鬓虎要追兰那罗？

- We're more than happy to help! ｜ 我们很乐意帮忙！

- Dandelion Seeds will fly to distant places, take root, and sprout there... One day, they will cover the length and breadth of Teyvat. ｜ 蒲公英的种子会飞往各地然后生根发芽…迟早有一天，会覆盖整个提瓦特。

- Paimon ate it on our way here. ｜ 在路上被派蒙吃掉了。
- Charcoal-Baked Ajilenakh Cake ｜ 椰炭饼
- I didn't know you cared so much about me. Does that mean that you still need my power? But given the way I am now... there's a chance I won't be able to give you everything you need. Hmm? All you really care about is... me? In that case, then let us act out our future journey together! ｜ 没想到你会对我的事这么上心，这是否意味着你仍然需要我的「力量」呢？然而如今的我…或许无法给你足够的回报…你说看重的是我「本人」？既然这样，就让你我共同出演我们的未来吧。
- The Confrerie was responsible for that banquet, so I was out and about the whole time making sure things were running smoothly. I didn't even have the time to drink with the guests. ｜ 那场宴会是我们承办的，我一直在忙前忙后，都没时间和客人们喝酒寒暄。

- Then you'd need to leave me. ｜ 那派蒙就不能跟着我了。
- This mural looks like it's trying to mark something out. ｜ 唔，这幅画看起来，就是在标记什么一样…
- Greetings, old friends and new. So, what brings you all to Wangsheng Funeral Parlor this fine day? ｜ 嗯，各位新老朋友大家好，不知今日到往生堂来有何贵干？
- My father is an extremely demanding man. ｜ 我的父亲，是个非常严苛的人。
- What should I ask... ｜ 问些什么好呢…

- O—Okay... ｜ 是…是。
- Huh, I swear I've never seen them run that fast before... ｜ 这群家伙，平时怎么不见这么能跑…
- I don't really have any hobbies, and now the money that was just sitting in my savings is being used to help cats today, and tomorrow, it might help more animals still. That works out just as it should, don't you think? ｜ 而我没什么喜好，这笔钱存着也是存着，现在用来帮助猫猫，以后帮助更多小动物，不是刚刚好吗！

- However, we have also discovered some mechanisms in this Domain. Activating them seems to affect some wind currents... ｜ 但我们也在这秘境中发现了一些机关。在启动这些机关后，一些风场的状态好像也发生了变化…
- Understood. ｜ 了解。

- Starts with 20 Endurance. When Endurance is depleted, discard this card.\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>When your characters take DMG:</color> Consumes this card's Endurance to block DMG.\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>When this card is discarded:</color> You lose this match. ｜ 初始具有20点「耐久」，耗尽后弃置此牌。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>我方角色受到伤害时：</color>消耗此牌的「耐久」以抵消伤害。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>此牌被弃置时：</color>我方牌手输掉对局。
- I'm just an eccentric old hag to them. That story's been passed down so long, it might as well be true. ｜ 他们眼里我就是个古怪的老太婆，这种认知已经流传很久啦，很难打破。

- If they're gonna blow up the waterway, they must have planted the explosives next to the support pillars! ｜ 他们想要炸掉水道的话，炸药应该在支撑柱的附近！
- As for this Kokuchuu fellow... I'm sure he has his own agenda. He conveniently disappeared right after Leyla got into this mess. ｜ 至于这个谷中的目的，我看也没那么简单，在勒拉出事后，他就消失了。
- There's no need to tidy up for me. ｜ 不费心收拾也没关系。
- Ororon... Since when has your Granny ever gone around scolding people like some sort of scary monster, huh? Huh!? ｜ 你这孩子，怎么说得我好像很凶一样…奶奶什么时候随便骂人了？
- When the equipping character has 0 Elemental Energy, Normal Attack DMG is increased by 60% and Elemental Burst DMG is increased by 60%. After the equipping character deals Normal Attack DMG, the aforementioned Elemental Burst effect will stop applying for 6s. After the equipping character deals Elemental Burst DMG, the aforementioned Normal Attack effect will stop applying for 6s. This effect can trigger even if the equipping character is off the field. ｜ 装备者的元素能量为0时，普通攻击造成的伤害提升60%，元素爆发造成的伤害提升60%。装备者的普通攻击造成伤害后，上述元素爆发伤害提升效果将失效6秒；装备者的元素爆发造成伤害后，上述普通攻击伤害提升效果将失效6秒。角色处于队伍后台也能触发。
- This particular book is a rare "original annotated copy" with contents all transcribed from the original stone tablet. My brother really treasures this one. ｜ 这本《洗墨录》可是难得的「原迹注释本」，内容文字都是拓写自那座石碑的原迹，是我大哥的宝贝收藏。
- When last we left off, Mr. Lyney acknowledged the new evidence presented by Lady Furina as fact. Therefore, Lady Furina may continue stating her reconstruction of the events. ｜ 既然在休庭前，林尼先生认为芙宁娜女士提出的新证据均为事实，那请芙宁娜女士讲述案件真相吧。
- (Hmph... Nothing escapes my eyes.) ｜ （哼…什么都逃不过我的眼睛。）

- You can leave arranging the table to her — really, you can. ｜ 整理牌桌这种事，真的可以交给她。
- The submerged wreckage of a once-proud ship. - Detection units produced by the Fontaine Research Institute using new models of artificed components. Its original purpose was monitoring all kinds of environmental data.\nThese units were originally cooperatively managed by the Advanced Artificed Technology Research and Development Department and the Natural Ecological Environment Monitoring Department, where the former was in charge of manufacturing and deployment of the detection units while the latter was responsible for collecting and sorting data. Now that the latter department has been dismissed due to a previous experimental accident, only the former department's duties are now being performed by the Fontaine Research Institute. ｜ 枫丹科学院利用新型奇械构件生产的微型探测单元，原本用以监测各类环境数据。\n这些单元最初由奇械先端工艺研发科与自然生态环境监测科共同管理：前者负责生产与布设装置，后者负责回收与整理数据。鉴于后者已于先前的实验事故中解散，枫丹科学院目前只负责执行前一项作业。

- How abstract. ｜ 真抽象。
- We're on the right track. There's more debris ahead. ｜ 我们的路线是正确的，前面还有遗落物。
- Put the Driftyball in the center of the pool ｜ 将「漂流球」放在水塘中央
- Invisible beings can still be seen if affected by an element. ｜ 元素附着可以破除隐身状态。
- *sigh* I can't see a w— *hic* way out... ｜ 这种日子真是…嗝，看不到尽头啊…
- #Bye, shining Golden Nara {NICKNAME}. ｜ #再见，金灿灿的那菈{NICKNAME}。
- #...I must return to Sangonomiya now, I have a few things to attend to... Once you're ready, {NICKNAME}, please rendezvous with Teppei. He will escort you there. ｜ #我还有一些事，需要先回珊瑚宫处理…{NICKNAME}准备好之后，就去找哲平吧，他会带你去珊瑚宫。
- It's a shame, what happened to him. I thought he was stronger than that. ｜ 拉杜的事确实让人遗憾，我原来以为他应该更坚强一些的。
- Hey, it's Dunyarzad! ｜ 欸，是迪娜泽黛姐姐！
- Investigate the area ｜ 调查周围情况
- Leave the pit through the exit ｜ 从出口离开陷坑
- It's because you're always putting other people first. ｜ 因为芭芭拉总是在为别人考虑。
- Hanayama Kaoru ｜ 叶名山薰
- If ever you wish to rest without being interrupted by other people, there's a method I use occasionally that I can highly recommend. ｜ 如果你休息的时候不想让旁人打扰，我有个推荐的方法。
- Archon, what is it like in the depths of the Night Kingdom? We really can't go with you? ｜ 火神大人，夜神之国的深处是个什么样的地方？我们真的不可能去吗？
- Go to the Forest of Blessings Rail Station platform ｜ 前往赐福森林车站站台
- Both the setting and the story have sent veritable shocks throughout the literary world! ｜ 无论是设定还是剧情，都大大地引领了一波创作的风潮。
- I see... We've manifested in an almost fully spiritual, consciousness-like form, removing the limits of our flesh. ｜ 到了这里，我们四个都以几乎完全精神化的性质出现，也就不受肉体桎梏了，对吧。
- Hehe, that means we did a good deed this time, right? ｜ 哦哦，看来我们还真是做了件好事呢。
- Duration|{param4:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param4:F1}秒
- Energy Cost|{param4:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param4:I}
- Naturally, if you require a greater challenge, we could bring in six oceanids. ｜ 当然，如果你们觉得缺乏挑战性的话，我们也可以去尝试同时挑战六个纯水精灵。
- Moonlight Merriment ｜ 韶光抚月
- But now that the Mikage Furnace has returned to normal, I wonder where he might be... ｜ 但现在「御影炉心」已经恢复了正常，不知道这位好先生现在…
- ...What? ｜ …欸？
- Obtain a high score of {param2} ｜ 最高积分达到{param2}分
- Messy "Mondstadt Sunset" ｜ 颜色杂乱的「蒙德落日」
- You are well informed and can think about your unique "business style" based on your experience with other business people. ｜ 你们见多识广，可以根据和其他商人打交道的经验，来思考你们独特的「经营风格」。
- Paid in Full ｜ 悉数讨回
- All right, you two better go. I still have to clean up some messes in the city. See you around. ｜ 好了你快去吧，城里还有些烂摊子等着我去处理，回头见了。
- The only reason The Alcor would ever need to open fire would be if it were a fight to the death. ｜ 如果真有需要「死兆星」号开火的时候，那说明局面已经到了你死我活的地步了。
- That said, this looks more like the guts of some giant machine than it does a palace... ｜ 说是黄金的宫殿，不过看起来倒不像是宫殿，更像是某个巨大机器的内部呢！
- *sigh* It seems that my current techniques are insufficient to create the Smoldersleet Elixir. Looks like we'll need the help of a specialist... ｜ 唉！只凭我掌握的工艺，还是没法制作出「烟霰丹剂」，果然还是要请教一下专家啊…
- Indeed. You are perceptive, my diminutive friend. ｜ 没错，这位小友悟性很高。
- Maybe we can investigate in the direction in which the noise disappeared. ｜ 说不定可以去声音消失的方向看看。
- Dynamic Skin ｜ 影幻牌面
- Sara ｜ 莎拉
- Draw a total of {param0} Elite-class or higher Combat Units ｜ 累计抽选{param0}个精锐度至少为「精锐」的交战单位
- Hardly! I merely wish to see if that useless fool has any regrets or not. If she turns back to us and accepts our aid, then perhaps I shall spare her a moment or two. ｜ 才不是这样，我只是来看看那个不争气的家伙有没有后悔。如果她回心转意了求我帮忙，那我也不是不能为她分出一些时间。
- Bro, don't believe a single word he says. He's just an idiot. He'd have gotten himself killed long ago if Kinich wasn't looking out for him! ｜ 哥们，你可千万别信他说的，他就是个笨蛋啊！要不是基尼奇罩着他，那老兄早让人打死了。
- About the Vision ｜ 关于「神之眼」…
- Area Alert Mek ｜ 机关·区域警戒型
- Pick suitable seasonings ｜ 选取适合的调料
- Oh, right, and when you're taking photos, please look for Ms. Chronie while doing so. I've got no idea where she's run off to... or where she's hiding. ｜ 对了。您留影的时候，请顺便去找找克洛妮艾小姐吧，不知道她现在跑去了哪里…或者是藏到了哪里。
- Active engagement, that's what you like to see! ｜ 不管是谁，都要好好听讲哦。
- That's what Prince said. *sigh* And I need to go start mixing drinks. It's a pity that I can't look on while you learn... ｜ 「小王子」大人是这么说的…唉，我也要给人调酒。竟然不能从旁观看，真是可惜。
- What do you mean by strong color? ｜ 什么叫做「颜色」很强烈的东西…
- Do you two still have time to spare? ｜ 二位，请问有空吗？
- Phew... At least I managed to put everything I've learned into use. ｜ 呼…还好，至少把之前练习的成果都展示出来了。
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Nope... No, ma'am. ｜ 没、没有。

- Photograph "Pardis Dhyai" ｜ 记录「禅那园」
- Hahaha. Come on, in we go. ｜ 哈哈哈。走，我们进去吧。
- Since you asked about recommendations earlier... You're here from Mondstadt, yes? Might I suggest the Tea House as somewhere to rest your legs? ｜ 说起来，既然两位客官是蒙德来的，那我推荐你们去茶馆坐坐。
- Well, we at least know where he is today though, right? Miko happened to mention it in passing... ｜ 对了，神子刚刚不是提到了他今天提供服务的位置吗？这家伙不经意间说出了一个相当重要的情报呢…
- Entombed City - Ancient Palace ｜ 雪葬之都·旧宫
- I've taken a ton of photos — and boy, do I have a list of questions for you! ｜ 我拍了好多画片，还有很多问题想问你。
- Considering I have the best knowledge of the surrounding waters, the Captain has tasked me with planning this training examination... ｜ 考虑到我对周围海域的海况最了解，大姐头就让我来规划这场训练考核…
- *sigh* It's because I don't care for the topic at all. If it wasn't for this accursed stone slate... ｜ 唉，还不是因为我压根不喜欢这个选题，要不是因为这破石板…
- It's quite lively in here. But this game is quite different from the ones we play at Tabletop Troupe. ｜ 这里挺热闹的。但玩的游戏，似乎和「桌上剧团」里的大不一样。
- Rockin' and rollin' to the rescue! A king among canines! There'll always be a place for him in the Arataki Gang. ｜ 摇滚支援之王！我们荒泷派必须给它留把交椅。
- Those who grew alongside sun and wind. ｜ 我们和太阳与风一同成长。
- I sense some hesitation in your words. ｜ 听起来你还有点犹豫。
- There shouldn't be any great winds down there. Water, maybe, but no big waves. ｜ 下面应该没有大风，水，可能会有，但是没有大浪。
- What's wrong with that? Loving and respecting your family is a virtue that every warrior should uphold! Don't be so narrow-minded! ｜ 有什么不对！爱护、尊重家人也是勇士理应具备的美德！狭隘！
- Aratani and Kuroda, how are things coming along? ｜ 荒谷，黑田，你们那边情况如何？
- Hahaha, I see. Well then, it will be my pleasure to accompany you. ｜ 哈哈，既然如此，我便随你们走一趟吧。
- Who tossed these in here... ｜ 这都是谁丢进来的…
- After your opponent takes {SPRITE_PRESET#2102}{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}<color=#FFFFFFFF>Electro-Charged</color> DMG: Apply 4 <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C144]</color> stacks to them. - Match Invitation Board ｜ 对局邀请板
- Stay out of trouble... Though I guess it's a little late to be saying that. ｜ 可别惹麻烦…现在说这个好像晚了点。
- The House of Daena has never stopped people from annotating books, but this seemed like a special case. I didn't think the book could be allowed to keep circulating like that. ｜ 智慧宫向来不禁止人们在书上做笔记，但这本书情况有些特别，我认为，不能放任它以这个样子流通下去。
- Okay, whew... Then, let's start in... that direction! ｜ 那就好，那就好，那么…走那边！
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making an Area Marker: Upward.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「区域标识—『上行』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Well, let's start asking around on the streets! Hopefully, we'll learn a little more about this Arataki Itto guy and figure out where he might have run off to. ｜ 那我们就找街上的人打听看看吧，荒泷一斗的基本情况，还有他去了哪里。
- ...So the Black Serpent Knights have nothing to do with the Abyss Order's secret. Huh, I should have guessed. ｜ …果然，这些黑蛇骑士与深渊教团的秘密无关。哼…我早该猜到的。
- Go to the domain and guard the gate ｜ 前往秘境，守住大门
- Chongyun ｜ 重云
- Upgrades <color=#B09057FF>Binding</color> such that it will not be automatically destroyed after an explosion, but enter a state of self-repair. ｜ 强化<color=#B09057FF>「鬼术机关·绊缚」</color>，使其生效后不再自动摧毁消失，而是会进行自我修复。
- Mary-Ann ｜ 「玛丽安」
- Locked Chest ｜ 上锁的箱子
- #Could you... mine some more crystals for me, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #我想…能不能再麻烦{NICKNAME}采一些晶石出来？
- Huh, that's a good idea! If he's just looking to cover his head, then it shouldn't matter what kind of hat he's wearing. ｜ 也对啊，不想被人看到秃头的话，只要有帽子遮住就好了吧。
- What's with that look on your face? ｜ 你的表情有点奇怪。
- It appears to want something... Oh, I think there's something about this in my handbook, why not take a look? ｜ 它应该是想要什么东西…唔，我的手册上应该有记录，不如查一查吧？
- I've got your back. ｜ 你可以把后背交给我。
- Let me adjust my deck first... ｜ 先调整一下卡组…
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- *scoff* You think I don't have proof? ｜ 哼，大不了我们仔细清算一下啊。
- Xocoatl ｜ 苦水
- An exquisite flower that has been dyed red. It represents the qualities of the Berserker. ｜ 被染红的精致花朵，与狂战士的气质微妙地相符。
- Ah, that. Well, if news of the event has reached your ears, I suppose the Fontaine Apparel Association's advertising efforts have paid off. ｜ 哦，这个呀。既然连你们也听说了，那看来「枫丹服装协会」的宣传效果的确不错。
- And whenever Xavier talks about films in his letters, he always mentions your extraordinary acting skills! ｜ 而且泽维尔每次在信里谈到「映影」的时候，都要提到您在「映影」中高超的演技！
- Diagram: Hamayumi ｜ 图谱：破魔之弓
- Where exactly is Hibiki, I wonder... ｜ 不过，阿响到底在哪呢…
- Desnos ｜ 德斯诺斯
- That's actually what I wanted to ask... ｜ 这也是我想说的。
- Sounds like this jade pendant has some issues... ｜ 怎么想都是这枚玉佩有什么问题。
- Whoa... Are these supposed to be chess pieces!? They feel kinda creepy... ｜ 哇…原来这就是「棋子」吗！真…邪门…
- Blub... ｜ 呜…
- Yes, see you soon! ｜ 嗯嗯，一定！
- Obtain a stage score of {param2} ｜ 本关积分达到{param2}
- That's right! We'll get nowhere if we keep arguing, and the more we go nowhere, the more we're gonna argue... ｜ 嗯！总这样也不是办法，而且，如果不继续行动，大家又会吵起来吧…
- Aaaaah! Darn you, General Mahamatra, entrapment isn't gonna work! You can't do that! ｜ 呀啊——！可恶的大风纪官，钓鱼执法行不通的，你不能这样！
- Katheryne informs you that an oni named Arataki Itto has absconded after committing a misdeed. You ask around in the city as to his whereabouts. ｜ 从凯瑟琳那里你了解到有一个名叫荒泷一斗的鬼族青年在作恶后潜逃，为了寻找他的行踪，你决定去城里打听消息。
- Well, I've got a farm here, as I'm sure you've noticed. ｜ 是这样的，你也看见了，我这里不是有片农场嘛。
- As for the others... well, let's not bring that up for now. Some of the loss of contact might just be temporary. Perhaps they'll just turn up back at home someday, completely out of the blue? ｜ 其他的就…先不提了吧。有些人只是暂时没有消息，没准哪天就回家了呢。
- Heh. It's just wordplay — and if anything, that's my wheelhouse. ｜ 呵，一点文字游戏而已，要说的话，这才是我专精的领域呢。
- Of course, there's no need to be concerned. I merely had to transfer a rather large amount of life force on this occasion. But with Changsheng's help, I will recover in time. ｜ 没事，只是抽调了不少生机，需要一点时间，让长生帮我调养而已。
- Even adventurers want to learn how to write poetry... I see this is going to be a popular class. ｜ 冒险家也来学习写情诗，嗯~这门课相当受欢迎呢。
- Yeah! When we send Bongo-Head and buddies into action, it's like clockwork! And we ain't about to stop tickin'! ｜ 说得对！我们和「咚咚小圆帽」，还有其他伙伴的默契绝对不会输！
- Light Across the Fields ｜ 稻之光
- Well, you take care of yourself too, Baizhu. ｜ 那白术自己也要注意身体啊。
- I was just making conversation, I didn't mean anything by it... ｜ 我就是说说，没别的意思…
- That's correct, but probably not the answer to the riddle... ｜ 是这样没错！不过这个应该不会是谜语的答案吧…
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启
- Hey! "Rawr" sounds more like tigers or lions! That's a good way to frighten a kitty and turn it into a scaredy-cat! ｜ 喂！「嗷嗷呜呜」听起来像老虎狮子，完全是吓唬猫猫的发音嘛！
- Darn! ｜ 可恶
- Ahh... the more I consider it, the more I think nothing could ever make me happier! ｜ 嗯…想来想去，都觉得这是最幸福的事情了。
- You're the one who's embarked on epic journeys to distant places and achieved many great feats. ｜ 你是远渡重天，创造诸多伟业之人。
- Ponder the meaning of this theme, and focus on the flowers and the various other utensils to create your very own "floral courtyard." ｜ 请两位领会题中的深意，专注于花材与花器，开始构筑你们的「花影瑶庭」吧。
- I mean, the weather in Inazuma remains very comfortable. And Komore Teahouse is very safe and secure. So all in all, I'm in no hurry to leave, haha. ｜ 更何况稻妻的气候实在是舒服，「木漏茶室」的安保也好，我倒也不急着离开，哈哈。
- Oh, I'm so excited that I don't even know what I should be doing anymore! ｜ 我光顾着自己兴奋，都不知道现在该干什么了。
- Do you have any idea where this Ordo might be? ｜ 关于水仙十字结社在什么地方，安有什么头绪吗？
- Paimon... ｜ 派蒙…
- Shop Ornament: Just One Bite ｜ 坊店挂饰-「一口就行」
- Complete "Transient Dreams" ｜ 完成「须臾百梦」剧情
- I'm afraid that he was caught up in his thoughts and didn't pay attention to his surroundings. Actually, before the "world was flipped upside down," this domain didn't look anything like this. ｜ 恐怕是他困于心境没能注意周围吧。事实上，在「天和地突然翻转了一下」之前，整个蜃境并不是现在这副模样。
- When the active character deals consecutive instances of Elemental DMG of the same Elemental Type or Physical DMG using Normal, Charged, or Plunging Attacks to an opponent, they will gain 1 count stack. 1 stack can be gained every 0.3s. The stacks for every Elemental and Physical DMG will be counted independently. After 6 stacks have been gained, a <color=#F39000FF>shockwave will be unleashed</color> at the opponent's position, dealing True DMG and clearing all previously accumulated stacks for this DMG type. Should the active character leave the field, these stacks will be cleared. ｜ 当前场上角色通过普通攻击、重击或下落攻击连续对敌人造成同类元素伤害或物理伤害时，将进行计数，每0.3秒至多进行一次计数，每种元素类型与物理伤害造成的计数分别独立存在。计数达到6次时，将在敌人所在位置<color=#F39000FF>释放冲击波</color>，造成真实伤害，并移除该伤害类型的计数。该角色退场时，将移除所有的计数。
- Vera's Melancholy (IV) ｜ 少女薇拉的忧郁·卷四
- Alpha Pose ｜ 叉腰
- Whoa, not a single one was left... You're awesome, Sorush. The thorns that bore those Nirodha Fruits are really powerful too! ｜ 都清理掉了…斯露莎好厉害！结出「苦离果」的荆棘也好厉害！
- Yeah, it's her alright. ｜ 肯定是了。
- I didn't want to cause any trouble for Yoimiya or Mr. Ryuunosuke, but I'm very grateful to them for taking me in. ｜ 我也不想多给宵宫和龙之介先生添麻烦，他们能收留我，我就很感激了。
- Go to the place on the lake island where the notes were left ｜ 前往水池中岛上的笔记遗留之处
- Hmm, in that case, why don't we take a walk around the city, and see if we can learn anything from the local residents? ｜ 那我们不如先去城里转转，从居民们那边打听一些情报吧？
- There you go again! ｜ 喂！
- Wow... this is astonishing. Is it some kind of magic? It seems to be... another copy of me? ｜ 这…好神奇。是某种法术吗？这里面的…是又复制出了一个我？
- Hmm, those do sound refreshing, but the popsicles aren't sweet. ｜ 听上去都是水果，口感应该比较清爽，但我记得冰棍没有甜甜的味道。
- ...I understand. ｜ …我知道了。
- You are in Co-Op Mode. Invite your teammates to attempt the challenge together? ｜ 当前处于联机状态，是否发起挑战邀请，邀请队伍成员参与挑战？
- In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- Leschots Clockwork Workshop Staff ｜ 莱舒的发条工坊店员
- ...Please excuse us, Ma'am. It's just an unconscious reaction. ｜ …失…失礼了，我们也是，不知道怎么身体就自个儿动了起来。
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- Is that so? ｜ 真的假的？
- Mmm, tastes really good! Come and have some! Let's eat together. ｜ 呜哇！这个味道很不错呀，你也来点吧~我们一起吃！
- Kinich? Wait... ｜ 基尼奇？等等…
- But in addition to being a painter myself, I am also an art conservator. ｜ 但我除了画家的这个身份之外，还是一名「画作修复师」。
- Those monsters aren't easy to deal with. Our soldiers are too young to be of much help, and now I'm out of commission as well... ｜ 那些魔物…不好对付，我们的卫兵太过年轻，而我也恨自己有心无力…
- A gelatinous substance made from fruit and sugar. Even a little bit can easily wake up tired taste buds. ｜ 由水果和糖熬制而成的凝胶物质。只要少许就能轻易唤醒疲惫的味蕾。
- A leaf bud dropped by the monster known as the Tenebrous Mimiflora after being vanquished.\nIt is said that when this creature emerged from the Black Tide, the first things it grew were these tender buds capable of deflecting elemental power. ｜ 名为深邃拟覆叶的魔物在被击败后所掉落的芽叶。\n据说这种魔物自黑潮之中诞生时，最先生长而出的，就是这样能使元素的力量偏转的嫩芽。
- But still, the Abyss Herald underestimated my strength. ｜ 但深渊的使徒，终究是太小看我了。
- The great Iktomisaur elder's full name means "He of the Sharp Mist-Shaded Claws," while mine, "Amazolli," means "Ancient Collection of Texts." ｜ 暝视龙大长老的全名意为「拥有烟雾色利爪的他」，我的名字「阿马佐利」意为「古老的书籍」。
- Surprised Audience Member ｜ 惊讶的观众
- Don't you wanna buy some fish to take with you? All my fish are "super fresh," you know. ｜ 客人要不买条鱼再走？我的鱼可都是「超·新鲜」的！
- Hey, whaddya mean "waste"!? That message will mobilize the Treasure Hoarders! ｜ 什么叫没用的东西？这都是战前动员！

- Unauthorized combat, unauthorized combat! Seize them immediately! ｜ 私斗私斗！抓起来抓起来！

- I must say, I was pretty satisfied with the results. ｜ 而在场所有人给我的反应，我很满意。
- Many common folk believe that I share a special bond with the Melusines, and whatever they do can be traced back to me. ｜ 在民众眼中，美露莘跟我的关系很特殊，她们的一举一动都与我息息相关。
- Besides that... Ask him if he has any good food ready. It's almost mealtime... ｜ 顺便…再问问他有没有准备好吃的，看这样子也快到饭点了…

- Got something you need to say? Give it to me straight; good news or bad news, it doesn't bother me either way. ｜ 找我什么事？有话直说就行，我没什么所谓。
- And then... the calamity came! But to his own surprise, the man felt somehow emboldened by the trials of his journey. By relying on his own strength, he managed to overcome the adversity. ｜ 然后，灾厄果然降临了！但他没想到的是，一路旅行的见闻却启发了他，他凭借自己的力量，成功渡过了难关。

- Of course they wouldn't! It's becau— ｜ 当然不是啦！是——
- Hey! Watch out! Those good-for-nothings are back again! ｜ 喂！小心了！那群家伙又来了！
- After two days, the little fox had recovered and I accompanied the girl back to the shrine. Upon our arrival, Kitsune Saiguu asked the girl which fox was her favorite — the one she had made friends with originally, or the new one? ｜ 两天后她的小狐狸痊愈，我跟她一起来到了神社。狐斋宫就问她，你喜欢自己的小狐狸，还是新的小狐狸呀？
- There are all these new powers that suddenly appear without having ever been referenced before. ｜ 有好多次，在前文没有伏笔的情况下突然为角色增加设定。

- Hehe, it kinda looks like a leaf. ｜ 看起来像一片叶子。
- If it helps advance your adventuring career, call me whatever you like. ｜ 您大可选择一个便于您开展冒险活动的称呼。

- You can count on me. ｜ 交给我吧。

- Talk to Ararycan ｜ 与兰利遮对话
- Bon appétit. ｜ 祝你有个好胃口。
- Ideally, we'll also get a ton of Mora while we're at it. ｜ 当然，如果能顺带拿到摩拉就再好不过了。
- Ah, Master Childe, you're here. ｜ 「公子」大人，原来您真的在这儿。
- There are many intricacies to drinking tea... Clear your mind, take a sip of tea, and sense the whispers within your drink. That is the attitude all tea lovers should have... ｜ 喝茶啊，还是要多点讲究…放空思绪，细品香茗，读出茶中的轻言细语，才是茶客应有的态度…

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- No. ｜ 否。
- Huh? What is it? ｜ 欸…？什么事情呀！
- I heard that Azar and his cronies fell from power, and Alhaitham told me that now was a good time to find a job in the Akademiya, but only if I wanted to. ｜ 听说阿扎尔和他的同党都倒台了，艾尔海森告诉我，现在是去教令院找工作的好机会，前提是我有这个意愿。
- That's right. We'll be counting on you, Traveler. ｜ 没错，这次的事就拜托你了，旅行者。
- Hydro Hypostasis ｜ 无相之水
- You can go now. I won't accept your offer, at least this time. ｜ 你们走吧。我不会同意的，至少这次不会同意。
- Ah, I'm so looking forward to reading Uncle Ramsay's new travelogue. ｜ 唉，真想快点看到拉姆齐叔叔写的新「游记」…
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启
- If you were to ask me, the themes and plot are just a little outdated by this point, but enough readers buy it to keep sales up. ｜ 要我说的话，题材和剧情其实都有些老套了，但好在还有一些读者买账，销量也还可以。
- What is it, youngster? ｜ 你好，年轻人，有什么事吗？
- Wouldn't I be taking up your time, though? I doubt this was in your schedule... ｜ 但这会耽误你们的时间吧，应该不是你们预定中的事情…
- You again... What is it this time? ｜ 又是你们啊，这次有什么事吗？
- Everyone, I once made a wish to perform with someone no one could have expected. And today, on this island, I've found my answer. ｜ 各位，我曾许下一个愿望，要跟谁都想不到的人一起办演唱会。而今天，我在海岛上找到了答案。

- Huh, the fortunate... and the unfortunate... ｜ 幸运的人…跟不幸的人吗…

- I'm sure it's "lemon-squeezy," Paimon... ｜ 是「举手之劳」…
- Oh, he did praise me! For having the gall to submit a fantasy novel as a project proposal, I mean. ｜ 他夸我十分勇敢，竟然敢把幻想文学当做立项书提交给他。
- Those words are not exactly flattering, Paimon. ｜ 派蒙好过分。
- I really envy that Lanoire girl. If I were her, I'd choose to never leave here. I'd rather be ignorant of the world outside. ｜ 那个叫莉诺尔的小女孩，我真羡慕她，如果能和她换换，我一定选择不要离开这里。我宁愿不知道外面的世界。

- She's the owner of Frida's Palette. Don't worry, you couldn't miss her shop's sign even if you tried. ｜ 她是圣火竞技场里「弗里达的色盘」的店主。她的店牌可显眼了。
- Thank you very much. Leave the fortune slips to me and I'll hang them up in the right place. ｜ 多谢你。这些签文就交给我吧，我会把它挂在合适的地方。
- Hahaha, then eat as much as you want! ｜ 哈哈哈，那可得多吃点！
- It won't be too dangerous, will it... ｜ 我不会遇见啥危险吧…
- She sure does care a lot about what we think of her... ｜ 她似乎很在意自己在我们眼里的形象？

- Ah, yes. Since you are Ganyu's friends, tales from her youth shall one apprise you of, perhaps... ｜ 哦对了，既然是甘雨的朋友，那我给你们讲讲甘雨这孩子小时候的故事吧…
- In the tales of the Dragonborn, that offshoot was part of a great soul. ｜ 龙裔的话语叙事里，那是伟大灵魂的一缕分灵。
- This is good. Ah, my boy truly is a lucky lad. A lucky lad indeed! ｜ 好啊…我家这小子果然还是命好，是个福星呀。

- You really want to get on a first-name basis, huh? ...I stopped using my real name a long time ago. ｜ 一定要问名字吗…名字已经丢了。
- Still, I have discovered something strange... ｜ 不过，倒是有件事，奴家觉得很奇怪…
- Really? Huh, for a moment there, I could have sworn the actual Fatui were right here... ｜ 这样吗？刚刚我真的以为有愚人众来了…
- #Wow! It's {NICKNAME} and Lil' Miss Paimon! We meet again! ｜ #哇！是{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}和派蒙妹妹，我们又见面了！
- Let's leave a few words here, he should be able to see 'em! ｜ 嗯！就在这里留言吧，这下他应该能看得见了！
- Uh, no, wait! That's not what I wanted to talk about... ｜ 哎！不对不对…我要说的不是这个…
- "Mao" ｜ 军中人称「阿茂」
- Well, if you need help chasing down a gliding criminal, I'm the one for the job! So tell me, which way did he go? ｜ 居然是个飞行高手，那就摆明了非我安柏出马不可了——嗯，那家伙往哪边逃了？
- A crystal chunk that is pale blue all over, fair as the purest winter snow. ｜ 美丽的水晶块，通体呈澄澈如纯净冬雪般的浅蓝色。
- You nailed it! But it's no surprise, given the way you handle your glider in a storm. ｜ 很好！不愧是在暴风里也能掌握平衡的你，顺利通过了。
- #{NICKNAME}, wh—what do we do now? Have we been... fired? ｜ #怎么办呀，{NICKNAME}，我们、我们不会是失业了吧！
- Wouldn't it be a bit too plain to give something like this as a gift? ｜ 用这些来做礼物，是不是有点太普通了呢…
- Pseudostar Pedestal ｜ 拟星的台座
- Oh, thank you so much. ｜ 啊，非常感谢…
- You two are the scam artists! You put on this damsel-in-distress and elderly grandpa act to win my sympathy, then used a few cheap tricks to get my attention! ｜ 原来你们两个才是骗子！先假扮成弱小的女子和老人，博取我的同情！又用劣质的小把戏吸引我的注意力！
- In order to achieve a breakthrough in his alchemical skills, Timaeus has constructed an alchemical furnace powered by pure elemental energy, which he has named the Elemental Crucible. However, as Timaeus does not possess a Vision, he cannot use the Elemental Crucible, and as such, is looking for people to help him out... ｜ 为了让自己的炼金术得以突破，蒂玛乌斯修筑了一台以纯元素驱动的全新炼金炉，他将之命名为「原素烘炉」。但是，因为蒂玛乌斯没有「神之眼」，不能自由操纵元素启动「原素烘炉」，所以他正在寻找能够帮他启动「原素烘炉」的人…
- Mt. Kanna? It was where the Thunderbird reposed. ｜ 菅名山啊。那是雷鸟栖息的地方。

- Boss Thoma is best! ｜ 托马！呶大！

- *whine* ｜ 呜——
- I'm not angry at all. I just feel like it's a shame. ｜ 我倒也没置气，只是有些可惜。
- No! They're creatures. You know, little fairies or something... ｜ 才不是啦！看起来像小动物、小精灵一样的东西…

- Now, now, not was. Still am. ｜ 嘿，不止一百年前，现在也是。

- What I'm trying to say is: You once conquered the <color=#00E1FFFF>Meaty Tribe's Arena</color>. Why don't you give the tournament a whirl? ｜ 总之，我觉得你作为征服过<color=#00E1FFFF>好肉族擂台</color>的人，不如再去试试吧？
- Elegant Countenance ｜ 优雅仪容
- Precisely. In previous years, the flame bearer has often been unable to dispel a sufficient amount of Abyssal energy. That's the only reason why we have to perform the ceremony on a regular basis. ｜ 没错。往年的仪式里，游火人往往无法驱散足够多的深渊能量，所以我们才需要定期重复这一仪式。

- Don't you think that hilichurls are very interesting life-forms? ｜ 你不觉得丘丘人是一种很有趣的生物吗？
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- ...Oh come on, why won't you just get it already... ｜ …真是的，为什么还听不懂我的意思呢…
- There is nothing he wouldn't have done for his true love. Nothing. ｜ 为了爱人，他可以不顾一切。
- The Abyss attacked the Collective of Plenty when I was really young. So many people I knew got hurt... All my parents and I could do was hide away in a well-hidden cellar and barricade the door. I still remember the sound of the monsters trying to ram the door down... I was so scared, I didn't even dare to cry out loud... Thankfully, the Patrol Team got to us in time and saved us, but it got me thinking — even if the heroes of the past were immortal, there'd only be so much they could do. They couldn't be everywhere at once, and protect everyone and everything. But maybe, if I trained hard enough and learned how to fight, maybe next time instead of waiting to be rescued, I'd be strong enough to fight off the bad guys myself. ｜ 我很小的时候，深渊就袭击过「沃陆之邦」，好多我认识的人受伤了…我和爸爸妈妈只能躲在很远很偏的地窖里，把门堵得死死的。魔物把门砸得哐哐作响，我连哭都不敢哭得大声…好在部族的巡逻队赶了过来，我们才脱险…那时我想，就算以前的英雄们能永生不死，关键时刻也忙不过来，不可能长出三头六臂保护世界上的每个角落。如果我自己也好好锻炼，变得更能打，遇上危险至少有力气对付坏家伙，这样才比较好！
- I live nearby, and I don't want to sleep with that funky smell in my nostrils, alright? ｜ 我就住在这附近，可不想闻着那股怪味入睡。
- I will do my utmost. ｜ 我都会全力以赴。
- *sigh*... Morning, can I help? ｜ 唉…早安，请问有什么事情吗？
- Ah, what gave it away? My acting skills appear to have deteriorated. ｜ 啊，被看出来了吗？看来我的演技有所退步啊。
- How much!? ...Alright fine, I'll bite the bullet on the service charge, but I'm not paying extra for a few wet wipes, okay? Matter of fact, I brought my own, so you can keep 'em! ｜ 什么？！茶位费就算了，擦手帕都要另外收钱的？好在我自己有带，退掉退掉。

- Wind-Dial ｜ 「风之晷」

- Scholar's Ink Cup ｜ 学士的墨杯
- About Ways to Make Friends With Saurians... ｜ 关于使龙开心的办法…

- Yasuhiko Tarou ｜ 安彦太郎
- Is it time for your return journey, then? If you're heading back to Dornman Port, I'd be happy to accompany you. ｜ 准备返程了吗？要回荆夫港的话，我们可以继续同行。
- I promised her that we'd spend Lantern Rite together and that I'd teach her how to make a Xiao Lantern for our mother. ｜ 我答应过她，今年要一起过海灯节，还要教她为妈妈做一盏霄灯。
- Taking on the role of Chief Justice does not make me a part of this community. In fact, the status I was granted has prevented me from forming deeper bonds with others. ｜ 受邀担任「审判官」的职位，不代表我融入了这个社会。事实上，我被赋予的身份反而限制了我与其他人深入交流。
- The good news is that I know the way back to the tribe very well! ｜ 好消息是，从这里回部族的路我非常熟！
- Purchased from Battle Pass: Gnostic Chorus ｜ 购买纪行·珍珠之歌获取
- Ask the village head about the whereabouts of the scholar ｜ 向村长打听学者的下落
- Guyun Stone Forest is a place where a god was defeated, and its remnants still affect the area to this day. ｜ 因为孤云阁本来就是镇压魔神的地方，魔神的残渣至今还影响着这里。
- Would it kill you not to say things like that for two seconds!? ｜ 你、你少说两句！
- Use this to clear a certain area in Enkanomiya of the darkness' influence.\nThe name "Bokuso" is formed from "boku," meaning "to draw near to what is good," and "so," meaning "to shun that which is tainted." ｜ 使用后，可以清除一定范围内，渊下宫黑雾的影响。\n「亲近美好之物」谓之「睦」，「远离污秽之物」谓之「疏」。此即「睦疏」之意。
- We should split up. I've got a "little present" to prepare for Master Masakatsu, hehe... I'll be right back. ｜ 我们分头行动吧，为了「迎接」正胜师傅，我要去做些准备…
- Completion Rewards ｜ 完成奖励
- Search for Lyney and Lynette ｜ 寻找林尼和琳妮特
- Echoing Conch ｜ 回声海螺
- Now, it's my turn. ｜ 轮到我的回合了。
- Talk to Donna and find out what happened ｜ 与唐娜对话，了解情况
- Ah wait — but the sterling reputation of Dawn Winery is at stake! Why, if you really purchased bootleg liquor, that would be scandalous. Better to have unknown and insignificant alcohol aficionados do the taste-test for you, to prevent word getting out. ｜ 但晨曦酒庄盛名在外，若是真买了假酒，那就太尴尬了！还是让我们这些无关紧要的热心酒友来帮忙吧。

- BANG!!! ｜ 嘭——
- I've never heard a duet like that before. It was very interesting. ｜ 从未听过这样的合奏，很有意思。
- He was worried that whatever advantage he might have now will diminish over time... so the Fatui persuaded him that he should act while he can. ｜ 他担心越往后自己优势越小，于是在愚人众的劝说下决定立刻动手。
- Berserker's Battle Mask ｜ 战狂的鬼面
- Processed ｜ 烹饪加工获得
- Long-distance travel tires people out, so a little spice can help keep people alert. ｜ 长途旅行肯定很让人疲惫，辣味说不定能让大家打起精神来呢。
- Hmph. Nowhere left to run, huh? ｜ 哼，看来是没有可以逃回去的地方了。
- Oh, and Ajaw has something to say. ｜ 此外，阿乔也有话要说。
- Hello again. ｜ 又见面了。
- Hehe. ｜ 呵呵。
- Honestly, watching you play was quite the spectacle! An expert performance if I ever saw one! ｜ 不得不说，你们挑战「节拍撞球」的关卡时，观赏性和技术力都快溢出了！
- Traveler, please ask Cyno to be the model for my novel... I'm counting on you! ｜ 旅行者，请赛诺先生为我做模特的事…就拜托你了！
- #To clean out all the Abyssal monsters in the Tephric Ruins so quickly... It looks like you're even stronger than I thought, {NICKNAME}... ｜ #居然在这么短时间内就处理掉了「喷发遗迹」中的深渊魔物，看来你比我想象的还要强…{NICKNAME}…
- But in my opinion, it doesn't have to be a particularly expensive dish. As long as the taste and flavor is unique, and it packs a punch, that should be enough... ｜ 不过依我看，倒不一定要特别名贵的菜，只要口感和风味独树一帜，再加上一些些的冲击力就足够了…
- ... ｜ …
- In complex scenarios, there really isn't much room for a simple trick or quick fix to solve your problem, but one should rather use their experience and trial and error to continually debug it and find the proper solution... ｜ 对于错综复杂的应用情境不存在多少取巧的空间，基于已有的经验勇于试错并不断改正方才是最好的技法…
- A mighty race of vishaps that dwell within the deep seas.\nThat they hate light is not due to an overly fragile sense of sight. Instead, it is because they have had the selfless sunlight and the surface world taken from them that they refuse to countenance man-made light. ｜ 在深海里居住的龙蜥族群。\n它们讨厌光的主要原因并不是视觉系统过于脆弱。不如与之相反，正因为失去了地表，无私的日光被夺走了，它们才不愿意看到人造的光芒。
- Hu Tao ｜ 胡桃
- Safety first! ｜ 注意安全！
- Ah, like a flame that appears in the darkness, so too will heroes rise up in times of great peril. Human possibility shines through in glory at moments such as this. ｜ 哎呀…就像黑暗蒙昧之时总有火光出现，呵呵，危难之际也总能傲立起了不得的豪杰。人类的可能性总在这时候变得相当耀眼啊。

- This is the last part. Let's go. ｜ 那我们就出发吧，最后的一段路了。

- That's right. When I started to hear some nasty rumors, I became wary, and wanted to meet him face-to-face to discuss things. ｜ 嗯，联系到那些不好的传闻，我也警觉起来，想要当面和他谈一谈。
- Frostbite Transmitter ｜ 凝冰响振晶
- Don't apologize. It is in the bucket now, and that's enough for me. ｜ #{NICKNAME}老师和派蒙老师不用这样道歉，它现在已经在桶里了，这样就足够了。
- After some initial commotion, everyone finally forms a queue. ｜ 一阵骚乱之后，现场终于排好了队。
- #Anyway, Marana is very dangerous. Nara {NICKNAME}, Paimon, I recommend we match each other's pace. Let me know when you're ready to set out. ｜ #总之，无留陀很危险。那菈{NICKNAME}、派蒙，我们配合步调一起行动吧。如果准备好一起出发了，就告诉我吧。
- Magnificent! Acts of pure chivalry by the sound of it. ｜ 好！都是「行侠仗义」的大好事。
- Wow. Sounds pretty cool. ｜ 哇，听起来还挺有意思的。
- Is that so... ｜ 这样啊…
- Jahangir said this was the second time his wind generator broke down. Mechanical failures of that nature come with predictable consequences. His lack of surprise suggests something similar happened in the past. ｜ 贾汉吉尔提到他的鼓风机之前也坏过一次。小型机械的损毁，场面应该不会相差太多。听他口气也是那样。
- The strange hilichurls often steal Grainfruit and stuff them in treasure chests... but the little saurians are nimble and quick, so help them take back their treasures without being noticed by the bad guys! ｜ 奇奇怪怪的丘丘人会将颗粒果抢走，装在箱子里藏好…但小龙们身手灵巧，不被坏家伙们发现，也能夺回那些宝物箱！
- State of the Holy Lyre der Himmel ｜ 至宝的现状
- May I ask about the Almighty Shogun? ｜ 关于将军大人…
- <color=#FFD780FF>Gyoei Narukami Kariyama Rite</color>'s AoE is increased by 50%. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>御咏鸣神刈山祭</color>的影响范围提升50%。
- Well, we're here to help this sword grow, aren't we? Might as well go try it out on those monsters! ｜ 我们是要帮助这把剑成长对吧？来都来了，不如去试试手！
- Hmph. And why should we believe you? ｜ 哼，谁知道你说的是不是真的？
- Jean's outfit. Neat and smart clothing that emphasizes her chivalry. ｜ 琴的装扮款式。彰显骑士风度的利落装束。
- Manly Jack's Manly Journey of Manliness ｜ 男子汉杰克的男子汉之路
- I don't know where this wrath comes from. So let's keep our distance for the time being. ｜ 不知这股怨念来自何方…暂时不要靠近为好。
- Okay... and then what happened? ｜ 然后呢？
- But they say that they don't know where mom and dad are, either. It's so strange... ｜ 但是，他们也说不知道我爸爸妈妈去哪了，真奇怪…
- "Indomitable Youji" ｜ 「一往无前的阳司」
- According to Miko's "suggestion," you work as shrine maidens at the shrine... ｜ 你们听从了神子的「建议」，在神社中承担起巫女的工作…
- I remember I was in the forest, and I made a friend. We ran around together, then... ｜ 我记得当时在林子里，认识了一个朋友。我们一起到处跑，后来…
- But, then, humanity discovered me and learned that I could grant them unlimited power to fell even the most fearsome of enemies. ｜ 人类发现了我，得知了我能赐予他们无限的力量，助他们战胜可怕的强敌。
- Paimon can't help but think that Sorush should recognize it! ｜ 总感觉斯露莎应该认识它！
- Huh? You mean he was already here? Why didn't he come say hi to us...? ｜ 欸？他来这里怎么不叫我们…
- Trying to leave, are we? ｜ 想走？
- "The hungry dragon was super weak. One's got to wonder if one could beat him with a single strike too, eh?" ｜ 「饿龙好弱哦。这么弱的饿龙，我上我也能一剑让他退场吧？」
- Such a powerful ability, and you don't use it to earn a living? What a shame... ｜ 有这么厉害的能力居然不用来赚钱，太可惜了…
- You approach Diluc... ｜ 你走向了迪卢克…
- Nameless Researcher's Notes (III) ｜ 无名学者的记事·其三
- When we're back, I'll open up a bakery there and never touch another Numbering Machine again. ｜ 然后，我就会在镇子里开一家面包房，从此不再搭理什么推数机了。

- The book contains many ancient "kaidan" — or tales of the supernatural — and is written in a very engaging way. That is why the book has become so popular. ｜ 里面讲述了许多古老的怪谈，讲故事的手法也很老辣，这就是它能流行起来的原因。

- A pox! A pox upon them all! ｜ 可恶！可恶！

- ...Ridiculous. Still, it matters not to me. ｜ …莫名其妙。不过，我没有什么所谓。
- Let's get going, Heizou. ｜ 快开始吧，平藏小子。
- Truly, Liyue feels... a little too different. ｜ 如今的璃月港…还真是让人觉着大不一样了。
- Gotta stand on a chair... Could you help me get a chair? ｜ #唔…窝要站在椅子上…{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_CUTEBIGBROTHER|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_CUTEBIGSISTER]}，帮我搬一把椅子过来吧…

- Stop making excuses for destroying the forest! ｜ 明明是在破坏森林还振振有词的！

- ...What is it? ｜ …怎么了？
- This means that as long as they haven't done anything technically illegal, even if they keep hogging it... ｜ 所以只要他们没有做出什么违法的事，就算像这样赖着不走…

- As the sender of this gift envelope, how should you address yourself... ｜ 寄出这份祝柬的你，应当用何自称…
- So why don't you do that, then? ｜ 那莱依拉为什么不用呢？

- You and Paimon meet two old friends at Port Ormos. They seem to be preparing for a game of some sort... ｜ 在奥摩斯港，你和派蒙偶然遇见了两位老朋友，他们似乎正在筹备着某种游戏…
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- To my shame, yes... Though I do not have such emotions, you can see it as me having lowered my assessment of myself. ｜ 十分惭愧。尽管我可能没有这种实际的情感，诸位可以理解为我对自己的评估下降了。
- And therefore, due to the restrictions thus imposed by outside conditions, all I can do now is arrange some work for myself. *sigh* There's nothing I can do about it... ｜ 所以，由于客观条件限制，我现在就只能自己安排自己的工作了。唉，真是没办法…
- I will... make a profit! ｜ 一定…能赚！

- ...Hmm. Now you mention it, yes I am. ｜ …唔，你说是也算是吧。
- The stars have always guided caravans, thieves, soldiers, and travelers who get lost in the night. They lead those in the dark out of trouble and back to safety. ｜ 夜星从来都会指引黑夜中迷路的商队、盗贼、战士和旅人走出困境，回到安全地带。
- A war against our eternal enemy, the Abyss. ｜ 对手是我们纳塔永恒的敌人，深渊。
- You have a good heart, child. May the gods watch over you and that heart of yours. See you. ｜ 你是个善良的好孩子，神看到你的热心肠会庇护你的，再见。

- You mean Cuistot and Laverune? ｜ 库斯图和拉韦兰？
- Dropped uncommonly by mitachurls ｜ 丘丘暴徒少量掉落
- Blast that dratted fellow... Oh, I'm so bored... ｜ 都怪那个混小子，好无聊啊…
- Polearm ｜ 长柄武器
- She's a resilient girl, but no matter how resilient she may be, no one can hold up to criticism and torment from themselves. ｜ 她是个很坚韧的女孩子，但再怎么坚韧也无法经受自我的折磨。
- Mr. Khasani found a new way to look at art. He decided to stay at the theater to watch us grow. ｜ 加萨尼先生在剧场获得了对艺术的新解读，他决定陪我们一起见证这里的发展。
- Find the Aranara's trail ｜ 寻找「兰那罗痕迹」
- They're also erasing the memories of those who leave... ｜ 出城的人也会被删除记忆…
- Huh? What was that noise!? ｜ 嗯？外面突然好吵啊！
- The reaver from beyond the skies once froze Xiuhcoatl in lava, causing him to fall into a false death... ｜ 天空之上的掠夺者一度将修库特尔冰结于熔岩之中，令其陷入假死…
- In the Fontaine Research Institute, you encounter Heinry, a member of the Fonta development team, and he seems to be quite busy with something... ｜ 在枫丹科学院，你遇见了枫达开发组的成员安里，他似乎正在为某事而忙碌着…
- To be honest with you both, our caravan got scattered not long ago. If it's not too much trouble, could you help us pass a message to our boss? Just let her know we're waiting for her here — we'd really appreciate it. ｜ 两位，实不相瞒，我们商队刚刚被打散了，既然你们是冒险家的话，不知道能不能帮我们通知一下老大，就说我们在这里等她。
- Umm, that's not what Paimon imagined when Paimon first heard the name "Big G." ｜ 呃，和「狼哥」这个名字给我留下的印象不太一样呢。
- Incantation? Are you guys trying out this new wishing ritual stuff, too? ｜ 咒语？难道说，你们是在试最近流行的那种许愿方法？
- "When will you return from some vast sea far away and see this message, my heart poured out for you to see?" ｜ 「我把我的思念写在这里，不知远洋归来的你，何时能够看到？」
- I was planning to have a Tatankasaurus drop by to help smash up and clear aside the stones in this barren field. If any monsters happened to pop out of the woodwork, it could help deal with them for me as well. ｜ 这片荒地里的石头，我正打算请一条突角龙过来帮忙打碎了踢到一边去，要是冒出来什么魔物，也顺带一起清理了。
- You've cheered Ann up already. ｜ 一下就让安开心起来了。
- ...I'm sorry. Have I been blabbing on too long? What I meant to say is: Please be extra careful. ｜ …抱歉，我是不是太啰嗦了？我的意思是想说，请务必注意安全，嗯。
- It's... It's all really nice! Don't worry about me. I can take care of myself. ｜ 当然…当然，不用担心我的，我能照顾好我自己。
- That's very similar to what Miss Candace says. I know you two are friends. That's why I'm willing to talk to you, even though I do have some reservations. ｜ …你的说法与坎蒂丝小姐非常接近。我知道你们是朋友，这也是为什么我虽然有所保留，却还是愿意和你对话。

- Jean secured the initial funds to open the shop. Albedo and Sucrose provided the ingredients and equipment needed to brew the potions. ｜ 开店所需的启动资金，是琴特意筹备的。炼制药剂所需的药材和设备，得到了阿贝多和砂糖的支持。

- Morning! The morn hours are precious. Spend them on that which matters to you. ｜ 早啊。早上的时间这么难得，能做做自己喜欢的事情就好了。
- It's settled then! Traveler, I'm heading out to catch Forest Boars soon. I've seen Snowboars in that place before, so you should come too. ｜ 嗯，那就这么定了！旅行者，我马上就要出发去捉野林猪了，之前我也是在那里目击到雪猪的，你也一起来吧。
- Perfume and clothing stores that push the times and tides here in Fontaine can be found there, too. Many tourists fresh off the boat make Narbonnais their first stop, in fact. ｜ 引领全枫丹时尚潮流的香水店和成衣店也在这个区域哦，好多游客刚下船就奔着那里去了，哈哈。
- These crystalline pendulum-like lights resemble stars falling to the earth, just like the shining stars that can be found everywhere in the Temple of the Star Latitudes. A special powder is sealed within the clear glass that draws light from the environment and allows it to emit light for long periods of time.\n"Who can imprison starlight? All that will be left is shade."\nThough she said this, the great astrologist seemed to not wish for this lamp to go out, and may have left this one behind in her temporary apartment as a memento. ｜ 晶莹剔透的摆灯，像是星光坠落凡间，与「星纬殿堂」中的遍地星芒如出一辙。澄澈的玻璃中封存着特殊的粉末，能从环境中汲取光亮，长久散发光芒。\n「谁能囚禁星光呢？留下的只不过是虚影罢了。」\n话虽如此，伟大的占星术士似乎并不希望这盏摆灯熄灭，或许还在暂住的公寓中留下了一盏作为纪念吧。
- Climb to the top of the mountain ｜ 爬上山顶
- Wh—What do they buy and what do they get? ｜ 购…购什么送什么？
- #{NICKNAME}, Paimon, let's head to the Akademiya and regroup. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，派蒙，先回教令院跟大家会合吧。

- When an opponent's HP falls too low, restores a certain amount of HP for the opponent. This effect can be triggered only once for each opponent. ｜ 敌人的生命值过低时，会立即为自身恢复一定生命值。每名敌人的该效果只会触发一次。
- Shinobu! Oni King! I... ｜ 忍姐！鬼王！我…
- However, one is currently preoccupied with a technical conundrum of great importance... We may need to postpone any idle colloquy for later. ｜ 不过，本仙正在思考一个重要的技术问题…闲聊恐怕还得往后放放。
- Oh, all right. So are you busy these days trying to find others to take the job? ｜ 那…好吧，你这几天是忙着叫别人来做贤者吗？
- Take a photo recording the Small Lamp Grass' habitat ｜ 拍摄画片，记录小灯草的生长环境
- Uhh... Well, you can also attach the Receiver Crystal to things that you're prone to losing. If you happen to misplace such an item, simply activate the Transmitter Crystal and... voila! Item found again! ｜ 那…那，下一个，把「应振晶」绑定在很容易丢失的物件上，只要触发「响振晶」，就能够找到那些不知道被丢在哪的物件。
- "Tulipe" ｜ 「图利佩」
- Yes. I've searched all over the city for her, but no luck. ｜ 对啊，我都要把全城找遍了，就是找不到。
- Do you have something to tell me? ｜ 你有话对我说吗？
- Heh, it's more exciting to go up against moving opponents! Commanding our Fungi friends to victory should feel more awesome than ever! ｜ 嘿嘿，和动起来的对手较量的时候，感觉更紧张刺激了，指挥蕈兽伙伴们获胜的时候，也更有成就感！

- Great! See ya later! ｜ 好，知道了，那等会儿见！
- Watch out! ｜ 小心！

- Axe Swipe ｜ 战斧挥击
- I've discovered no small amount of Crystal Ores nearby in the past two days. They truly are splendid! I recall that I saw them around... ｜ 这两天我在附近看到了不少水晶矿，这可是好东西啊！我记得是在…
- Word has it that you completed a <color=#00E1FFFF>commission</color>. The requester sends their thanks. ｜ 你已经完成了冒险家协会承接的<color=#00E1FFFF>委托</color>，委托人都让我向你道谢呢。
- Look for Albedo ｜ 寻找阿贝多
- But only by squeezing the paint out and directly pouring it out onto the canvas before using a carving blade and palette knife will provide me with the touch necessary to make an impact on others. ｜ 但我是把颜料挤出来，直接倒在画布上，用刮刀和铲子画画，这样才能做出让人印象深刻的笔触。
- Today, Amber is still the firecracker she always was, burning with endless passion and energy.\nNow that she's all grown up, Amber holds firm to her grandpa's teachings as she spreads her Wind Glider's wings and watches over the City of Freedom with the eye of an eagle and the cautious cunning of rabbit.\nThe "Crimson Knight" is known throughout Mondstadt.\nThe people are delighted to see the mischievous little girl they remember growing up to be a guardian they can rely on.\n"Never fear, Outrider Amber is here!"\nHer self-confidence is simply unshakable:\n"I am Outrider Amber, the one and only Outrider — which makes me the best one out there!" ｜ 如今的安柏依旧是那个如火的少女，浑身燃烧着无穷的热情与活力。\n从被保护的童年中成长，谨记着祖父的教导，安柏张开风之翼，用鹰一般的锐目与狡兔般的机警，守卫着自由之邦蒙德。\n「火红的骑士」在蒙德家喻户晓。\n人们欣喜地看到，曾经顽皮的小女孩正在长成值得依靠的守望者。\n「不用担心，因为我是侦察骑士安柏！」\n她的自豪不容动摇，\n「我是唯一，也是最优秀的侦察骑士安柏！」
- About the Vision ｜ 关于「神之眼」…
- About Us: Speaking Your Mind ｜ 关于我们·倾诉
- But just as I was talking to her, this little kitty snuggled up close to me and yawned so loudly! It was just too cute! ｜ 我正在和她聊着呢，这只小猫就凑过来，趴在我旁边打了大大的一个哈欠，太可爱了！
- Huh, now that Paimon looks at it, the deity that's carved on the statue is... kinda small. ｜ 仔细看的话，这座神像雕刻出的神明，身材很小巧的样子。
- Simply put, you defeated the Treasure Hoarders, yes. But at the same time, you've also blown Jilliana's cover. ｜ 简单来说，你击退了盗宝团，但同时也把「吉丽安娜就在蒙德城」这件事给挑明了。
- The Great Ingredient Melee ｜ 混乱的料理食材大争斗
- "Light novel readers have a special nickname for the place where the protagonist is briefly active before they go out and do their great deeds — the 'Happy Old Home.'"\n"In some works, such a place plays host to neither powerful friends nor foes, which allows the protagonist to display their stunning rate of growth. But many readers also find that this makes said stories rather old-fashioned and formulaic, and robs the initial companions one meets of significance."\n"What do I think, you ask? Well, I'm of the latter camp. Those the protagonist meets at the start should also constantly improve — that's the reality of how it is in Teyvat, and it just wouldn't be any fun otherwise!"\n"Speaking of which, what sort of place would you find closest to the concept of said 'Happy Old Home'?" ｜ 「轻小说读者之中流传着一个有意思的称号——『快乐老家』，指的是在主角尚未斩获值得称道的战绩前，暂时活动的地区。」\n「有的作品中，快乐老家的同伴和敌人都不算强大，这样就能凸显主角成长的神速。但也有许多作者认为，这样会使得故事显得太老气，俗套，而且会让最初出场的同伴变得无足轻重。」\n「至于我，自然是支持后者的！主角进步的同时，最初认识的同伴肯定也要不断变强！提瓦特的现实世界是如此，故事这样写，才更有意思！」\n「说起来，对你而言，定位最接近『快乐老家』的，是什么地方来着？」
- ...Now, you're making this hard for me. ｜ …反倒让我难办了啊。
- Well, I have a little brother who's a lot younger than me. Maybe he's just in his rebellious years, but he doesn't get along with anyone... ｜ 是这样，我有一个年纪差得比较多的弟弟，可能正是叛逆的年纪吧，和谁都处不来…
- Well, lots of people tend to buy single flowers to give as gifts, so I usually cut some flowers specifically for that purpose. ｜ 因为经常有人到店里来买单枝鲜花用来送人，所以我每天都会特别剪一些花备用。

- Mondstadt waits for your return, and if you're willing, the Knights will always welcome you. (If you're not, forget I said anything, yeah?) ｜ 我们在蒙德等你回来。若你愿意，随时可以回骑士团报道。（若你不愿意，当我没说。）

### Part 035

- *sigh* Though it's not like I can't understand where Waranka is coming from. But kids have to face the truth someday, and perhaps sooner is better than later. ｜ 唉，也不是不能体谅瓦兰卡的心情，但孩子迟早有一天要面对事实，或许早一点反而更好。
- Go to assist the caravan ｜ 前去支援商队
- Someone damaged our current tent, so I'm trying to get my subordinates to get one from that previous campsite delivered here. ｜ 我们现在住的帐篷，被手下人弄坏了点儿。我正打算，把留在上个营地里的召回来用呢。
- When scholars collaborate to solve difficult problems, we freely share our knowledge and resources with one another, as if we were all kin. ｜ 就像是一群为了攻克难题而聚在一起的学者，我们会竭力分享一切智慧，不分你我，情同手足。
- Layla's perseverance has finally paid off, and you uncover the truth behind the Wisdom Seelie... ｜ 咬牙坚持之后，你们终于有机会窥见「知慧仙灵」的真相…
- A detailed step-by-step recipe for making a Mushroom Pizza. ｜ 步骤详实的食谱，记载着「烤蘑菇披萨」的制作方法。
- I'll buy you a new book on military strategy. ｜ 等下给你买新的兵书。
- Indeed, indeed! The land of Teyvat is immense — no person can walk its entire breadth. But do not fear, dear friends! You must have the courage to venture into the unknown! ｜ 正是，正是！提瓦特大陆如此广袤，任何人都无法将它全部走遍。但没关系，亲爱的朋友，你要有踏入未知之地的勇气！
- Is it that Barea doesn't like my new novel? *sigh* But everyone else thinks it's pretty good... ｜ 难道是巴里亚不喜欢我新写的小说？唉，明明其他人都评价不错…
- We can discuss it when you're older. ｜ 等莉诺尔长大一些再说吧。
- Tequemecan Valley ｜ 坚岩隘谷
- Yes, those are— ｜ 嗯，这些呀…
- Make it a good one! Don't go wasting those materials, they weren't easy to find y'know! ｜ 好好做哦，不要浪费了我们辛辛苦苦找来的材料。
- Hut of Plenty: Stopgap Selection ｜ 沃陆棚屋-「临时之选」
- And of course, warriors will decline, as the law of nature dictates. ｜ 勇士当然也会衰弱，这是自然的规律。
- I made a reservation three months ago. I'm going to eat there tonight. Just you watch, I'll still be saying the same thing tomorrow! ｜ 三个月前就预订好了，我今晚再去吃给你看，明天我还是会说一样的话！
- Whew, Paimon sure wouldn't want to get on her bad side... ｜ 好威严的人…
- Those fanatic believers! Can't they spare the children!? ｜ 这帮狂热的信徒，竟然连小孩子都不放过吗！
- This Cryo Regisvine having originally withered up and died here... Is it because it hadn't been able to absorb the ambient corruption? ｜ 这棵急冻树会枯死在这种地方，难道是因为它无法吸收被污染过的力量？
- To be honest, I signed up for this job precisely because I'd heard that Captain Beidou slew Haishan. ｜ 其实我就是听说了北斗姐斩杀「海山」的事迹，才来应征船队的航海士的。
- (Look warily at Yae Miko) ｜ （警惕地看向八重神子）
