- A cream-filled dessert. Fluffy, flaky crust cradles a rich cream within. Round and nearly bursting, it's as cute as a Blubberbeast's belly. Few hearts can escape being ensnared by the thick, soft cream within. ｜ 奶油夹心的甜点。蓬松的酥皮，包裹着饱满的奶油，圆鼓鼓的，就像膨膨兽的肚皮一样可爱。绵密柔软的奶油能抓住每一个人的心。
- This dish is well-made indeed. A lot of effort must have gone into it, and it does taste great. ｜ 这菜真是够精致的，看这品相绝对下了不少功夫吧，看着味道真不错。

- Jack left. ｜ 杰克已经回去了。
- Outside the confines of her work, Ganyu very quickly shows how different she is from most other people.\nShe has a habit of taking afternoon naps and has a shockingly accurate internal clock. When lunch hour arrives, no matter where she is, she will simply curl up into a ball and fall asleep on the spot. Even the raucous dancing of hilichurls will fail to wake her.\nThese habits were at first just a running joke within the Liyue Qixing.\nBut once, after accompanying the then-Tianxuan to lunch outside the city, a well-fed Ganyu simply crawled into the nearest roadside haystack. She ended up being transported all the way to Dihua Marsh, awakening only after bumping her head during the unloading.\nUnable to find Ganyu anywhere over the subsequent three hours, and knowing that she would not depart unannounced, the Tianxuan almost filed a missing person report.\nAfter receiving a stern admonishment to "only take afternoon naps where it's safe," Ganyu retorted:\n"Well... isn't everywhere in Liyue safe?"\nPerhaps, with the mixture of human and illuminated beast blood flowing through her veins, Ganyu's understanding of the world's affairs is a little different to that of most humans. ｜ 一旦脱离了工作的范畴，甘雨就很容易显露出本性上的与众不同之处。\n她有睡午觉的习惯，同时仿佛内置了极其精准的生物钟。一旦到了午休时间，便不分地点不分场合，只要将身子蜷作一团就能立刻睡着，即使吵闹到有一群丘丘人围在她身边跳舞，也不会醒来。\n这种习性，最初也只是「璃月七星」内部流传的笑谈。\n然而，有次陪同某一代的「天璇星」，在午间外出就餐后，酒足饭饱的甘雨直接缩进了路边的干草堆里，被一路运去了荻花洲，直到卸货时脑袋砸到了地面，才醒了过来。\n在这往返的三小时内，四处找不见甘雨、又深知甘雨不会不告而别的那位「天璇星」，险些填报了人口失踪信息。\n在那之后，面对「今后只能在安全之地午睡」的告诫，甘雨有些委屈地回应：\n「璃月全境…不都是安全的地方吗。」\n究其原因，或许是身为仙兽的混血后裔，甘雨对于世间事物的认知，与多数的人类原本就有所不同。
- Saborn ｜ 萨博兰
- Certified player Granny Ruoxin. A kind and gentle old lady. During Lantern Rite, she spoke to some youths who had returned to see their family and learned of Genius Invokation TCG from them. With the aid of her long years of practice in chess, she has become a force to be reckoned with... ｜ 协会认证牌手若心。轻策庄的管事，和蔼慈祥的老人…海灯节期间，她与回庄探亲的年轻人交流后，认知到「七圣召唤」这一新颖的游戏，迅速将年轻时锤炼的棋技融会其中，成为了不可多得的高手…

- All the more reason to buck up! Since you're researching the same thing, there's a chance for a reunion, isn't there? ｜ 那你更要振作起来了，既然你们研究相同的东西，说不定还有重逢的机会呢！
- Totally understandable. ｜ 完全能理解。
- I mean, we were born with strong backs and agile limbs. It just feels... wrong, you know? To have these tools but be content with a placid existence. ｜ 毕竟我们生来拥有坚韧的脊梁，轻捷的四肢…一想到身怀利器却安于无风无浪的一生，就总觉得不甘心呀。
- Hehe~ Honestly, I didn't think about it at all. I just thought it'd be a shame if we didn't try something crazy. ｜ 嘿嘿，其实我也没想太多，只是觉得不趁机胡闹一次，那就太可惜了。

- Forgive my pessimism — it might be on account of my past as a Champion Duelist. ｜ 抱歉啊，老家伙我说了些悲观的话呢。可能因为我以前是决斗代理人吧，请你见谅。
- Amber is amazing. She's friendly and has tons of enthusiasm, plus she's really brave and always does the right thing... She's the person I admire most of all! She's like a cozy fire that makes everyone around her feel warm. There's no way I'd be where I am today without her... So much time has gone by — I bet she's even more cool and confident than ever these days! Who knows if I'll ever be able to match her. ｜ 安柏她真的很厉害，又热情又活泼，又勇敢又正义…是我最钦佩、最崇拜的人了！她总能像一团火一样照亮别人，要不是她，我肯定没法走到今天这一步…过了这么久，她现在一定变得更加沉稳、更加帅气了吧！真不知道什么时候才能赶上她。

- The truth is, I just prefer it when people can cut to the chase and be straight with one another. The amount of effort some people put into beating around the bush and being diplomatic... It'd be so much quicker to just hash it out and be done with it. ｜ 我其实只是不喜欢绕弯子而已，有这点相互顾及的时间，正事早就做完了。
- Everyone in the Knights of Favonius is always trying to have me take leave. I suppose I do push myself too much... ｜ 骑士团的各位无时无刻不想着让我休假…看来是我平时真的把自己逼得太紧了吗…

- Huh, what do you mean it's a good time? ｜ 怎么了，什么好时机？
- (That was a pretty pricey meal, all thanks to Paimon...) ｜ （的确是很贵的一顿饭，都怪派蒙。）
- In this wave of "Windtrace: Seekers and Strategy," you can play alone or matchmake with other friends to obtain Windtrace Coins. If you play a matchmade game with up to 2 other friends, you will all be placed on the Rebel team.\nOnce you have obtained a certain amount of these coins, you can unlock various rewards.\nIf you have a match using a pre-made group of four players or have reached the current coin limit, playing will not net you any more Windtrace Coins. ｜ 在本次「风行迷踪·谋策之局」中，玩家可以单独或与其他好友共同参与「风行迷踪·谋策之局」的匹配游戏以获取「迷踪币」。若至多两名好友一起匹配游戏时，好友均会扮演游侠。\n累积获取一定数量的「迷踪币」，即可解锁多种奖励。\n四名玩家自行组队参与游戏，或是获取「迷踪币」的数量达到当前上限时，参与游戏将无法再获取「迷踪币」。
- <color=#FFCC33FF>Is there anything you'd like to do?</color> ｜ <color=#FFCC33FF>有什么想做的吗？</color>
- The Qixing will already have dispatched the Millelith. They'll be seeking out the assassin from amongst the onlookers. ｜ 七星派出千岩军，要在观礼人士里寻找刺客。

- You know what, I think I get this guy. ｜ 我还挺理解你的。

- Let's do this. ｜ 我们走吧。

- Granny Ruoxin ｜ 若心
- So, they were suspicious of the Kujou Clan, and invited Sango to take the case. However, the Kujou Clan were still a step ahead and were able to remove themselves from the situation before the whole thing blew up. They drove Shiroyama to take all the blame as well as his own life... A perfectly clean cut for the Kujou Clan. ｜ 肯定是怀疑到了九条家头上，所以请来了珊瑚社长。不过还是九条家技高一筹，直接壮士断腕，逼死城山，把自己撇得一干二净。
- New Entry ｜ 新怪物
- "The secret to staying healthy: Don't get sick." ｜ 「保持身体健康的小妙方：不要生病。」
- Ah, just the sight of it's enough to make you feel warm... Perhaps we'll be able to pick them after a few more days of observation. ｜ 哎呀，只是看着，就感觉令人温暖的颜色…只要再观察几日，说不定就可以采摘。
- They run a pretty sophisticated operation. They would always claim the scammed money as some kind of legal travel expenditure, so it's hard to use that to directly convict them. ｜ 他们的手段很高明，游客被骗的每一笔钱都被他们包装成了某种合法的旅游消费，难以直接用来给他们定罪。
- "January 10th, 1 special tent pre-sold. It must quickly be switched out with an old tent..." ｜ 「一月十日，预售特殊帐篷一顶，速以旧帐篷与之替换…」
- How can people bring themselves to consume deep-fried foods? Or grilled food with no sauce? The worst culprits in my view are those Charcoal-Baked Ajilenakh Cakes. Surely, even eating a dehumidifying agent would be kinder on the stomach? ｜ 油炸或者无酱烤制的食物真的能吃吗？我想点名批评须弥椰炭饼，往人胃里塞干燥剂也不过如此。
- So I'd like to get a firm grasp on how Jade Parcels taste first. ｜ 总之，我还是先弄清「翡玉什锦袋」的味道吧。
- *sigh* If it was at all possible, I would've preferred to leave these people alone, but seeing how things are now, I probably should just accept it and push on. ｜ 唉…如果可能的话，我其实很不情愿占用那几位民众的意识，不过事到如今也不是在意这种事的时候了吧。
- Well, as I'm sure you've discovered, with the rising popularity of Genius Invokation TCG, inviting a friend to a duel in the tavern has become a fun way to pass the time. ｜ #哎呀，自从「七圣召唤」流行，想必{NICKNAME}也发现了，发函邀请朋友前来酒馆对局颇有乐趣。
- What? ｜ 咦？
- We ran into her basically every time the Sabzeruz Festival repeated itself. You could even say we're old enemies by now... ｜ 毕竟那时候几乎每过一次「花神诞日的轮回」，就要见她一次呢，说成是老熟人都不过分了…
- Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Signature Mix</color> by 3.\nMaximum upgrade level is 15. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>最烈特调</color>的技能等级提高3级。\n至多提升至15级。

- I heard through the grapevine that she didn't stick around long after she arrived, and that she was in a particularly good mood when she left... ｜ 听人家说，「女士」大人就来了一趟，然后就离开蒙德城了，据说她心情还不错…
- "Come on, do you really have to redact that nowadays!?" ｜ 「这种内容现在不用擦掉啦！！」
- These are some older Skirmish Boats that we keep on The Alcor as backup. ｜ 这些是我们死兆星号上配置的备用老式游击艇。
- Dear Traveler,\nThe "Never-Ending Battle" event will end soon. Please remember to take part and claim your rewards in time~ ｜ 亲爱的旅行者：\n「无尽骤战」活动玩法即将结束，欢迎旅行者及时参与活动，获取活动奖励~
- A standard pocket watch. Its accuracy is not particularly high. ｜ 制式的怀表，走时精准度并不算高。
- But the next day, the tabloids were full of articles like "Dramatic Exit: Yun Jin Storms Out of Interview" and "Miss La-Dee-Da Opera Star Is Too Good For Our Questions"... ｜ 谁知到了第二天，街头小报上就刊满了我「食言爽约」、「目中无人」的文章。
- If it were me, the answer would be simple. ｜ 要我说的话，答案其实很简单…
- As the curtain closes on the performance, it seems all the conflicts have been resolved...? ｜ 随着演出结束，似乎一切矛盾都得以解决…？
- The true Temple of Silence once came to the rainforest to establish a collaboration with the Akademiya, but as time went by, the sages gradually became corrupt and foolish. ｜ 真正的缄默之殿曾来到雨林与教令院建立合作，但随着时代变更，贤者们一度变得迂腐愚昧。
- Ancient Bulletin ｜ 古老的布告
- If you equip the Treasure-Seeking Seelie from your Inventory, you can summon it when in a treasure area. However, if you are not in a treasure area, or you are inside a treasure area but too far from the treasure, the Treasure-Seeking Seelie will not answer your summons. ｜ 在背包中装备「寻宝仙灵」，就可以在藏宝的区域召唤「寻宝仙灵」了。但如果不在藏宝区域内，或是在区域内，距离埋藏宝藏的地点太远，「寻宝仙灵」也许不会回应召唤。

- Friends you are familiar with live here. ｜ 这里有许多熟悉的朋友。

- Xiao is not here, but... ｜ 魈似乎不在这里。反而是…

- A detailed step-by-step recipe for making Butter Chicken. ｜ 步骤详实的食谱，记载着「黄油鸡」的制作方法。
- Look at this view. What do you think? ｜ 两位觉得这里的风景如何？
- Ugh, this might just be Paimon feeling hungry after all this running about, but now that Bona's found the Tonatiuh and gotten her hands on the Jade of Return, her wish has been fulfilled, right? ｜ 唔，可能是跑了这么半天我都饿了吧。不过这下玻娜找到了天蛇船，也拿到了「回还之玉」，总算是完成心愿了吧。
- However, our family's customers are mostly regulars, so we put most of our focus on those relationships. ｜ 但对我们家来说，客人都是老主顾，抬头不见低头见，人情往来更加重要。
- You can't? Oh well, but this still counts as a way to enter a wind current... ｜ 学不会吗…确实，不过这也是进入风场的一种方法啦…
- Dogs don't live in the water. ｜ 狗不住在水里吧。
- Uh... Furina? ｜ 芙宁娜？

- But either way, Paimon isn't an adeptus! ｜ 不过，派蒙不是仙人啦！

- You're leaving already? *sigh* You still haven't understood the true meaning of a carefree life, I see. ｜ 这就走了？唉，看来还是没领会到悠闲生活的真谛啊。

- I'm a person with high standards, but I don't give up on persistent students. As long as he can still accept criticism, I'll continue to instruct him. ｜ 我是一个有着很高标准的人，但唯独不会放弃执着的学生。只要他还诚心接受批评，我就还愿意指导他。
- Verily! T'was I who organized the building of the Helios with the might of an entire nation behind me, that we might resist the Dragonheirs of the Depths. ｜ 当然！吾当时主持建造赫利俄斯，举全国之力，以此抵御深海龙嗣。
- Hmph! What am I doing here? I'm here to stop you youngsters from running off into the desert, of course! ｜ 哼，干什么？还不是为了拦住你们这些小辈？

- Yes, it's fine. Tell them, I know this is the moment you've been waiting for. ｜ 嗯，没关系，说吧，我知道你其实等这一刻等了很久。

- Redacted Message ｜ 被涂改的留言

- I really wish he had a little more self-confidence. ｜ 希望他可以多一点自信啊。

- Mr. Sasano, you have much longer lines in this scene, so you must memorize them well and not make any mistakes. ｜ 笹野先生，你这一幕的台词比以前长很多，需要牢牢记住，不能出错。
- Or more monsters... ｜ 说不定又会遇见魔物…
- Couldn't you just get those from the seaside? ｜ 在海边取就好了。
- Huh? Don't tell me you've forgotten who I am? Luckily, I still remember you. ｜ 嗯？居然忘记我是谁了么，亏我还记得你。
- Camera has been adjusted to the correct angle ｜ 已经将镜头转至正确角度
- Extra! Extra! The floods caused by the huge, unknown creature have finally subsided, thanks to everyone's united efforts! The disaster has been minimized, and the situation is under control! ｜ 号外，号外！近日，由巨型未知生命体引发的洪灾已经平息，在社会各界的团结下，受灾规模已被降至最低！
- Captain's got quite the eye for people. She said she was sure that your trip to Inazuma would stir up some waves, and sure enough... ｜ 大姐头的眼光果然毒辣，她上次还说，旅行者这趟稻妻之行，一定会搅起无穷风波。
- Freedom. ｜ 自由。
- About Kachina ｜ 关于卡齐娜…
- Domain of Heresy ｜ 邪从之境
- That's Kujou Sara, adopted daughter of the Kujou Clan of the Tenryou Commission. She's also a general in the Shogun's Army. What's she doing here...? ｜ 是九条裟罗，天领奉行九条家的养子，也是幕府军的大将，居然会来这种地方…
- That means you're about to hit the jackpot, Apoxpalon. ｜ 那是你要走好运了，阿布帕隆。
- A grilled crab dish. The crab legs are still cold, and have a raw, salty flavor to them, almost as if one were being force-fed some seawater. ｜ 烤制而成的蟹肉料理。冷硬的蟹腿，带着咸腥味涌入口腔，让人难受得仿佛是呛了一大口海水。
- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Another Day in Mondstadt." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含的旋律为「蒙德的又一日」。
- Uh, what are you doing? Wait, please! Put your sword away. I—I will tell you everything I know! ｜ 你在干嘛…哎等等，您先把刀收起来，我…我什么都说！
- Monthly Resin expired ｜ 连月凝萃已过期
- I am calm! Pick up your blade! ｜ 我很冷静！拿起你的刀！
- Uh... You sure he'd be okay with this? ｜ 呃…这样真的好吗？
- Festering Desire ｜ 腐殖之剑
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- A shot taken from a more proximal position. It can more precisely show the mannerisms of a character, though its ability to elucidate the character's relationship with their environment is limited indeed... ｜ 拍摄距离较近的机位，能较为清晰地呈现角色的动态，不过展现角色和周围环境的关系时，效果有限…
- Hmph, Paimon thinks you're just making it all up to trick us! ｜ 哼，我觉得根本就是你在故弄玄虚，想糊弄我们。
- Big G!? ｜ 狼、狼哥——？！
- The Hero from another world, supported by their companions, shall restore peace to this world... ｜ 异世的勇者与其同伴，会为这个世界重新带来和平…
- How suspicious... ｜ 确实可疑…
- #Much appreciated. Well then, {NICKNAME}, Paimon — prepare! ｜ #那就拜托你了。{NICKNAME}，派蒙，我们快去做准备吧！
- I didn't realize we'd known each other for so long now. Time flies! You know, following you on your journey might just be the most fun I've had in my whole life. I hope it stays that way. ｜ 原来我们已经相遇这么久了。跟你一起旅行，大概是我这辈子遇上的最有趣的事儿了，今后可别让我失望哦。
- "Lil' Rascal" ｜ 「调皮鬼」
- Oh, goodness me. Speaking of befuddled, look at me rambling away to my heart's content and forgetting to serve the tea. ｜ 哎呀，抱歉，糊涂了。自顾自说了这么多，却还没把茶端上来。
- Take a rest or wait until the following day (06:00 – 08:00) ｜ 休息，或是等待至早晨（6时~8时）
- Old home? ｜ 老房子？
- I need to do another examination on you. Same procedure as yesterday. ｜ 我还是要给你做一些检查，顺序和昨天一样。
- Well then, I guess we're lucky we've got a local like me to organize things. Wonderful — the spotlight, at last! I guess I'll be facilitating things from here. ｜ 所以说，你们看吧，主持这件事还得由本地的大老板，也就是我娜维娅来负责啦！这下总可以把目光放在我身上了吧？
- Stanley ｜ 斯坦利
- May I ask what brings you here? ｜ 请问你找我有什么事吗？
- A simple streetlamp made mainly from almost completely unprocessed Ash Wood that can be found in Merusea Village. The head of the wooden branch is bedecked with many fruit from a certain phosphorescent plant.\nAccording to a certain reporter from The Steambird, Merusea Village can be a somewhat darker place than outsider guests are used to due to being underwater. In response, the friendly and gentle Melusines selected branches that resembled hands waving in welcome to create these street lamps, which possess a certain "natural ecological beauty." In truth, however, the Melusines themselves no longer remember the origin of these lamps... ｜ 可见于海沫村内的路灯，结构简单，以几乎不经加工的「白梣木」枝干为主体，枝头挂着多个荧光植物的果实。\n据《蒸汽鸟报》的某位记者所说，由于海沫村位于水下，环境较为昏暗，偶尔到来的旅人并不适应，美露莘们本着热情好客的精神，精心挑选了形似摇手打招呼的树枝，方才有了如今的这款拥有「原生态美感」的海沫村路灯。实际上，美露莘们自己也记不起这种路灯的来历了…

Well, she decided to do just that... by challenging me in the arena, hahaha. Yeah, I definitely didn't see that coming! In the end, she put up quite the fight, and no one underestimated her again. ｜ 我给了她建议，只要大家都知道她是个强者，就不会有那么多人找麻烦了。但我没想到的是，伊安珊沉思片刻，想到的方法竟然是在归火圣夜巡礼的时候和我打一场。哈哈哈，她的实力远超我的预料，这一场也很有效果，再也不会有人瞧不起她了。

- A standard interior wall for the Illusory Annex with a design concept similar to that of a mural. Its simple aesthetics do not lack layers, and bright golden metal adorns it. The wall was initially made with a space for a relief carving to be placed, but it was left blank by the final designer to allow the resident more freedom in decorating their abode... ｜ 「幻景别宫」的标准内墙，运用了制作壁画的设计理念，观感简约而不失层次，并以明亮的金色金属结构作为装饰。墙体上原本预留了嵌入浮雕的空间，不过，为给居住者留下更多自由装饰的余地，最终设计者还是选择了留白…

- No no no, that's too much of a stretch. I cut all my ties with my father a long time ago. He has no control over my life anymore. ｜ 不不不，这也想得太过头了。我和我父亲很久没联系了，我做什么也都和他无关。
- Ah, so that's how it is. Quite the thinker too, this kid. Wanting to become mature... ｜ 原来是这样。这孩子想得倒挺多的。想要变得成熟…

- Food ｜ 食物
- Once every three days, Sucrose ventures out into the real world at dusk. To her, these excursions are rare and momentous events.\nOne by one, she visits the butcher's, the Adventurers' Guild, and the Springvale hunters, looking for a material of a very specific kind.\n"H—Hi... Sorry, I... I'd like, um, the freshest, best-quality b—bones you've got... Yep, the ones with the blood and meat still on."\nPeople found her behavior utterly unusual at first, but once they had gotten used to it, they were eager to oblige, even putting the rarest bones aside for her in advance.\nThis was a major bonus for her. Not only was she able to acquire an ample supply of the usual chicken and boar bones, but she also got her hands on a complete lizard skeleton and even a chunk of hilichurl leg bone still bearing fresh blood.\nHer eyes would light up with excitement at the sight of these strange and rare bones. She would thank Katheryne of the Adventurers' Guild profusely, bowing to her over and over.\nAs well as going some way towards satisfying Sucrose's curiosity, she also found new inspiration from piecing new bones together\nMore importantly, collecting skeletons was her hobby, and she was crazy about it.\nOne day, Sucrose happened to overhear a mother attempting to discipline her child:\n"If you don't do as you're told, the scary old lady with the cloth sack over her back will come to your door, go into your room, pick out every bone from your body, and take them away!"\nSucrose's curiosity compelled her to investigate further. It turned out that this was nothing more than a ghost story used by mothers to shock their children into compliance, and that it had existed long before Sucrose was even born.\nShe breathed a sigh of relief when she found out the truth.\nSoon after this, people noticed that Sucrose had switched her cloth sack for a leather one. Perhaps she did this just because she was shy. Or perhaps it was to avoid arousing suspicion... ｜ 每三天一次，砂糖会在傍晚时分参与社交。对她来说，这是一件难得又隆重的事。\n她会依次造访蒙德城的肉市，冒险家协会，以及清泉镇猎户的家，收集一种特殊材料。\n「你、你好，打…打扰了，那个，我想要…新鲜的，嗯…最好是那种…带血带肉的骨头。」\n起初，大家都认为她的行为奇怪又诡异。但逐渐习惯之后，人们变得慷慨了，还会特地为她预留新奇的骨头。\n这一回，砂糖收获颇丰。除去常见的鸡骨与猪骨，她还拿到一套完整的蜥蜴骨头和一节带血的丘丘人腿骨。\n珍奇的骨头让砂糖兴奋到两眼放光。她向冒险家协会的凯瑟琳不停鞠躬，反复道谢。\n这些新奇的骨骼，不仅能满足砂糖对生物的好奇心，还能在拼装过程中让她产生新灵感。\n更重要的是，收集骨骼本就是砂糖的狂热爱好。\n一次偶然的机会，砂糖不小心听见某位母亲这样管教自家孩子：\n「要是再不听话，就会有很可怕很可怕的老太婆背着麻袋上门，把你的骨头都抽出来带走哦。」\n好奇心驱使砂糖深入调查。原来，这则吓唬孩子的鬼故事在她出生前就已存在了。\n得知这一事实，砂糖偷偷松了口气。\n——跟着，大家注意到，或许是为了避嫌，或许是因为害羞，砂糖把她用了很久的麻袋换成了皮袋。

Touch these stones in the <color=#FFE14BFF>correct order</color>, and special things may occur. Clues as to the exact order to follow can usually be found near these rocks. ｜ 在鹤观，存在这样刻有符文记号的石块。依照「幻影」的说法，似乎是叫「石根文字」。依照<color=#FFE14BFF>正确的顺序</color>去触碰这些石块，似乎会发生各种神奇的现象。而顺序的线索，通常隐藏在这些石块附近。

- That's not a very "tribal warrior" thing to say, Kimosi... Was it you who cleared out all the Abyssal monsters here? ｜ 基莫西，这可不是一个部族战士应该说的话…唔，是你们出手把这里的深渊魔物清除了吗？
- And we have full confidence in the Fortress' future with you at the helm, Your Grace. ｜ 有公爵大人在的话，我们对这里的未来也充满信心。

- I once thought that time was of no consequence to me. ｜ 我曾认为时间对我来说是无用之物。
- This tengu annex dwelling that floats upon the sea like a lonesome boat once played host to the somewhat famous "Yougou Three," and this would later become the cage in which they, having despaired, spent the rest of their days. ｜ 过去曾经如孤舟般漂游在海上的天狗别馆，曾接待过当时小有名气的「影向役者三人众」；后来成了此人灰心之后虚度余生的樊笼，沉入了海下。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Isn't that a good thing? Why's that a pity? ｜ 这不是好事吗。有什么可惜的啦！
- It was after her first Pilgrimage of the Return of the Sacred Flame. Kachina's first Pilgrimage had ended in failure, all the lofty expectations from before having come to nothing. Everyone around her doubted her ability, but more painful still was that she began to find it harder to control her doubts about herself.\nMaybe even the Wayob occasionally got it wrong? Could she really "melt down all that is mean and lowly" like in the poem? Or maybe she was actually the kind of mediocre child who should be melted?\nIt was then that she rediscovered what digging meant to her.\nShe had always loved drilling to the depths of the mountains, seeking out treasures, but this time, she didn't dig with any kind of particular goal. She just carried her drill and bored forward, as though as long as she just kept going, disappointment and sorrow would be unable to bore a hole into her heart, but instead became the drill in her hand, punching a hole into the heart of the mountain.\nShe felt much happier moving forward endlessly through the darkness, where she might still turn up something good, rather than just enduring doubt and defeat. But in the world aboveground, that Pilgrimage would not be erased, and her defeat would march forward alongside time, a stamp Kachina could never rub away. Whether hiding down in the darkness, or standing upright in the sunlight, she was still completely dejected, and if she had to choose, the former was harder to bear. Because there, the word "failure" constantly echoed in her head, and it was far more painful for her than any of the tears and sweat she had shed in her training for the Pilgrimage.\nThe people of Natlan have a saying, that the Children of Echoes are a stubborn lot, and their lives are like the horns on a Tepetlisaur's head, soft yet sharp, and always charging forward. And much like the saying implies, stopping was never an option in Kachina's mind. All she knew was moving onward.\nPerhaps the heavens had decreed she could never become a towering hero, so all she could do was trudge on forward, shifting and testing and trying to take one step, then another.\nOf course, what she didn't understand then is that while thrusting out your chest, holding your head high, and shouting your certainty of victory while charging forward is certainly something people aspire to, setting your jaw, gritting your teeth, and inching forward, bit by bit, one leaden step at a time, is also something truly awesome.\nWhile underground, that was precisely what she was pondering.\nBut at the same time, she would also occasionally dig something interesting up.\nLike her Vision.\nWhen she received a Vision of her own, she was naturally quite happy, but she had already experienced a similar feeling of excitement before, and that was when she had received the Ancient Name "Uthabiti."\nNeither the acknowledgment of an Archon nor of the Wayob meant that she would definitely accomplish some great deed, she had learned at least that much from reality, but what she hadn't learned was:\nWhen the legends of heroes are in their embryonic state, they aren't the least bit noteworthy, nor are the tales very encouraging, being dark and gloomy instead. But all the initial motivation they need to achieve greatness is already present, and as long as the protagonists keep on moving forward, the future will shine brightly for them.\nBut those in the stories can never know the ending beforehand, so as they run forward with everything they have, come what may, the tears they shed are all the more beautiful. ｜ 那是第一次「归火圣夜巡礼」结束后的事。卡齐娜的第一次巡礼以失败告终，赛前的巨大期待落空，她的能力被旁人怀疑，更痛苦的是，她开始难以抑制地怀疑自己。\n说不定大灵也有看错人的时候？自己果真能像诗中所言「熔蚀卑琐」吗？又或者自己才是该被熔蚀的那种平庸小孩吧。\n就是在这时，卡齐娜重新发现了挖掘这件事对她的意义。\n她一直都喜欢钻入山峦深处，寻找那些有价值的事物，但这次，她不再是为某种目标而挖。她顶着钻子一直往前，就好像只要这样下去，失落和悲哀就不会在她的心上钻孔，而是变成她手里的钻子，一路钻进山的心脏。\n她感觉自己可以这样一直在黑暗中前进，有时甚至还会挖到好东西，比忍受怀疑和失败幸福多了。但在地上的世界，那场巡礼不会被抹去，失败随着时间一同前进，是卡齐娜身上抹不掉的戳。无论是躲在黑暗中，还是站在阳光下都很沮丧，一定要相比的话，前者更痛苦。因为失败这两个字一直回荡在脑海中，比为「归火圣夜巡礼」训练而流泪流汗更令人难过。\n纳塔人之间有这么一种说法，回声之子是一群固执的人，他们一生都要像嵴锋龙头顶的角，柔软却尖锐，永远向前撞。就像这句话说的那样，卡齐娜的脑海中似乎没有停滞不前的选项，她只懂得前进。\n或许天注定自己无法成为高大伟岸的英雄，只能以缓慢的脚步一次又一次尝试挪动着前行吧。\n当然她还不理解的是，挺胸抬头、高喊着必胜向前冲固然是令人向往的姿态，绷紧面孔、咬起牙关迈着沉重的步伐一点点挪动也是了不起的姿态。\n在地下的那些时间里，她在想的就是这样的事。\n与此同时，她时不时会挖到一些有趣的东西。\n比如神之眼。\n得到属于自己的神之眼时，她当然是喜悦的，不过类似的激动她已经历过一次，就在得到「乌沙博蒂」这个古名的时候。\n神明或者大灵的认可不代表她一定会成就什么宏伟的事业，这一点她已经从现实中学到了，不过她还没有学到的是：\n在英雄们的传说初具雏形的阶段，它毫不起眼，颜色晦暗，更不用提激励人心，不过成就伟大所需的原初动力已经蓄满，只要主角们继续前行，未来将为他们而闪烁。\n但故事里的人永远不会提前知道结局，所以他们不计前途、奋力奔跑时的眼泪最美丽。
- (Cazcal takes over before things deteriorate any further. After another stint of careful grooming, he finally manages to finish trimming Hora's claws...) ｜ （卡兹加及时接手了工作。在又一阵细致的打理后，终于还是为霍莱修剪了指甲…）

- A promotional poster from the "Daiya's Three-Day Reverie" attraction in the Veluriyam Mirage, depicting the central ideas and themes behind "Petrifying Gaze." The main image shows a sinister castle illuminated only by moonlight. From the towering trees beside the castle, perhaps the ghosts were originally intended to be related to demonic trees. But as owls also roost in said trees, perhaps their final choice of antagonist was a good one. ｜ 来自「琉形蜃境」游乐项目「黛依阿的三日遐想」的剧目海报，描绘了剧目「瞳孔里的固形魔咒」的大致意境。画面主体是月夜之下气氛阴森的古堡。从盘踞古堡的巨型树木可以看出，或许最初的设想中，剧目中的「幽魂」与森林中的树妖有关。不过考虑到枭族也居住在森林中的树上，最终的成品似乎也没什么问题…
- Well, it's gotten quite late, hasn't it? ｜ 不知不觉天都这么黑了。

- Receiving a Gift: I ｜ 收到赠礼·其一
- After Charlotte's extraordinary photography skills had made her famous, she began receiving frequent visits from manuscript writers, magazine editors, news clipping collectors, and her father's reporter colleagues. Even Euphrasie, the Editor-in-Chief of The Steambird, was amongst them.\nEuphrasie was straightforward about her intent. She hoped that Charlotte would agree to become a "special correspondent" — someone who would conduct interviews and write articles in addition to taking photographs.\n...However, her father, despite his usual mild temperament, was strongly against it. He did not wish for his daughter to associate with those kinds of people, either full of ulterior motives or hypocrites.\n"Nature is fierce, but it is honest. Storms don't loose their fury without reason, nor do beasts bare their fangs without cause."\n"But people lie — they always do. A Kamera can only capture their faces, but the lens cannot target their hearts."\nHe would respect Charlotte's decision, of course, but he preferred that Charlotte live a simpler, happier life, without sinking into the morass of humanity.\nTo Charlotte, this world was a treasure trove, and pictures her treasure maps.\nBut for the first time, she came to realize that this trove still harbored undiscovered "truths."\nThese truths were not themselves treasures, but were more akin to a procession of dark memories. Intentionally hidden, discarded, disguised, and then abandoned, with those having done so wishing that they would never be discovered, and that all events connected to them would simply end right there.\nCharlotte knew that she could find them. She could dig up these truths, like digging tulip bulbs in a garden, like leading hermit crabs out of their shells, like finding pinecones hidden by squirrels.\n...But she also felt like a bird glimpsing an onrushing flash flood, a cave rat foreseeing an earthquake, or a fish sensing a coming tsunami.\nWith great ability comes great responsibility.\nOne with the talent for uncovering "truth" was also responsible for bringing the "truth" to light.\nThe only question was, did she have the courage to do so?\nHer parents responded with silence, for they knew that their daughter had already made her choice. Charlotte was old enough, and all birds are destined to spread their wings and leave the nest someday.\nThe next morning, Euphrasie went to work as usual, and there, waiting for her at the entrance to The Steambird, she saw Charlotte, ready with her Kamera and notepad.\n"Welcome to The Steambird, Charlotte."\nEuphrasie extended a hand.\n"I believe the next La Verite Prize is yours to win." ｜ 当夏洛蒂以自己出类拔萃的留影技术闻名后，约稿人、杂志编辑，剪报收藏家和父亲的记者同行便常常来访，同样登门拜访的，还有《蒸汽鸟报》主编欧芙小姐。\n欧芙小姐直截了当地表达了自己的来意——她希望夏洛蒂成为一名「专务记者」。在留影的同时，还负责进行专人采访与撰稿事宜。\n…但是，一向好脾气的父亲却态度坚决地反对夏洛蒂去做「专务记者」，他不希望自己的女儿去与那些或心怀鬼胎，或口是心非的人打交道。\n「大自然是凶险的，但它也是诚实的。暴雨不会无故落下，猛兽也不会无故露出獠牙。」\n「但人会说谎，人们总是说谎。留影机只能拍到人的面容，镜头却无法对准他们的心。」\n父亲会支持夏洛蒂的选择，但他更希望夏洛蒂能够过上简单且幸福的生活，万勿踏入人性的泥沼。\n这个世界对夏洛蒂来说，是一片藏宝地，那些记录着宝藏线索的画片，即是夏洛蒂的藏宝图。\n但她第一次发觉，在这片藏宝地的背面，还萦绕着无数尚未被发掘的「真相」。\n这些「真相」并非「宝藏」，而是一个又一个幽暗的遗念。它们被人刻意掩饰、丢弃、伪装，尔后抛掷到此，期望着永远不会被人发现，也期望着那些与其勾连的事物就此终结。\n夏洛蒂知道，自己能够发掘它们，能够挖出所有真相！就像是掘出花园里郁金香的球根，引出贝壳里的寄居蟹，找见被松鼠藏着的松果。\n…也像飞鸟眺见山洪爆发，穴鼠预感地震将临，鱼儿感到海啸已至。\n她有天赋，即有责任。\n有能力发掘出「真相」之人，也有义务将「真相」昭示于世。\n唯一的问题是，夏洛蒂是否有「勇气」？\n父亲和母亲用沉默做出了回答，因为他们知道，自己的女儿已经有了决定。夏洛蒂已然长大，就像飞鸟离巢，即将自展羽翼。\n次日清晨。欧芙小姐按时上班，在《蒸汽鸟报》报社的门口，她看见了捧着留影机和笔记本，做好了一切准备的夏洛蒂。\n「欢迎，夏洛蒂小姐。」\n欧芙小姐伸出手说道：\n「我相信，下一届拉维尔奖，非你莫属。」

- A part of the "Millennial Movement" that wanders amidst the winds. Increases ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>24%</color>, and when Normal or Charged Attacks hit opponents, the character gains a Sigil of Whispers. This effect can be triggered once every 0.3s. When you possess 4 Sigils of Whispers, all of them will be consumed and all nearby party members will obtain the "Millennial Movement: Banner-Hymn" effect for 12s. "Millennial Movement: Banner-Hymn" increases Normal ATK SPD by <color=#99FFFFFF>18%</color> and increases ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color>. Once this effect is triggered, you will not gain Sigils of Whispers for 20s. Of the many effects of the "Millennial Movement," buffs of the same type will not stack. ｜ 飘游风中的「千年的大乐章」的一部分。攻击力提高<color=#99FFFFFF>24%</color>；普通攻击或重击命中敌人时，角色获得一枚低语之符，每0.3秒内至多触发一次。拥有4枚低语之符时，将消耗所有低语之符，使附近的队伍中所有角色获得持续12秒的「千年的大乐章·揭旗之歌」效果：普通攻击速度提高<color=#99FFFFFF>18%</color>，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color>。触发后20秒内，无法再次获得低语之符。「千年的大乐章」触发的多种数值效果中，同类数值效果不可叠加。

- A shrub with azure leaves spreading out like fireworks. The two white flowers at its center give off a most welcome fragrance, and it is said that when those who have had their fill of strong wine smell it, they shall be reminded of the forest in summer and the cool night wind. And as for those who do so after enjoying some tea, they will think of the outer wilds in early spring, filled with vitality. ｜ 水色叶片如焰火般绽放的灌木，中心位置的两朵白花香气宜人，传说畅饮烈酒后的人闻到它的花香，会想起夏日的森林与清凉的夜风，品茶后的人轻嗅两口，则会联想到早春的原野与「盎然的生机」。

### Part 038

- Naganohara's fireworks are loved by all, and work in the shop is always in full swing. As such, people often feel that coming up to the door without important matters might hinder the work.\nHowever, it's just the opposite with Yoimiya, for chatting is her other great hobby. In fact, if there's no one to talk to, she might actually find it hard to focus.\nIf chatting with the guest is her way of "understanding their mood and way of thinking, such that the best fireworks can be crafted," then going with the flow and sitting down for tea and an idle chat with them after delivering the goods is how Yoimiya rewards herself. Sometimes, if that is not enough, she will make some small-talk with her neighbors on the way, give them some small trinkets, and receive a basket of small treats in return...\nYoimiya is always able to strike a balance between listening and speaking in such chats.\nShe doesn't repeat herself, doesn't cross boundaries, doesn't come off as indifferent or overly invested. After a talk over tea, everyone leaves in a good mood.\nHer neighbors are all ordinary folk, and their lives are not exactly full of extraordinary things. Sometimes, the same news will be told by different people over and over, but Yoimiya does not find this upsetting.\nWhat she enjoys is the process of talking to others — even if they speak of the same matter, different people will have different viewpoints.\nAfter taking over the fireworks shop, Yoimiya's relationships with her neighbors became still more harmonious. Many old folks have taken her for an old acquaintance, and often invite her to their place to sit and recount the festivals of yesteryear. Middle-aged parents will ask Yoimiya to mediate the relationship between themselves and their children and will regale her with the little trivialities of daily family life. The young people treat Yoimiya as a sibling of sorts, volunteering to help her cart heavy fireworks-making materials around, hoping that Yoimiya will get off work faster and take the children out to play.\nYoimiya puts it this way: "I believe in the unique power of language. There's nothing that can't be talked through somehow!" ｜ 「长野原」的烟花备受欢迎，烟花店内总是热火朝天。因此，人们总是觉得，无事登门想必会打扰店主工作。\n不过宵宫的情况恰恰相反。与人聊天是她另一大爱好。要是工作时没人陪她说话，她反而难以集中注意力。\n如果说与上门的顾客促膝长谈是为了「了解顾客的心境与想法，以便制作出最好的烟花」，那为顾客送货上门之后顺势喝茶闲聊，就完全是宵宫对自己的犒劳了。有时仍不尽兴，她还会在归来途中和街坊邻居们热切交流，送上小小的纪念品，并收获一筐零食…\n宵宫与人聊天，总能在倾听和表达之间找到完美的平衡点。\n不赘述，不越界，不冷淡，亦不过分纠缠。一场茶话会后，大家留下的往往都是好心情。\n街坊邻居都是些普通人，生活中并无太多趣事。有时，同一则消息会被不同人翻来覆去地讲述，但宵宫完全不反感这件事。\n她所享受的是和别人交流的过程——即便是同样的事，不同的人也会有完全不同的看法。\n接管烟花店后，宵宫跟街坊的关系愈发融洽。不少老人视宵宫为忘年之交，常邀请宵宫来家中坐坐，聊起多年前的庆典盛况；已至中年的父母辈会拜托宵宫调解自己与孩子的关系，和宵宫唠唠柴米油盐的家常；青年们则与宵宫称兄道弟，自发帮宵宫搬运沉重的烟花原材料，希望宵宫能提前下班，早点带街上的孩子们出去玩。\n「我相信语言有它独特的力量，没有什么是说出来还解决不了的！」宵宫如是说。

- "I'm sure you know the scene in most novels in which the protagonist, never having seen the world before, suddenly steps into a prosperous city and starts gawking in shock at the strange new architecture that surrounds them."\n"I'm not exactly from the boonies, but I was deeply moved by the sight of the giant waterfalls and Romaritime Harbor itself nonetheless."\n"The third volume that this commissioner has written covers the life the protagonist leads after arriving in the big city. When they first saw the place, they made a gesture to pump themselves up. I'd hazard a guess that Romaritime Harbor, atop that waterfall, would make for a perfect cover image..." ｜ 「小说中经常会有那种情节吧——没见过世面的主角突然来到了繁华的大都市，在惊叹中仰望新奇的建筑。」\n「虽然我也不算是没见过世面的乡下人，但第一次看见巨大的瀑布和海露港时，还是被深深震撼了。」\n「这位委托人的第三卷小说就写了主角来到大城市后的生活，初见大城市时，主角还做出了鼓舞自己的动作，我觉得，瀑布之上的海露港正是最佳的封面场景…」

- Draws inspiration from the layout of the military buildings and furnishings of the Kujou Encampment. \nDuring the conflict between the Shogun's Army and the resistance, both sides have sought various ways to improve the quality of their new recruits upon joining their respective armies. Compared with traditional training sites, this type of training ground not only provides all kinds of equipment, it also can simulate the urgency of being on the frontline, giving an experience that is very close to the real thing. Naturally, this allows the new recruits to get a sufficient amount of training. ｜ 参照「九条阵屋」的布局所筑的演兵场，建筑和陈设均采用军中现行的形制。\n在幕府军与反抗军的交锋过程中，双方不断采用各种方法，提高新兵入阵时的素养。相较于传统的训练场所，这种演兵场既能提供各式装备，又可模拟驻扎前线时的紧急情形，贴近实战情景，自然能让受训者得到充分的锻炼。

- I haven't written any papers myself, but I think you need to have a bunch of them approved by the review board before entering the Akademiya. You also need a detailed and objective experiment record. ｜ 虽然我没有写过，但是我知道，想要加入教令院的话，需要有足够多被评审机构认可的论文，并且还需要有详细客观的实验记录。

- Anyway, let us bring you up to speed... ｜ 总之，事情是这样的…
- On the Trail of Behemoths ｜ 凶魁巨怪觇候录
- Compact assistance meka developed to increase the overall utilization rates of meka teams, providing aid for underwater projects. They were originally designed to remove junk, vegetation, and other underwater debris in order to prevent these from clogging up the vital parts of other clockwork meka, thereby minimizing failure rates. From another point of view, they are undoubtedly benefiting Fontaine's ecosystem greatly as underwater cleaners.\nEquipped with high-sensitivity sensors, the meka can efficiently "nose out" target items through smells as well as detect the optical characteristics of underwater junk. As a result, they can be attracted by certain types of bait and are occasionally caught by anglers, who refer to them as "Water Maintenance Fish" or "Iron Fish."\nCompared to the mass-deployed "Initial Configuration" model, the "Water Body Cleaner" model is more mature and coated with erosion-resistant material. The researchers responsible for this project introduced periodic callback and maintenance instead of just leaving them on their own after release. They would send out homing signals through flashing of a certain frequency in order to retrieve the meka, which they would then release again following maintenance and examination. Over time, certain individuals began to use this flashing method as a type of "bait" to catch these meka, and it is now widely known among the angling community. ｜ 为了辅助水下活动的发条机关，提升机队总出勤率而开发的紧凑型辅助机关。最初的设计目的是清除水下的垃圾、植物残渣等杂物，避免它们吸附在发条机关关键部位，从而尽可能降低发条机关的故障率。从另一种角度看，它们无疑也扮演着「水下清洁工」的角色，对枫丹的生态环境有益。\n这种机关搭载了灵敏的传感器，能有效用「嗅觉」寻获目标物，或是发现水下垃圾的光学特征。因此，有时它们也会被一些鱼饵吸引。钓上了这种机关的鱼师则将它们称为「水域维护鱼」或「铁鱼」。\n相比于大量铺货的「初始能力型」，这一更为成熟的量产型号「水域清理者」的表面刷有耐腐蚀能力极强的涂层，而且，该项目的研究员，不再采用一次性投放，投放后不理的运行方案，而是为其引入了周期性回收维护的设计——研究员们会用特定频率的闪光向维护机关的传感器发送归航信号，将它们回收，适当修理与检查，再放回水中继续工作。这种特定频率的闪光后来则演变成一种专门针对维护机关族群的鱼饵，通过不明渠道，在普通鱼师的群体中流传了开来。

Anyway, I'm an adult and generous to boot, so I decided to help as much as I could. ｜ 还说什么等鹰羽派回到原来的位置到时一定加倍还我，哎，该说他是死脑筋呢还是…不过我大人大量，还是能帮尽量帮。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nPeople pass to and fro beneath the Stone Gate, and the scent of Dandelion Wine drifts in the air alongside laughter and cheer. The wending water and wafting winds greet the start of a poetic adventure with friends.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20, and complete the Archon Quest "Song of the Dragon and Freedom." (Complete the Archon Quest "A New Star Approaches" to get the best experience from this event.)\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nThis event has three mini-games:\n\n1. Hundred-Pace Hurling Rites\nThrow Darts at Holding Pots and use the special traits of different Pots to obtain as high a score as possible.\n\n2. Inspiration Eruption\nDefeat opponents and obtain Inspiring Crystals, and then use the Crystals' rupture to defeat the pesky Mythic Nexuses blocking the flow of inspiration.\n\n3. Mending Painting Prospects\nHelp an art conservator visit various areas and take pictures of key objects, and appreciate the composition of various artworks in the process. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n石门之下人来人往，蒲公英酒的香气与人们的欢声笑语飘荡在空中。循着流水与清风，开启一段和朋友们的诗歌之旅。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20，并完成以下前置任务：魔神任务「巨龙与自由之歌」。（完成魔神任务「迫近的客星」后体验更佳。）\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n本次活动有3个游艺内容：\n\n一·「百步礼掷」\n用「掷箭」投向「容壶」，利用不同「容壶」的特性，尽可能获得更高的积分。\n\n二·「灵感喷激」\n打倒敌人，取得「灵感结晶」，并在一定时间后通过「灵感结晶」的迸发伤害击倒阻碍灵感流动的「迷思源结」。\n\n三·「寻景觅画」\n帮助画作修复师去各个地区摄取关键景物，并在摄景过程中感受各个画作的成画过程吧。
- You must mean Xavier. He already approached me, and he and I had a conversation. ｜ 是说泽维尔吧，之前他来找过了我，我和他也谈过了。

- When you look back on your journey, this is one of the first scenes that pops into your head. Come snap a picture of it. ｜ 回顾过去的旅程时，这里是前几个跳进脑海的场景之一，来给它留下影像吧。
- Leave Event Zone ｜ 离开事件区域
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Khedive and Anisa kept talking about "Purbiruni" this and "Pursina" that...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Why do all these words have "pur" at the front?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Well, "Pur" means "descendant," and also "student"... So in this case, they're referring to themselves as the children and students of the great sages of old.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Huh, so that's what it means... From the way they were throwing these words around, Paimon was sure it'd be something to be proud of.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Wait... But isn't it?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Well, Paimon for one would much rather be known as the founding father than have a name that basically says "So-and-so's my daddy." Pretty embarrassing, don't you think?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Um... I have to admit, I've never thought about it like that... ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>唔…先前听海迪夫和阿妮萨他们提到过，什么「普尔比鲁尼」一门、「普尔希娜」一门的…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>那些…普尔这、普尔那的，都是什么呀？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>「普尔」是「后嗣」的意思，也是「学徒」的意思…所以这个就是说，他们都是古代大贤者的徒子徒孙。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>原来是这样呀…看他们炫耀来炫耀去的，我还以为是什么值得骄傲的称呼呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>欸…？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>拿我来说吧，有人说我是谁的爸爸或者妈妈，我才会开心！但随便认别人是我的爸爸妈妈…不会很尴尬吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>唔…从没想过这种问题…
- Reset Requirements ｜ 清空条件

Choose between 2 diverging paths:\nElectro-Charged: <color=#b863ee>Extreme Multicore</color>: While Electrosurge is active, create 1 extra <color=#b863ee>Driftthunder Blitzcore</color>.\nElectro-Charged: <color=#b863ee>Extreme Beam</color>: Changes how <color=#b863ee>Driftthunder Blitzcores</color> attack: Instead of firing 3 Electro bullets, a <color=#b863ee>Supercharged Beam</color> will be fired, dealing <color=#f39001>greater</color> Electro DMG in an AoE. ｜ 强化感电祝福至<color=#f39001>最高等级</color>，可选择以下两种分支：\n感电·<color=#b863ee>极限多核</color>：电涌效果持续期间，将额外生成1枚<color=#b863ee>浮雷攻核</color>；\n感电·<color=#b863ee>极限射束</color>：改变<color=#b863ee>浮雷攻核</color>的攻击形式：从3枚雷弹变成<color=#b863ee>蓄雷射束</color>，造成<color=#f39001>伤害更高</color>的雷元素范围伤害。

- A tally will be kept for the active character when they deal a CRIT Hit to an opponent. When the tally reaches <color=#f39001>{0}</color>, the count will be reset and an elemental shockwave will be unleashed at the opponent's position, randomly dealing AoE Pyro, Hydro, Electro, or Cryo DMG. This effect can be triggered up to once every <color=#f39001>{1}</color>s, and the count will be cleared when the character leaves the field ｜ 当前场上的角色对敌人造成暴击时，将为该角色进行计数，计数达到<color=#f39001>{0}</color>点时将清空计数，在敌人的位置释放元素冲击波，随机造成火/水/雷/冰元素范围伤害，此效果每<color=#f39001>{1}</color>秒至多触发一次，角色退场时将移除计数

- A key found in the Golden Apple Archipelago, seemingly able to open a lock somewhere... ｜ 在金苹果群岛找到的钥匙，似乎可以用来打开某处的锁…
- It's a berry that's been digested by a Dendro Slime. From the outside, it appears the same as any other ordinary berry. Will using it for herbal medicine really have any effect? ｜ 被草史莱姆吞下过肚子的树莓，外表看起来…似乎和平常的树莓没什么区别。用这个入药，真的能治病吗？
- Really? Thank you for the compliment. I'm quite fond of it myself — inherited it from my grandmother, in fact. ｜ 是吗？多谢夸赞！这是我从祖母那里继承来的称号，我非常喜欢！
- Could you not give me a few more days to consider? This matter has been delayed for so long already... ｜ 就不能再搁置几天吗？反正都已经搁置那么久了。
- As the Archon, she can't tell us everything, but it seemed like she wasn't holding anything back this time. ｜ 虽然我感觉玛薇卡身为神明，做不到知无不言，但至少这件事，她应该没有保留吧。
- I'm sorry it took me so long to finish them... ｜ 承诺了这么久才做好，真的不好意思…
- Huh, fair enough, that makes sense... ｜ 好像很有道理…
- An inconvenience? We were in such a jam! You saved us! ｜ 怎么会是麻烦呢？我们正在「卡关」呢，还好你来了！

- But if you wanted me to take the selection exam... Heh, I doubt I'd pass even the first round of the written test. ｜ 真要让我参加教令院选拔考试的话…我想想，啊，恐怕第一轮笔试就过不了关。

- Activate the energy storage device by the door. ｜ 激活门边的储能装置。
- The boss of Wanmin Restaurant recounts the tales of adventure that his customers once discussed as they dined in his restaurant. These tales serve as the perfect beginning for an Adventure Challenge... ｜ 「万民堂」的老板叙说之前食客在饭馆吃饭聊天时作为谈资的冒险经历，以此作为冒险挑战的故事开场…
- After Paimon and Tubby discussed your experiences in Chenyu Vale, the latter combined the descriptions she heard with her own imagination to create the green stones that form this marvelously patterned platform.\nThough it may appear solid and stable, and indeed, seem oddly wide, the moss that carpets its surface makes said surface quite slippery indeed. As such, take care as you walk atop it. ｜ 派蒙与阿圆聊到沉玉谷的见闻后，阿圆结合了派蒙的描述与自己的遐想，构筑了这种具有奇妙花纹平台的青石。\n虽然这种青石的外表敦厚稳重，平台也看似宽阔异常，但由于其上生长了大量的青苔，使得表面变得滑腻不稳。故此，在平台上行走时还需格外小心。
- Complete Stage 7 while losing less than 15 Terminus Integrity ｜ 完成第7关「棋阵」，且「棋阵」阵枢损失的「完整值」少于15
- Pretty Finchball: A Finchball with an exquisite appearance. Like some manner of performer, it can attract other Finchballs...\nAfter this ball is launched, it will <color=#F39000FF>attract</color> other Finchballs in a set radius around itself to the position where it first stops moving. ｜ 华丽雀雀球:外表华丽，如同表演者的雀雀球，似乎能够吸引其他雀雀球…\n投出该球后，该球首次停止移动时，能够<color=#F39000FF>吸引自身周围一定范围内的</color>其他雀雀球。
- But isn't he your teacher? What would a teacher have to hide from his students? ｜ 阿贝多不是你们的老师吗？老师能有什么事瞒着学生呀。
- Bahahahaha... ｜ 哈哈哈哈哈哈——
- Use the Fonta-flavored jellies. ｜ 投喂「枫达味妙妙琼脂」。
- Oh, good, very good. All thanks to your advice, Miss Yanfei. What brings you here today? ｜ 很好很好，还是多亏了烟绯小姐啊，多谢您上次帮忙，您今天来是有什么事吗？
- Anyway, I won't hold you up any longer. He should be on the roof. I've still got to... Ouch, my leg... Those stupid meka... ｜ 总之，我就不耽误您的时间了。纳克先生就在楼顶，我还得…哎哟，我的腿…那群倒霉的傻瓜机关…
- A timepiece kept by the hero who conquered thunder and lightning. The tiny shards of Electro crystal within flow back and forth with the passing of time. ｜ 镇服雷电的勇士持有的时计，其中的雷之碎晶随流逝如雷如电的时间泻落。

- Perhaps it'd be more effective for us to split up. ｜ 我觉得，或许我们分头找会更有效率。
- I knew your past would come back to bite us... ｜ 我就知道，你们过去那些纠葛，迟早要害死我们…
- Hah, next thing you know you'll have forgotten how to sing, much less notate a score. You still remember why we call you Stream, don't you? ｜ 哦，得了吧，再这么下去，别说记谱了，我看你连怎么唱歌都要忘了。你总记得大家为什么叫你溪泉吧？
- An ancient dish, long recorded throughout history. Alas, there's no time to worry about such matters, as the gamey mutton and rank fish vie for dominance within your mouth. Your poor taste buds sure could use an eternity of rinsing after that. ｜ 记载于手记上的古老菜肴。羊肉的膻味与鱼肉的腥气各自为营，猝不及防地在口腔中胡乱冲撞，现在已无暇顾虑他事，只得不停漱口以缓和味蕾受到的冲击。
- Whenever the instructor wore this brooch, it meant there would be no training sessions that day. ｜ 教官的胸口别着这种花的时候，意味着今日不练兵。
- And if you're wondering how I would know that — well, it's because Granny told me. If you want to know more, you should probably ask her when she gets back. ｜ 我怎么知道的？是奶奶说的啦，要是你想了解更多，还是等奶奶来了问她比较好。

- But if anything happens, the few of us here may not be able to help you. ｜ 但万一出了事情，我们几个可不一定救得了你。
- Rosaria may not be one to attend prayer meetings, but that does not mean she doesn't have her own theological viewpoints.\nIn her view, freedom is the spiritual pillar of Mondstadt's people, and it is the very thing that caused her to end up here in the first place.\nRosaria was born in a remote mountain village, but was taken from her home shortly after birth by the very same bandits who drenched it in blood.\nRaised by those crooks, she learned how to fight, sometimes thieving, other times doing odd jobs for the crew.\nShe was their servant, but also their tool, a crook, yet still a child.\nShe fought against outsiders and her comrades alike, and growing up was a constant battle for survival against the hunger and cold.\nRosaria's youth was just like Mondstadt's sunset — blood-red from horizon to horizon, and so fleeting that night had fallen before she'd had the chance to stop and take in the view.\nUltimately, the bandit crew was wiped out by the Knights of Favonius. As their youngest member, Rosaria was judged to have a chance of rehabilitation.\nGrand Master Varka brought her to Mondstadt. Sincerely hoping that she might someday fit in here, he advised her:\n"Go to the Cathedral and be cleansed by the light of our archon. You still have the chance to turn your fate around and live a normal life."\nBut Varka had not counted on Rosaria constantly skipping classes and dodging hymnal.\nShe would rather hunt in the wild than settle into a life of dutiful service as a sister. As far as she was concerned, the golden sunlight was not so much cleansing as blinding.\nFor Rosaria had long since come to understand that she was a child of the moonlight, and it was inevitable that she would someday return to the embrace of darkness. ｜ 即便是完全不做祷告的罗莎莉亚也对神学有着独特见解。\n依她所见，自由是蒙德人的精神支柱，而促成她在此落脚的，正是这份自由。\n罗莎莉亚诞生在一座偏僻山村，出生后不久就被一伙血洗该村庄的盗贼团劫走。\n被盗贼抚养长大的她自幼便学习战斗技巧，一边当着盗贼，一边干着团里的杂活。\n既是奴仆，又是机器；既是盗贼，又是孩子。\n与外人战斗，也与同伴战斗；在饥寒中挣扎，在竞争中长大。\n罗莎莉亚的青春时代，正如同蒙德的夕阳——目所能及均是血色，抬起头来才发觉时光已晚。\n这伙盗贼团，于数年后被西风骑士团剿灭。身为最年轻的成员，罗莎莉亚被认为还有悔过的余地。\n骑士团长法尔伽带她来到蒙德。他衷心祝愿罗莎莉亚能融入蒙德，告诫她道：\n「去教会，在神的光辉下洗净自己。你可以重新来过，像普通人一样生活。」\n可法尔伽没有料到，罗莎莉亚屡屡逃课，无故旷掉唱诗班工作。\n宁可在野外打猎也不愿做个安分的修女。对她来说，金色阳光才是刺眼之物。\n而罗莎莉亚早在许多年前就已明白：她是月亮的孩子，迟早会回归到黑暗中去。

- I guess that's all we can do. ｜ 也只能这样了，继续调查吧。

- Sounds just like one of Cheven's schemes... ｜ 肯定是夏温小姐的妙计…

- "Wow! This author's a famous folklore novelist. He's created many stories based on Inazuma's folktales."\n"While other authors have been trying new themes and styles lately, he still gathers inspiration the old way and sticks to the most traditional writing methods."\n"But Mr. Kuroda says that his novels' sales numbers have been going down. I wonder if people have lost interest in traditional novels, or if other stories are just way more attractive..."\n"His novel this time tells a story of people who have been spirited away. I heard that he's added quite a lot of popular elements, too. For instance, his protagonists are teenage students, and the villains are based on monsters from Inazuman myths. He's even given the book a long-winded name, too..."\n"Anyway, I do hope his novel becomes a huge hit." ｜ 「喔！这位老师可是一位很有名的民俗小说作家。他之前写了好多以稻妻本土传说为背景的小说呢。」\n「即使最近小说的题材和写法都越来越新颖，他却还是一直坚持用最传统的方法来取材和写作。」\n「但据黑田先生说，这位老师的小说销量正在不断下滑。也不知道是大家都不喜欢读这种传统小说了，还是其他的小说太具有吸引力…」\n「这次他的小说题材是神隐，据说还大胆地采用了很多流行的元素，比如把小说主角设计为正在上学的少年和少女啦，用稻妻的各种传统神话中的怪异之物作为反派啦，就连小说名字都长了好多…」\n「无论如何，希望这位老师的小说能够大卖啊。」

- In short, if we only knew what exactly was going on with the Mikage Furnace, I'd likely be able to formulate a repair plan. But we'd still need a review panel to approve it... ｜ 总之，只要能知道「御影炉心」里到底发生了什么，我说不定就能制订修复方案…不过没有评议小组进行决议…

- After using this stage's Adventure Technique, <color=#ffcc33>gain all the following effects at the same time</color>: \n1. <color=#ffcc33>Turn all the incoming fire on the field from the mechanisms into Labyrinth COins</color>.\n2. <color=#ffcc33>Your character's movement speed will be increased, their movement will not consume Stamina, and they will become invincible</color> for 10s.\n3. Your character gains an <color=#ffcc33>Auto-Attack Aura</color>, which will automatically attack all targets within range once every 2s for 10s. ｜ 施放本关卡的冒险特技后，<color=#ffcc33>同时获得以下全部效果</color>：\n1.<color=#ffcc33>场上的机关弹幕将转化为迷宫币</color>。\n2.<color=#ffcc33>角色的移动速度提升，角色行动不再消耗体力，并进入无敌状态</color>，持续10秒。\n3.角色获得<color=#ffcc33>自动攻击领域</color>，每2秒对范围内的所有目标进行一次攻击，持续10秒。。

- This street lamp has a small ceiling, and while its workmanship can seem quite rough, it provides excellent and continuous lighting through the wind and rain. Its structure is more practical than pretty, and when its tenon pin is removed, its top half can be rotated longitudinally, allowing artisans to replace the mounted lantern without using a ladder or some kind of stepping stone. ｜ 设有小巧顶棚的路灯，做工粗糙，但能在风吹雨淋中持续提供照明。结构较为实用，松开榫销后，路灯的上半部分可纵向旋转，工匠们无需架设梯子或垫脚踏板，即可为其更换灯笼。
- Looks kind of familiar... ｜ 好像有点眼熟…
- I've known him longer than you have, and I know he doesn't take reckless risks. ｜ 而且，我和他认识的时间比你和他都要长，我知道他不会随随便便冒险。
- Are you sure? I feel bad... ｜ 那有点过意不去。
- Last week's snacks, last month's toy... What else aren't you telling me? ｜ 上周的点心，上个月的玩具…你们还有多少事是我不知道的？

- I have some pressing business to attend to. ｜ 还有别的急事

- "Oh? You wish to duel me, little one? Well, I hope you've brought your best deck with you..."\nHint: Yae Miko's deck contains many Artifact Cards, and she can also create large numbers of Summons. This allows her to constantly build momentum and control the duel as the match progresses. ｜ 「啊呀，小家伙要来和我玩一局吗？那可得准备好你最强的牌组哦…」\n【提示】八重神子的牌组包含了大量「圣遗物」卡牌，并且能够大量召唤「召唤物」，在对局过程中不断地积累优势。
- A magnificent model horn, meticulously crafted to replicate the grand metal horns used in the Collective of Plenty.\nIt is said that when this horn is blown, it produces a sound both powerful and awe-inspiring. Perhaps due to its commanding presence, it has become a symbol of honor bestowed upon wrestling champions. Its mighty bellow, reverberating throughout the tribe, praises the victor's strength, they who are as mighty as the Tatankasaurs. ｜ 气势磅礴的号角模型，一比一复刻了「沃陆之邦」所用的金属号角。据说这种号角被吹响时的声音，气势磅礴，极具力量感。据说，也正是因为其独特的声响，这种号角声常被用作赠予摔角冠军的荣誉，在整个部族吹响，意为赞美这位冠军如突角龙般健壮。
- Your noble, pure self... It waits for you on a far shore without Mora. That is your truest essence, Paimon! ｜ 你那高洁的、纯净的自我…正在一片没有摩拉的彼方守望！那正是你的本质，派蒙！

- So no matter how much you jump and dance, or bump and prance, you won't get hurt none! Fun and safety, all in one! ｜ 所以不管你们怎么碰，都不会受伤，又好玩又安全！

- The origins of this Branch Master of the Adventurers' Guild are shrouded in mystery, yet she keeps looking for clues about the sword, constantly challenging powerful enemies along the way... ｜ 不知身世的冒险家协会分会长，不断寻找着有关「剑」的线索，不停向沿途的强敌发起挑战…

- It was so warm that it felt like I had returned to the start of my life, and I didn't want to wake up anymore. ｜ 温暖到感觉自己回到了生命的原初状态，再也不愿意醒来。
- What happens to the crew members who have had limbs amputated? ｜ 那些截肢的船员后来怎么了？

- In fact, I already have a few locations in mind. Let's go there right now. ｜ 我之前其实已经定好了几处采风的地点，我们直接过去就好。

With this moonlight as her witness, she shall drink deep of life's chalice until her jagged fate comes to an end. ｜ 阿蕾奇诺的装扮款式。古老的厄月于梦中再度升起，投下冰冷赤红的月光将她包裹。以此月光为证，直至嶙峋的命运来到尽头，她将满饮生命之杯。

- I think he wants us to sweeten the deal... ｜ 看来是需要给一些好处…

- Everyone... keep it up. ｜ 我们跟你们，一起忙。
- See you. ｜ 再见。

- #Alright! Let's head back and pass the news to Nakul, {NICKNAME}. ｜ #好欸！{NICKNAME}，我们回去告诉纳库尔吧。
- Long time no see, most reliable Honorary Knight. I heard that you've reinvented yourself once again, this time as Jean and Lisa's "business consultant." Can't say I'm surprised.\nI've been leading the Cavalry Company on a long-distance training march over the past few days, and just when we arrived back in the neighborhood, a pair of adventurers discovered a band of bandits were taking advantage of the chaos caused by some monsters. So, I ordered some delivery for the Company, a little appetizer before taking care of those troublemakers...\nI never imagined the meals would come with complementary potions which restored the Knights' strength and reaction times to what they were before the exhausting training. The cleanup operation went surprisingly smoothly.\nIt was only afterward that I learned the potions came from your shop. You're doing well, I see?\nAs the Cavalry Company received your assistance, I naturally must write this letter of thanks.\nAlso, please accept this payment as a token of gratitude from us. I hope that we will have more opportunities for such fruitful cooperation as "colleagues." ｜ 好久不见了，我们可靠的荣誉骑士。听说你摇身一变，成了琴和丽莎的「商业顾问」，倒是不令我意外。\n这几天，骑兵小队完成了一次长途行军训练，回到蒙德城附近时，两位冒险家发现一伙盗贼趁着魔物作乱在闹腾，我就让骑士们加了个餐，顺手清剿这些家伙…\n没想到，他们还赞助了我们一批药剂，让骑士们的力量和反应速度恢复到了长途训练前的水准，行动相当顺利。\n事后我才得知，这些药剂出自你们的店铺，看来你们干得挺不错嘛。\n骑兵小队得到了你的帮助，我当然要给你写封正式点的感谢信——\n这份来自骑兵小队的酬谢金，请收好了。希望我们将来还能像这样，以「同事」的身份多进行几次有趣的合作。
- Summons "allies" from the starry skies and the vast earth, hurling forth an ice storm to bombard the area in front and deal Nightsoul-aligned <color=#99FFFFFF>AoE Cryo DMG</color>. This restores a set amount of Nightsoul points for Citlali, and also summons a <color=#FFD780FF>Spiritvessel Skull</color> near a maximum of 3 opponents within the AoE, with 1 Skull for each opponent. Spiritvessel Skulls explode after some time, dealing Nightsoul-aligned <color=#99FFFFFF>AoE Cryo DMG</color> and restoring a set amount of Nightsoul points for Citlali.\n\n<i>"Ugh, enough of this 'dark star, opal star' stuff! Citlalin, Itzpapa, get 'em!"</i> ｜ 驱使来自星天与大地的「盟友」，唤起冰风暴轰击前方区域，造成具有夜魂性质的<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素范围伤害</color>，为茜特菈莉恢复一定夜魂值，并在范围内至多3名敌人附近各自召唤一个<color=#FFD780FF>宿灵之髑</color>。宿灵之髑会在一段时间后爆炸，造成具有夜魂性质的<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素范围伤害</color>，并为茜特菈莉恢复一定夜魂值。\n\n<i>「呜啊，好了！别管什么黑曜白曜了！茜特菈琳、伊兹帕帕，给我一起上！」</i>
- Meow meow! ｜ 喵呜！
- Uh, actually, we're also really unsure about what's happening here... ｜ 其，其实我们心里也没底…

- Well, we'll come play with our Fungi friends when we have time, right? ｜ 那，那我们有空了，还是要来陪蕈兽伙伴们玩哦！
- Ah! I know! Come with me, I'll show you where to look! ｜ #啊！我知道了，{M#哥哥姐姐}{F#姐姐你们}跟我来！我知道要上哪找线索！
- *sigh* Keqing really is super busy. ｜ 唉，刻晴好忙啊。
- I actually don't know her all that well — I've only heard bits and pieces from Cloud Retainer. From what I've heard, she can be quite ferocious. Whenever her temper gets the better of her, she is likely to start obliterating her surroundings. I wonder if maybe she's just... bored. Should... Should I recommend some work to keep her occupied? ｜ 我和她并不能算是熟悉。只是听留云真君提过几句，听说她性子较凶，要是压抑不住心性，容易对周围造成严重破坏。嗯…会不会是因为平日里太闲了呢？我…我该给她推荐些工作吗？
- Oh yeah, speaking of which, would you two have time for a friendly sparring match? I'd like to test the potion I just made. It's said to help with "adjusting your current state." ｜ 对了，说到这个，两位有空陪我切磋一下吗？正好让我试试刚才合成的药剂，说是能帮人「调整状态」呢。

- Well, I'm exhausted from training, so clearly my fitness needs some work. One day, though... I'll smash all the training dummies in Mondstadt... ｜ 我还在为练习感到疲劳，这就是不成熟的证明。但总有一天我会征服蒙德所有的木桩…

- But I heard the water in Fontaine is different from here, so it won't be a useful endeavor. ｜ 可我又听说，枫丹那边的水质和我们这的不太一样，就算学了也没什么用…
- ...No. That's a Florist thing. ｜ …不，我们是调香师，不是花匠。

- Uh... Can you really deliver this many letters and packages? ｜ 嚯…这么多信件和包裹，你们能送得过来吗？

- Paimon's just thinking about the worst-case scenario. Maybe Osse might jump out from a corner and scare you. One of these unmoving statues might start walking around! Or maybe traps might spring out from the ground and the walls...! ｜ 我是说万一的情况，比方说小呜斯突然从转角处跳出来吓你一跳，以为不会动的石像突然动起来了，地上或者墙上突然出现陷阱…！

- What? You look surprised. Never seen a blacksmith play cards before? ｜ 怎么？一副惊讶的样子，铁匠难道就不能擅长打牌吗？
- Welcome aboard the aquabus. This is Marcotte Station, the terminus of the Navia Line. Passengers bound for the Opera Epiclese or Fountain of Lucine should disembark at this station, and follow the signage towards their destination. ｜ 欢迎乘坐巡轨船，本站是娜维娅线终点站——茉洁站。前往欧庇克莱歌剧院、露景泉的乘客请由此下船，按照引导步行前往目的地。
- Hey, cut it out and go home! Your friend Penny needs you! ｜ 别调皮啦，快回家，你们的朋友佩妮需要你们。
- Everyone says first impressions are important, and the first time I ate at Wanmin Restaurant, I had so much regret... regret that it took me so long to visit Liyue Harbor! I could have met Xiangling way sooner... In any case, as soon as she heard me talk about all the rare ingredients in the mountains of my hometown, she started planning a trip to Chenyu Vale! I'll make sure she doesn't go home empty-handed! ｜ 都说第一印象很重要，在万民堂吃过在璃月港的第一顿饭后，我就后悔了。后悔怎么没有早点来璃月港，这样说不定能早点认识香菱！她听说我老家山里有许多罕见食材后，忙不迭就开始计划来沉玉谷的行程了，到时我一定得让她满载而归。
- Domain of Forgery: City of Reflections IV ｜ 炼武秘境：水光之城 IV
- Don't worry, you two. Like you saw yesterday, aiding humanity is the Lord of the Night's mandate. ｜ 没有，这个不用担心，昨天你们也见到了，夜神大人说帮助人类就是她的使命。
- A hat once worn by the witch who dreamt of burning away all of the demons in the world. The large brim blocked her sight. ｜ 曾经梦想烧尽世间魔物的炎之魔女曾经戴过的帽子。宽大的帽檐能遮挡她的视线。
- And when I had finally gotten far enough away to look back at the scene of the crime... They had put all the clothes in a pile, looking to make a fire with which to barbecue some meat... ｜ 我好不容易才逃出来，远远往回望了一眼…它们把抢到的服饰堆成一摞，打算拿来生火烤肉…
- After I heard about the Furball Fortress, she contacted Valerina, and supplied some furniture and toys — the very same ones you see here, in fact! ｜ 听说「猫茸茸城堡」的事后，她主动联系了瓦乐瑞娜小姐，提供了一批家具和玩具，就是你看到的这些陈设…
- #Stop playing around, {NICKNAME}. Don't forget what we're here for. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，认真一点啦，别忘了我们的目的。
- Thank you so much. Let's head right over — time is of the essence. ｜ 非常感谢，那事不宜迟，我们这就出发吧。
- Is that right? ｜ 哦？
- Oh? So you really didn't know? ｜ 咦？你不知道吗？
- I have marked out a potential data storage location for you. Please eliminate the Abyssal corruption present there to restore the area. ｜ 为您标记可回收数据的可能存放地点，请清除该处深渊的侵蚀以恢复数据承载的区块。

- A verdict can bring emotional catharsis. ｜ 随判决一同得到发泄？
- She managed to turn the tides all by herself... Iansan of the Collective of Plenty! ｜ 曾经孤身一人绝境翻盘，来自「沃陆之邦」的伊安珊选手。
- Mighty warriors, plural? So Paimon counts, too...? Hehe, Paimon's starting to like you a lot! ｜ 「强大的战士」？连我也算上了吗…嘿嘿，你人真好！

- I do run into my former colleagues here sometimes. But I was never very well-known. ｜ 说起来，在这里其实也能碰到过去的同僚，不过我以前就不是什么显眼的角色。

### Part 039

- A Fatui mage who can command Cryo Cicins in battle. Their origins and what they look like under that mask are both mysteries.\nReason dictates that those who lack Visions should not be able to control the elements as these mages do. However, in addition to using Mist Grass to control the Cryo Cicins, they also boldly wield the might of frost. Seeing them as they wander the land in their seemingly aimless way, one can't help but wonder about the duty that must compel them... ｜ 操控着冰萤进行战斗，由来与面具下的容貌都是谜的愚人众少女术士。\n没有神之眼的人类，理应是无法像她们这样自如地操控元素的；但她们却在利用雾虚草操控冰萤之余，肆无忌惮地挥霍着寒冰的力量。看似漫无目的地四处游荡的她们，又领受着何种不为人知的使命呢…
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启
- We need a Bija to help a very important friend of Arana... She's a very important friend of ours too... ｜ 我们需要惟耶之实，因为兰拉娜要帮助她很重要的朋友，也是我们很重要的朋友…
- Excellent. And, you all almost managed to get me limbered up. ｜ 你们的水平…到了差不多能让我彻底舒展筋骨的程度。
- But now, his attitude is really driving me nuts. He could've done so much better than this! ｜ 但是现在，我真是有点恨铁不成钢，看不惯他做事的态度。
- It appears that I was too naive to think I could deceive the Dendro Archon in person like this. ｜ 看来在草神大人的面前，妄图以小聪明与您嬉戏一番，我还是太天真了。
- The inlaid gemstone is recorded as Smaragdus Jadeite. The document even has the official seal of the Ministry on it. ｜ 登记的镶嵌矿石是「翠珏岩」，上面还有总务司的公章呢。
- Oh, are you interested in these things as well? ｜ 难道说你对这个感兴趣吗？
- This weirdo keeps saying weird stuff. Paimon's getting confused... Haven't we uncovered everything? And what are Al-Ahmar's secrets, anyway? ｜ 怪家伙每次都说些怪话，我都听糊涂了…我们不是已经解开了全部的谜题吗？阿赫玛尔的秘密又是什么东西？
- Your experience at the Northland Bank isn't the greatest, but as you and Ningguang decide to return to your game, you discover something amiss... ｜ 在北国银行的经历并不愉快，当你和凝光打算回到游戏中的时候，却发现有点不对劲…
- Of course! I will remember this lesson! Always! ｜ 我！我一定牢记这次的教训！
- Quickly, escort Her Excellency back to Inazuma City, and regroup with the general's forces as soon as possible. ｜ 你们尽快护送将军大人返回稻妻城，与大将率领的军队汇合。
- Thank you, goodbye. ｜ 谢谢，再见。
- We will keep bonding with our Fungi. ｜ 我们要继续培养默契。
- Not... again... ｜ 又是…这样…
- Rounds Passed ｜ 已经过回合数
- When you have collected <color=#FFE14BFF>40</color> Spirit Carp, you will receive the Votive Rainjade's revelation, which will mark the locations of the remaining Spirit Carp. ｜ 汇集的「苍灵鲤」达到<color=#FFE14BFF>40</color>尾时，便可以获得「祀珑」的「启示」，在地图上标示出剩余「苍灵鲤」所在的位置。
- Miko, did you choose the hagoita for the third round of the Test of Courage because you already knew about Chizuru? ｜ 说起来神子，你选羽子板作为第三轮试胆大会的目标物，是早就知道千鹤的事吗？
- Main Cannon, Make Ready... Fire! ｜ 战船？主炮！开火啦！

- You shameless traitor! You dare to show up here? Explain yourself! ｜ 狗东西！你怎么有脸来这里，你最好做个解释！
- Hortus Euergetis ｜ 优恩花园

- "Uthabiti" is my Ancient Name — it means the ability to stay strong in the face of adversity. *sigh* But I often wonder why the Wayob decided to give the name to me. I'm so weak, and whether at home or among the tribe, few people even know of me... With so many strong and cool people around me, am I really worthy of the name? ｜ 「乌沙博蒂」是我的古名，它的意思是坚强，唉，可很多时候我都想不明白为什么这个古名会给我。我那么弱小，不管是在家里，还是在部族里，存在感都不算高…有那么多优秀的人在身边，我真的有拥有它的资格吗？

- Exploring the regions of Fontaine, solving its many mysteries, unearthing its hidden treasures, and making offerings to the Statues of The Seven...\nThese will all increase your Exploration Progress in Fontaine. \nExploration Progress also reflects an adventurer's Reputation in this land.\n\nYou will be rewarded with Reputation when you increase your Exploration Progress to certain points. ｜ 探索枫丹的各个区域、解开未知的谜题、发现荒野的财宝、供奉七天神像…\n这些行为都会提升在枫丹的「探索度」。\n同时，枫丹的探索度也代表了冒险者在枫丹的名望。\n\n探索度每达到一定的程度，就获得声望奖励。
- Funeral ceremonies allow mortals to leave this world with dignity.\nAnd Liyue's Wangsheng Funeral Parlor is said to be painting the last strokes on the scrolls of people's lives in the most respectful way.\nTraditional funerals include multiple steps such as holding a wake, burial, putting up a memorial plaque... All of which are subject to strict rules.\nRegardless of their social standing and level of wealth, all who depart deserve a ceremony that would do them honor. This is the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor's client service philosophy.\nOne would think that such a reputable organization ought to be led only by an individual of utmost learning and sagacity.\nYet the heavy mantle of the 77th Director has fallen on the shoulders of a young lady like Hu Tao.\nShe has got quite a reputation in Liyue. Whenever someone mentions Hu Tao, their neighbors find it extremely hard to navigate the conversation.\nAlthough she is widely praised for her wit and shrewdness, her eccentric notions are not as welcome, as she often lets her imagination run wild.\nAs a three-year-old, she would read through volumes of classic texts while doing handstands. At six, she would cut classes and fall asleep in coffins. When she was eight, she started living in the parlor and learning the etiquette of funeral ceremonies...\nOne would never use the word "measured" to describe her behavior.\nDuring her teenage years, Hu Tao was tasked with conducting a funeral ceremony for the first time.\nThe parlor's undertakers and consultants were anticipating her debut with their stomachs in knots as if they were suspended over the peaks of Jueyun Karst. ｜ 丧葬白事，乃是凡人最后的体面。\n而璃月「往生堂」，堪称人生画卷的终笔者。\n传统葬仪门道繁多——停灵守灵，落葬之法，牌位器具…以上种种环节都有着严苛的规矩。\n无论逝者出身贵贱，财富多寡，都要给他们置办一场合乎身份的葬礼。这便是往生堂的待客之道。\n如此重要的机构，它的执掌者理应学识渊博、行事慎重。\n然而，七十七代堂主的重任，却落到了胡桃这个小姑娘肩上。\n胡桃此人在璃月颇有些名气。谈起她来，邻里街坊总是一言难尽。\n人们盛赞她聪明伶俐，却也忌惮她满腔奇思。她的鬼点子，已经到了异想天开的地步。\n三岁倒立背书，通读卷藏名篇，六岁择日逃学，潜进棺材酣睡，八岁常驻堂中，研习丧葬礼数…\n无论怎么看，胡桃都与「稳重」一词不沾边。\n十多岁时，胡桃初次执掌大仪，操办葬礼。\n堂下各位仪倌与客卿的心，全都悬在了绝云间的峭壁上。

- Final Mildness retained reached 280 ｜ 最终保有「清淡值」达到280
- Kaveh was born into a classic scholarly family in Sumeru. His father was from the Rtawahist Darshan and once worked at the Akademiya, while his mother had graduated from Kshahrewar, and much as he would become later in life, she too was a famous architect. Influenced by them, Kaveh was interested in architectural design from a young age. They would sit in the living room as he sat at home playing with the block puzzles they had bought for him.\nTheirs was a house in which words were not necessary, and Kaveh would gain his understanding of "home" from this time.\nHowever, their blissful days were not to last. Some time before he joined the Akademiya, his father would, at his encouragement, join the Interdarshan Championship. The competition itself was not a complicated affair, but his father, who became a favorite to win, would miss becoming champion by a hair, and then proceeded to go missing for a time afterward.\nSoon, the bad news came: His father had perished in an accident in the desert. The suddenness of this misfortune threw mother and son into disarray. His mother was hit particularly hard. Being a sensitive soul by nature, her husband's passing would cause her to break down, spending much time in anxious, gloomy thought. As for Kaveh, he would see his father's laugh and promise to bring something nice back for him as he walked out that door every time he closed his eyes to sleep. Young Kaveh thought that had he not said anything, his father might not have taken part in the contest, and he would not have gone missing afterward, and finally perished as a result. But no matter how he begged, the past could not be changed. His father's death, his mother's agony... all these things that could no longer be taken back were on the account of a single thing he had said. From that day forward, he would live under the shadow of that guilt.\nHis mother would say that her husband was a man with a good heart, and that life at such a person's side made her happy. Indeed, after his passing, she would never again smile. "Home" went from a sanctuary of warmth and light to a cold and lonely hall. Kaveh would often find his mother sitting on the sofa staring at her trembling hands in silence. She could neither draw anything at all, nor even conceive of a design in her mind. Each time this happened, Kaveh would feel like a giant hand was crushing him to the ground, and he would question himself: Were it not for me, would the family have ended up like this?\nAt that time, he was still young, and he could do very little. Out of guilt, he would do his best to keep his mother company, and he would never wear a disappointed face around her, trying to support her in any way he could, even if such was but a drop in the bucket.\nIt was amidst this chaos that Kaveh would reach schooling age and, having passed the entrance exams, enroll into Kshahrewar. During this time, he would inevitably spend less time with his mother. She would thus travel to Fontaine to ease her soul a little. There, she would receive a job offer, and upon returning to Sumeru, she informed Kaveh of the good news. Kaveh knew that this would leave him to live alone, but still, he agreed, and even saw his mother off on the day she departed.\nHe would continue to look on even after her ship had long left the harbor. He would deeply miss her, but he knew that it was best that she left the place that had come to represent so much pain for her. For her sake, Kaveh would never admit that he was lonely. He assured her that he was all grown up now and could live independently. And if he should be kept awake at night by loneliness, pain, or memories of their now-broken family, why, it was his just desserts for egging his father on to take part in the competition. One guilty of harming his parents so deeply deserved all that came to them, and so he must live on bearing that brand.\nGiven that such thoughts have been his constant companions since, one could say that "home" taught Kaveh how to care, and also utterly purged him of the ability to knowingly harm another person. In the many years afterward, he would remain trapped by his personality and ideals, desiring to help any and all who asked it of him, and unable to truly oppose others even if he wished to try and resist on some matters. Despite the good he often does, his guilt remains. More than this, he cannot accept pure goodwill, for when he makes choices, he believes that he should be punished, and finds some comfort in the pain.\nIf Kaveh were a sculpture, he would be one that appeared all but flawless, but which would suffer utter destruction if the weak point in its core were to be found. ｜ 卡维出生在一个典型的须弥学者家。父亲是明论派出身，曾在教令院任职，母亲毕业于妙论派，与卡维一样，也是著名建筑设计师。受父母影响，卡维自幼便对建筑设计表现出兴趣。他坐在家里玩父母买的积木拼图时，他们就坐在客厅里。\n没有说话声也没关系，家是一种氛围。卡维对「家」的认知正是来源于那段时光。\n好景不长，卡维入学教令院之前某年，父亲在他的鼓励和要求下报名参加了教令院举办的学院争霸赛。赛事本不复杂，公认夺冠有望的卡维父亲却与冠军失之交臂，并在赛后失踪了一段时日。\n很快，噩耗传来：父亲在沙漠意外身亡。消息太过突然，让母子俩彻底陷入混乱。卡维的母亲备受打击，她是天生敏感的人，丈夫去世一事让她一蹶不振，很长时间里都深陷焦虑与忧郁。而卡维，无论多少次闭上眼睛进入梦乡，都会反复梦见父亲出门前开的玩笑和要带些好东西给他看的保证。年幼的卡维意识到，假如他不提，父亲或许就不会参赛，不会在赛后失踪，最终落得身亡。但无论他如何恳求，发生的都已发生，父亲之死、母亲的痛苦…所有无可挽回的事只因自己一句话。自这天起，卡维的人生就被负罪感彻底缠住了。\n母亲曾说父亲是性格善良的好人，与这种人生活在一起是幸福的。父亲去世后，母亲确实不再露出笑容。「家」因而从温暖的、有阳光的圣地变成了寂寞的、冷清的客厅。许多次卡维看见母亲坐在沙发上对着颤抖的双手发呆，她什么都画不出来，脑子里毫无构思。每当这时，卡维都像被一只无形的巨手按在地上，不得不在心中质问自己：如果不是我，这个家又怎么会变成现在这样？\n那时卡维尚且年幼，能做的事有限。出于愧疚，他尽可能陪伴母亲，从不在母亲面前露出沮丧的表情，在任何想得到的地方给予支持，哪怕知道那些不过是杯水车薪。\n一片混乱中，卡维到了入学年龄，考入教令院妙论派就读。儿子入学，母子相伴的时间难免减少。为转换心情，卡维的母亲前往枫丹散心。期间她收到了当地发来的工作邀请，返回须弥后将好消息告知卡维。明知母亲走后自己会过上孤独的生活，卡维也欣然同意，并在母亲离开须弥那天送她出行。\n直到船开出港口很久，卡维仍站在原地遥望。他深深感到不舍，可也明白对母亲来说离开伤心地才最好。为了她的幸福，卡维不会承认自己孤独。他对母亲保证他已经长大了，绝对能一个人生活。假如他在未来某日为孤独而痛苦甚至为分崩离析的家庭夜不能寐，那也是对他怂恿父亲参加比赛的惩罚。对一个害了父亲和母亲的罪人来说什么都是应得，他必须背负烙印继续生活下去。\n鉴于这种思想在未来一直伴随着他，或许可以认为，家庭教会卡维什么是关怀之心，也彻底夺走了卡维伤害他人的能力。因而在后来很多年里，他始终为自身个性与理想所困，尽力去帮助几乎任何有求于他的人，试图反抗一些事物，又无法真正与他人为敌。他常做善事，却仍感愧疚，不时为负罪感所累。更有甚者，他无法在纯粹的好意中生存，总在抉择时认为自己应当受到惩戒，唯求从这些痛苦中找到一些慰藉。\n若将卡维比作一尊雕塑，从任何角度看起来他都无懈可击。但只需找到核心的一点脆弱之处，就能彻底将其摧毁。

- A simple shed made of Otogi Wood that is largely built using three main processes and is suited for laying against walls and using all kinds of free space within and outside Inazuma City.\nDried Otogi Wood is light and sturdy, and these shed's roofs can be raised by one strong artisan alone, which makes it a very flexible material to work with. ｜ 简易的御伽木棚，大致只需三道主要工序就能搭建成形，适合依托墙面设置，充分利用稻妻城内城外的每处碎片空间。\n经过烘干后的御伽木板轻巧而结实，这座工棚顶板只需一位身强力壮的工匠就能举起，是十分便捷的施工建材。

The lovely scent enters your nose long before the food enters your mouth. Three servings later, and you're still raring to go for more. ｜ 朴实无华的渔家小菜。将刚刚捞起的鱼去皮切块，与金鱼草一起剁碎，拌入味噌与盐调味成鱼饼，最后加以烤制。还未入口便已闻到扑鼻香气，三个吃完仍觉得意犹未尽。

- Anyway, let's try to get inside first. The operator might still be there. That would make for some great data... I mean, a good research subject... ｜ 不管怎么说，我们先想办法进去再说吧。说不定驾驶员还在里面呢，那可是绝好的数据…不对，研究对象…
- Hehe... Now I'm getting embarrassed... ｜ 嘿嘿…说得我都不好意思了…
- Remember, you sent me to get Iron Chunks... ｜ 你之前让我去采铁块…
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- Is that Noelle? And the Honorary Knight, too? ｜ 哈哈，是诺艾尔吗，连「荣誉骑士」也来了？
- I told Sorush the dancer was already decided, but she insisted on meeting Nilou in person. ｜ 我半路提醒斯露莎，花神之舞的人选已定，但她说什么都要去见见妮露小姐。
- Stone Gate ｜ 石门
- Yeah, you got it! As long as you hit all the weak spots at once from the right angle, the solid phlogiston will fall right on top of the spout, and block it up. ｜ 不愧是你！只要对好角度、一齐攻击所有弱点，让它们往喷口的方向砸下来…就能封堵喷口啦。
- This time, you should be able to defeat it for good, so have at it! ｜ 这次，你应该能够击败它了，放开手去干吧。
- He made a point of coming to thank me after he recovered — what a lovely boy. He speaks so quietly, though... He probably doesn't go out of his way to talk to other people much. But I could tell that he has a rich and detailed inner world, because he looked so captivated as he was looking through some Melusines' paintings. ｜ 他的身体恢复后主动找到了我道谢，是个很有礼貌的孩子呢。讲话轻声细语的…看得出平时大概不太擅长主动跟别人打交道，但我能感受到他的内心世界一定非常丰富而细腻，因为他仔细地翻看了美露莘们画的画，看得极其入神。
- But don't you think some of my solutions can be a little stupid? ｜ 但有时候我的办法却还挺笨的？
- Return to Khayyam's camp ｜ 返回海亚姆的营地
- So we have to... go through these Abyss portals? ...Hey, wait for Paimon! ｜ 是要穿过那些深渊的传送门吗…喂等等我！
- The port to the west, haha... It's much smaller than Liyue Harbor, eh? The specialties we export to Fontaine and Sumeru along with the oddities we import from them go through it. ｜ 西边的大港口，哈哈…比璃月港要小多咯。往枫丹、须弥卖特产，也从他们那边进口稀奇玩意。
- Available right away ｜ 初始可用
- Tiny Miracle's Hourglass ｜ 奇迹之沙
- Sundial of the Sojourner ｜ 逐光之石
- Shunsuiken 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段瞬水剑伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Are there any easy jobs where we can earn loads of Mora for just standing around? Oh, better yet, for sitting around! That's the kind of task we're interested in now. ｜ 有没有那种毫不费力，站着就能拿摩拉拿到手软的工作？我们很有兴趣。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Let's go investigate. ｜ 进行自由调查。
- Dehya's expression is relaxed, as if her mood hasn't been affected by the heavy conversation at all. ｜ 迪希雅神情很放松，似乎并未被沉重的话题影响太多。
- Skill Healing|{param2:F1P} Max HP ｜ 技能治疗量|{param2:F1P}生命值上限
- And why must I allow completely unrelated people to see my father? Like I said earlier, he's in no condition to see guests. ｜ 我为什么非要允许不相干的人跑去探望父亲呢？我都说了，他的身体状况不适合见客人。
- Akira ｜ 阿晃
- Who knows...? It's just a hunch. I've been known to be wrong on occasion. ｜ 嗯~？谁知道呢，可能只是我的感觉吧。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- It does sound like defamation... but it's important to find the... W—Wait! Killer? What happened? ｜ 居然是诬陷…这种事也该强烈谴责！等下…凶手？发生了凶案？！
- Uh, can someone remind Paimon again why Adele wants to join the Spina? ｜ 对了，为什么阿黛尔想要加入刺玫会呢？

- ...Hah, enough of that. Time is short. We do not have much excess energy left to also maintain those of our kind who have already become phlogiston lifeforms. ｜ …哈，好了，时间已经不多了。为了维持那些已然化为燃素生命的同族，剩余的能量并不剩多少。

- Huh? Wait. Why me? ｜ 等等，为什么要监视我？

- Look for the Weasel Thief's tracks ｜ 寻找盗宝鼬的踪迹

- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- A popular song since the reconstruction of Mondstadt. It tells the story of Vennessa, the founder of the Knights of Favonius, in her early years as a slave in Mondstadt. ｜ 自蒙德城重建起，广为传唱的歌谣，讲述了西风骑士团创始者温妮莎早年，在蒙德受到奴役的故事。
- Movement SPD is greatly increased for the next 30s. ｜ 在接下来的30秒内，移动速度大幅提升。
- Treasure Hoarder ｜ 盗宝团
- If you do find something, don't make the amateur mistake of running off in your excitement. Be sure to <color=#00E1FFFF>note down the clue</color> first. ｜ 对了，如果找到了什么线索，可别太兴奋，记得<color=#00E1FFFF>先记下来</color>，再慢慢解读啊。
- You are never selfish or merciless. ｜ 也绝非弃同伴于险境而不顾的薄情之人。
- I'm so glad I asked for your help... Please, take this for your trouble. ｜ 还好让你们来帮忙了…这次也请收下我的答谢吧。

- That's Kazuha, always sensible. ｜ 不愧是万叶，很理智。

- Well, I just happen to be hungry. ｜ 正好饿了。
- She's a cute kid... but I have to keep my distance. Whenever she plays with me, her bombs always end up going off... It's not so much me I'm worried about, it would just be awful if something happened to Klee. The Knights of Favonius would never forgive me, that's for sure. ｜ 那个孩子啊…很可爱，但我必须和她保持距离。只要我陪她玩，她的那些炸弹就会突然爆炸…我倒霉一点无所谓，但要是炸伤了可莉就麻烦了，估计整个骑士团都会跟我没完吧。
- I'm counting on you! ｜ 拜托了！
- That's right! Good girl. As soon as you're better you can eat whatever you like! ｜ 豆豆乖，只要病好了，以后吃什么都可以。
- "Here lovers did part, and here they did meet again." ｜ 「在此地与恋人作别，在此处与恋人重聚。」
- Mm! ｜ 呶！
- Alpha Pose ｜ 叉腰
- Ah, you flatter me. I'm no expert, so what I give cannot be considered guidance. ｜ 呵呵，哪里的话。我非熟道行家，谈不上指点。

- Elemental Burst: II ｜ 元素爆发·其二
- A millennium's worth of stories cannot be told in one moment. ｜ 千年的故事，一时半会儿可说不完。
- Well... fireworks are my craft after all. Every batch has to be spectacular! Hee-hee... ｜ 嗯…毕竟我也是手艺人嘛，不知不觉…就想搞的精彩一点了，哈哈哈…
- Ugh, this thing's in a real state! Looks like nobody's come to fix it up in ages. ｜ 居然坏成这样了，看来很长时间没人维修过它了。
- That's how we got to Fontaine! ｜ 我们就是坐那个来枫丹的！

- "The Rooster" ｜ 军中人称「鸡哥」
- Indeed, after that huge, huge storm, Hibiki, Domeki, and the others never returned, either. ｜ 而且，自从那次好大好大的打雷之后，阿响和百目鬼他们也都不见了。
