- For the hanging banner, we want an octagonal tube with eight tassels per corner, and a dome of red gauze covering the top. As for the portrait pavilion, we're looking to do one incense pavilion with two spare rooms — one as a changing room, the other as a display room. And we'd like a plain white cover over the whole thing. ｜ 幡要八角筒子幡，每角八穗，盖红罗座伞一把。亭要彩香亭一座，配亭两座，一更衣，一四宝，覆全白罩片。
- Sharky's Bite Base DMG|{param1:F2P} Max HP ｜ 鲨鲨撕咬基础伤害|{param1:F2P}生命值上限
- These herbivores, which often dwell close to the water, are famous for their steely, stoic "won't even twitch if lightning strikes right next to their toes" disposition. Tourists consider them to be the paragon of animal friends.\nCapybaras like to zone out while having a soak in the water, or sun themselves on the shore, and it's quite common for them to barely move for most of the day, as though not a single thing in the world could possibly perturb their calm demeanor and make them anxious. Despite their fluffy appearance, their hairs are actually quite hard and tough. If you pet them in the same direction as their coat of hair, it feels relatively smooth, but should you pet them in the opposite direction, you may end up with a scratched hand. Perhaps that is the reason even famished predators do not regard these completely harmless and quite defenseless little friends as prey... ｜ 栖息在水畔的食草动物，以稳定到「落雷砸在脚边都不会被惊动」的性格闻名，被游客们评为模范级的动物朋友。\n豚兽们喜欢泡在水中发呆，或是躺在岸边晒太阳，时常纹丝不动大半天，似乎世上没有能让它们着急的事。与毛茸茸的外表不同，它们的毛发其实有着可观的硬度和韧性，顺着纹理抚摸时，手感相当光滑，反之则有可能被划伤。或许正是因此，连饥饿的掠食者都不会将这种完全无害，没什么抵抗能力的家伙当成狩猎目标吧…
- So, have you found those Iridescent Inscription fragments...? ｜ 怎么样，你们找到「镌光铭印」的碎片了吗…
- to open the gate ｜ 打开大门
- Go to collect ｜ 前往采集
- The things that you just said... ｜ 你刚才说的那些话…
- A few Fontemer Aberrants are constantly attacking the schools of fish in these waters. Clear the area and defeat all the Fontemer Aberrants. ｜ 这片水域内有数只原海异种正在不断攻击原生鱼群。清理这片水域，打倒所有原海异种。
- #By the way, {NICKNAME}, do you play cards? ｜ #对了，{NICKNAME}，你会玩牌吗？
- They're on the way. ｜ 诗在路上了。
- Whoa... That's harsh. ｜ 呜哇——真是严苛的想法。
- O Great Sebastos, please, give us your instructions... ｜ 伟大的至尊，请您谕示…
- Barbara-sama's work is essential. As fans, we should do our utmost not to disturb her! ｜ 芭芭拉大人平时也有很重要的工作，我们粉丝团的一切行为，都要建立在不打扰到芭芭拉大人的基础上！
- A tiara worn by those tasked with offering sacrifices in ancient times. After being subjected to the dancing sacrificial flames year in and year out, it possesses remarkable resistance. ｜ 在古老的时代，司祭祀之人佩戴的礼冠。因为常年受火舌舔舐，具有奇妙的抗性。
- (A fresh fruit pit. Someone was here recently.) ｜ （一枚新鲜的果核，说明不久之前有人来过。）
- Xianyun ｜ 闲云
- I'm referring to the Travel Permit. It is a document issued by the Tenryou Commission or the Kanjou Commission that allows you to travel freely within Inazuma. ｜ 就是「通行凭证」，是由天领奉行或勘定奉行下发的文件，可以在稻妻境内自由通行。
- *sigh* If nothing else, we've got the boss and his enhanced frangible rounds. They're guaranteed to knock even the strongest Tatankasaurus out without leaving a trace! ｜ 哎，只能指望老大了，他强化了易碎弹头的威力，新型号能百分百打昏最强壮的突角龙，还不会留下任何痕迹！
- Have mercy, good samurai! We don't want your money anymore, please forgive us! ｜ 别打了，武士大人，我们不要你的钱了，饶了我们吧。
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- She was a lost student who woke up one day and found herself in the middle of the desert. She stumbled across the Veluriyam Mirage whilst searching for landmarks. ｜ 她是一位迷路的学生，那天她睡醒后，发现自己突然来到了沙漠里，到处张望地标的时候，意外找到了「琉形蜃境」。
- <color=#FFCC33FF>We'd like to invite you to attend this music festival.</color> ｜ <color=#FFCC33FF>想邀请你去参加音乐庆典。</color>
- Trembling Female Voice ｜ 颤抖的女声
- Summer Night's Finale ｜ 夏祭终末
- Of Maple and Tea Scents Entwined ｜ 枫香茶雾一室中
- If you're willing to celebrate the festival here, you're more than welcome to join us. As they say, the more the merrier. ｜ 不过你要是愿意，留在这过节也行，反正这里人也挺多的，也算热闹。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启
- The arrival of the new world is fated. I... ｜ 新世界的到来已经注定。我——
- Dr. Mosso believed that humans have various reasons for lying, with various feelings underlying those reasons. It is those emotions that make them human. ｜ 莫索博士觉得，人类说谎有各种理由，理由背后又藏着各种感情，就是那些感情使人类成为人类的。
- But his research base is still out there. ｜ 但他的研究基地还在。
- About Byakuyakoku... ｜ 关于白夜国…
- A lightning-infused flower, somehow spared the fate of being trodden underfoot or reduced to ash by the furious purple fire, making it the sole survivor on the day of disaster. ｜ 在劫难之日侥幸免受纷乱的践踏与紫之火的忿恨之摧，于惨象中幸存的雷色之花。
- Um... will he definitely hear us saying his name though? Maybe we should find somewhere quieter. ｜ 不过…喊名字，真的能听见吗？要不然，我们找个僻静点的地方试试好了。
- Children grow up so quickly. What can I say? I just hope that she can live the life she wants. Health and happiness are more important than anything else. ｜ 小孩子成长得很快，我有什么可说的呢，我只希望她能过上自己想要的生活，健康、快乐，比什么都重要。
- ...Yes. That's why I tried looking for possible evidence of Aranara. But it turned out that I was just being a clown, as always, and not even a funny one. ｜ …没错，所以我才会到这附近寻找兰那罗出没的痕迹，没想到却还是和以前一样，只能成为一段不好笑的笑料…
- Yeah, sure, let's do it! Things were getting quiet around here, y'know? ｜ 好好好，我正觉得有些安静呢。
- Shenhe! ｜ 申鹤——
- Yikes! He's the guy who made a complete mess of the Mikage Furnace! ｜ 呜哇！他是那个拖拖拉拉，把「御影炉心」弄得一团糟的家伙！
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Oh, I know what a son-in-law is. That means you're his daughter's husband. ｜ 我知道女婿是什么意思，意思就是你是他女儿的丈夫。
- Cannot interact while indwelling a Saurian ｜ 魂附状态下无法进行交互
- If you run into any danger... ｜ 如果遇到危险的话…
- <color=#C87D1DFF>When an opposing character is hit by Elemental Reaction DMG:</color> Deal 1 Piercing DMG to all opposing characters. ｜ <color=#C87D1DFF>敌方角色受到元素反应伤害后：</color>对所有敌方角色造成1点穿透伤害。
- Obtained from the Crafting Bench Conversion Tab ｜ 合成台转化页签转化获取
- Alright. Let's see, who else can enter Jueyun Karst as they please, I wonder... ｜ 好吧，我想想还有谁能出入绝云间的…
- A flower gifted to you by an unknown Aranara.\nA symbol of Aranara friendship. One who receives this flower willingly recognizes this friendship. ｜ 不知名的兰那罗赠送的花儿。\n这种花是兰那罗友情的象征，而愿意收下这朵花的人，就是许可了兰那罗的这份友情。
- Placing Furnishings, please wait and try again later ｜ 请等待摆设配置完成后再操作
- Master and everyone in Sumeru has taken good care of me, but I've never forgotten my friends in Mondstadt. I've actually been thinking about taking some time to go back for a visit. ｜ 师父和须弥的大家都很关照我，不过我从来没有忘记蒙德的朋友们，最近我一直想找个时间回去探望一次。
- Spiritbreath Thorn Interval|{param4:F1}s ｜ 灵息之刺间隔|{param4:F1}秒
- Give the retrieved flowers to Flora ｜ 将回收的花交给芙萝拉
- Oh? You got this then? ｜ 由申鹤小姐来？
- Hey! Paimon may be small, but Paimon is like... Uh, what's the saying? Like a butterfly that can dodge and a bee that can sting! ｜ 哼，虽然我比较小，但我像…怎么说来着？蝴蝶一样闪躲，像蜜蜂一样蛰人！
- *cough* B—But that's not the point! I always make sure to follow the law! ｜ 呃，不！不，我做的事，绝对是在法典允许的范围内。
- And if the Chief Justice personally presides over the trial, it'll most likely be worth paying attention to. Certainly more newsworthy, at any rate. ｜ 而若是由最高审判官大人亲自审理，那多半很值得关注了。至少从新闻价值上来看，比前者重要得多。
- He sometimes shows up around here, but he's always sneaking about, trying not to be seen. ｜ 有时候会在这附近见到它，总是躲躲藏藏。
- Looks like everyone's got their own plans for this toughie. ｜ 看来面对这种困难的比赛，每个人都有自己的打算。
- Karkata ｜ 卡卡塔
- You have my thanks. Now that the Cleansing Ritual has been completed, the Sacred Sakura is now thriving more than ever before. ｜ 真是非常感谢。大祓完成之后，神樱的繁茂更胜从前。
- Takatsukasa Clan Retainer ｜ 鹰司家臣
- Character Story 4 ｜ 角色故事4
- Rawr! ｜ 呀！
- Beidou ｜ 北斗
- Best you consider what you're gonna do next. ｜ 你们还是考虑一下自己的后路吧。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- No more Companion Events will appear after this ｜ 此后将不再出现伙伴事件
- It is him! Ugh, he didn't realize that he dropped something, did he? ｜ 果然又是他，哎呀，难道他没发现自己的计划书不见了吗…
- (As a kid, I thought my parents were invincible. They were always so strong and gentle... They seemed like the most powerful people in the world.) ｜ （小时候我总觉得父母无所不能。既强大，又温柔，是全世界最厉害的人。）
- And so, the rebels fought duel after duel with the aristocrats' lackeys all across Mondstadt. ｜ 于是，游侠们和贵族们的爪牙们，就这样在蒙德各处展开了一场又一场的对决。
- As you get further on your journey... Will you change the look of this place? ｜ 随着旅途见闻的增长，你会改变这里的布置吗？
- Charged Attack DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param6:F1P}
- I see... Thank you. So, as for the dark mud we... *cough* Sorry... ｜ 这样啊…谢谢你，前辈。那么那些污黑的物质…咳咳…抱歉…
- Ooh, what have we here? It looks like dust, but... with elemental traces on. ｜ 咦，这是什么？看着像是「灰尘」…但是却有元素的痕迹。
- The way Tirzad thinks is really strange. In my opinion, a couple just has to consider each other suitable. There's no need to compete with others. ｜ 提尔扎德的想法还真是奇怪啊，我觉得恋爱只要双方觉得彼此合适就行啦，何必要和别人争个高下。
- Capricious Warbeast ｜ 多变的战争巨兽
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- So let me recommend someone else to you who might attend instead — Xigu Antiques's boss, Linlang. ｜ 所以我给您推荐一个人吧——希古居的老板琳琅。
- If you sit, we'll be able to improve photo-taking stability, right? ｜ 坐下的话，不是可以提高留影的稳定性吗？
- Open your Inventory and check Persikov's manuscript to obtain the clues to finding the Crystalline Cores. ｜ 打开背包，查阅「佩尔西科夫的手稿」以获取晶核的线索。
- Okay! ｜ 嗯！
- "Great," you say...? ｜ 大…？
- #{LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Click}{LAYOUT_PS#Press} to view the recipe list ｜ 点击查看配方列表
- Beautifully-Written Note ｜ 字迹娟秀的留信
- Not to mention the fact that those Fontaine fellows almost wiped us out with their dirty tricks. We were fortunate to have your help, Traveler. ｜ 别说了，前面差点还被大鱼拖下了水，那伙人下手真黑，多亏了旅行者来帮忙。
- I mean it this time! For this final trial, I've come up with the hardest setup I can think of, so you'd better give it your all... ｜ 这回我是认真的！在这最终的试炼里，我拿出了我能想到的最难布置，你们最好全力以赴…
- Good, I'm counting on you. Now let me think... ｜ 那就拜托你了，我想想…
- You can't be playing with Hora the whole time, y'know? Gotta move onto the real business sometime. ｜ 你可不能一直光顾着和霍莱玩呀。还有正事要做。
- Her name is Tubby. And yes, she was here even before me. ｜ 那是阿圆，确实是前辈。
- Start using Custom Marker display settings and begin editing? ｜ 是否开启自定义标记显示并进行编辑？
- But whatever, some of the stuff that goes on between mommies and daddies isn't meant for kids to understand. Let's keep playing, shall we? ｜ 算了，爸爸妈妈的事，我才不懂呢，我们接着玩吧。
- Thanks. ｜ 谢谢。
- Opponents are invulnerable to Cryo DMG. ｜ 敌人不会受到冰元素伤害。
